name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Let's make Idaho a sanctuary state for freedom!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Last week, we had a wonderful meeting with patriotic citizens in Albion, Idaho. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-12-16-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0906747860&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| | December is a busy month, but our campaign to **Make Idaho Free Again** never rests! Last week, we had a wonderful meeting with patriotic citizens in Albion, Idaho. I truly enjoyed meeting with them at the Comish Hall Event Center, which is a beautiful place to hold a community event. We learned about the Albion State Normal School, which was a two-year college built in 1893 to teach Idaho's future teachers. It closed in 1951 with 6000 student teachers having passed thru the campus. I appreciated listening to the concerns of those in attendance. It was also encouraging to hear from Congressional Candidate Brian Smith. Thanks to all who helped make this event happen and to all who attended.
---
|
---
| Last night, I had a productive virtual meeting with retired law enforcement, veterans, and other conservatives who are part of a group named Team America. These great patriots are committed to protecting our freedoms and defending our country. I have also had some interviews lately, which you may have missed. While in North Idaho, I had an interview on Speak Up North Idaho with Barbara Carpenter at northidahoradio.com. You can listen to the interview [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e82565c372&e=823fa8e224). I recently had a great talk with Daniel Bobinski regarding the actions I have taken this year as Lt. Governor in response to Gov. Little's unconstitutional actions. Daniel is a true Patriot and a great journalist! You can watch the video of our discussion by clicking [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f2382663a7&e=823fa8e224).
---
|
## Make Idaho Free Again!
---
| I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to **Make Idaho Free Again!** **_President Trump has endorsed my run for Idaho Governor_** because I stand for **America First** policies including individual liberty, election integrity, a strong and secure border, school choice, energy independence, reducing taxes and regulations, and supporting American businesses. My fellow Idahoans, if you value your freedom, May of 2022 is going to provide you with an opportunity to have your voices heard. The Idaho Republican Primary will determine the future of our state. It is critical that we elect strong conservatives throughout the entire state at every level of government. We must elect people who will always stand up for your rights and liberties. Let's make Idaho a sanctuary state for freedom! I'm running for Idaho Governor to restore the principles of **individual liberty** , **state sovereignty** , and **traditional conservative values**. These are foundational principles of the American republic, which we must stand up for and defend. I strongly believe in these principles and I know you believe in them too. **Will you put _America First_ by **[**DONATING**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7b4c15849f&e=823fa8e224)**today?** Will you help us defeat the establishment cronies and democrats who pushing for MORE lockdowns, mandates, and government intrusion into your life? We greatly need YOUR help to reach our fundraising goals this month. Please make a donation of [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6437e6561e&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1fe3a3771e&e=823fa8e224), [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cc6776c57e&e=823fa8e224), or even [**$500**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=40e2bc4c0f&e=823fa8e224) TODAY to help elect proven conservative leaders who will work tirelessly to restore our freedoms and liberties.
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ec3e440471&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| Together, we will **Make Idaho Free Again**!
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=42980efc56&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8bf5f0dd57&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8c025cc16f&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3e6a07a748&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5d73451207&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2794e28dde&e=823fa8e224)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: On day one
body:
I will lift all mandates. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d386d83789&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

This is getting out of control.

First, Kathy Hochul mandates masks for 2-to-4 year olds in day care (something even Cuomo wouldn’t do). Then she fires over 39,000 health care workers for failing to comply with her mandate (Cuomo didn’t do that either).

Now she has brought back the indoor mask mandate and has introduced a vaccine passport. And she’s weaponizing Health Departments to crack down on any business that “gets caught” with someone who isn’t wearing a mask and be fined $1,000 per violation.

This is madness!

This will only continue to destroy small businesses across the state. From a constitutional standpoint, this is a complete overreach from our Governor.

It is time to return to normalcy just like the overwhelming majority of other states and countries who have done so successfully and without these unscientific and, quite frankly, irrational mandates.
_**That is why on day one as Governor, I will lift all mandates!**_
---

[ CHIP IN TO SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=7eaac6918d&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Kathy Hochul has us going backward, nearly two years into this, mandating things that didn’t work the first time and issuing fines. _We need to be moving forward_!

We have vaccines and effective therapeutics in the tool kit, we do not need more mask and vaccine mandates, vaccine passports and threatened lockdowns and school closures.

[**If you agree, please chip in any amount RIGHT NOW! >>**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=78bf7f29f6&e=3ca66fc65a)

Republican Candidate
Governor of New York
---

[ CHIP IN NOW ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=e0cc1564d1&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=cf9062ce37&e=3ca66fc65a)._

Friend,
While our once great Nation deals with record-high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and the highest inflation rates we have ever seen; out-of-touch Liberal Liz Cheney is more concerned about reading text messages for television cameras in the January 6th committee.

Instead of helping Americans, she thinks it is more important to go through President Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows personal text messages and putting on a politically motivated clown show for her friends over at CNN.
Not only is this a complete and utter waste of taxpayer money but it also worries us. Whose personal phone records will Liz dive into next?!

Do you want to live in a country where you have no privacy? Do you think it’s okay for the government to waste your money like this?
It’s time we stand up to our power-drunk politicians and send them a message!

clean_body: | | | | They are reading texts. | Friend, While our once great Nation deals with record-high gas prices, empty grocery shelves, and the highest inflation rates we have ever seen; out-of-touch Liberal Liz Cheney is more concerned about reading text messages for television cameras in the January 6th committee. Instead of helping Americans, she thinks it is more important to go through President Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows personal text messages and putting on a politically motivated clown show for her friends over at CNN. Not only is this a complete and utter waste of taxpayer money but it also worries us. Whose personal phone records will Liz dive into next?! Do you want to live in a country where you have no privacy? Do you think it’s okay for the government to waste your money like this? It’s time we stand up to our power-drunk politicians and send them a message! It’s time we send a FIGHTER to Washington like Harriet Hageman! She will bring integrity and honesty back to D.C. Let’s take a stand. Today. Thanks, Team Hageman | | | |

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Survey: Which party do you prefer to control Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
We’re curious to know where you stand. If the election were held today, how strongly would you support sending a Republican majority to Washington? WOW. Can you believe that? | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2e812f88f1b340b7b2b4eb2dd82738c9&_e=csQ4NLEgoS1Jj6M5LtG3pVnQiL4AQbaE1FeiLM_10XifysprXTTumQ1hJa00zH0rFr9WictfETpkIZ9meF5cCmILOG_e2mEzps6pYpU7o-eKJ3uS3Ebc7UM80UQ2YiIK7Qxan86LU3ZvhMvH87V7p9sdoSHfH5ndyyvZZUyMTRfhRvahbPwWeM4sa6btm3ckiMa8zhc7e6GuZVBDT1vvY9ReM5HlLCM8tNdg89Y81PJCDtciEuq3XrM4HyS-UjS7JRdxXUrb_VMZe6lzkKbxnbBY2IbigId_7mbpxazHCas0-jRnr53banOB8vjy0K0sIf-PICERvVFmBZfmsNeSfc_mCNHJBRhIXLx8q2t9x5H9rffTI6xC_7tj20tBz9giVNtFykyNYrknC9B1zufIXjxsTvOJ9UMT8XWVmIJqypi1mtLLuttysT9E1Jg9nlTrV3nH5_OZflumFKeBl7WtINWZO2KR2zaSu6tKVpu1w3z0iJJm4qIGs91lffKycDSDoTJopdnAC4ZfbW3D0VkaB-D6ZrphCi-3FbJgefnIUv4AYs3_jEpY8C2JtvIAqYPyjSlUEdwhFwSeVCCtrRCPfOXDZCS4mdt3Y7vHECBJEJk%3D)
---
Peter,

According to a new poll by CNBC, Republicans hold a _“historic”_ 10-point advantage over Democrats in polls when asked which Party they want to control Congress after next year’s midterm elections.

According to CNBC _“In the past 20 years, CNBC and NBC surveys have never registered a double-digit Republican advantage on congressional preference, with the largest lead ever being 4 points for the GOP.”_

**WOW. Can you believe that? Republicans are currently polling more than six points better than our current preference record.**

**BUT BUT BUT. Just because we’re polling well right now doesn’t give us license to pull back and assume that we’re going to win it all next November.** If anything, this should motivate us to work as hard as we can to ensure that, once the dust settles, we can point to these polls being accurate.

**[We’re curious to know where you stand. If the election were held today, how strongly would you support sending a Republican majority to Washington?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2e812f88f1b340b7b2b4eb2dd82738c9&_e=csQ4NLEgoS1Jj6M5LtG3pVnQiL4AQbaE1FeiLM_10XifysprXTTumQ1hJa00zH0rFr9WictfETpkIZ9meF5cCmILOG_e2mEzps6pYpU7o-eKJ3uS3Ebc7UM80UQ2YiIK7Qxan86LU3ZvhMvH87V7p9sdoSHfH5ndyyvZZUyMTRfhRvahbPwWeM4sa6btm3ckiMa8zhc7e6GuZVBDT1vvY9ReM5HlLCM8tNdg89Y81PJCDtciEuq3XrM4HyS-UjS7JRdxXUrb_VMZe6lzkKbxnbBY2IbigId_7mbpxazHCas0-jRnr53banOB8vjy0K0sIf-PICERvVFmBZfmsNeSfc_mCNHJBRhIXLx8q2t9x5H9rffTI6xC_7tj20tBz9giVNtFykyNYrknC9B1zufIXuuC6r8CNPbvKFstkWwN093JTEoWKNQV8s0Kh0KqX2zornru7W_SqQqib8pp0s8GyWybvayreGwVKBbVAgJqLJnpq-3zH7cecOTi2xkhrBUWvx8MLwL3m15aennZN1ujaSXGo6DSOCykN6uxsIImPF1oIfHfEP4DzzZAFp0JMTsgFTs0GVhU1LRSAc5kerPxnsUeVluXaZzeQjvdaKXSIzo%3D)**

subject: Jeff Warner For Congress Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
More Great News! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-December Vol. 1, #3**
---
| | | 16December21

Dear Friends,

Thank You for interest in the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign! This campaign can't happen without you and we covet your prayers and support. Please know that we're praying for you as well.

**MORE BREAKING NEWS!**
As expected, the State legislators passed one of the most gerrymandered maps in the country. Governor Hogan vetoed the map and the Democrat super majority overrode his veto. Governor Hogan has vowed to take this to court. Jeff has agreed to be a plaintiff in a separate court challenge as well. Without the court's intervention, only Democrats will be represented from Maryland in Congress.

**$25,000 In 25 days!**
Thanks So Much for your sacrificial support.
Campaigns work on quarters-every three months. The campaign’s first reporting period will end December 31st. We’re praying to send a strong message to our opponents that we’re running a serious campaign. To do so, we need to raise $25,000 by December 31. We're pleased to report that an additional $5000 was donated this week. We're $20,000 away from our goal.

We're asking everyone who shares our concern for our country to give something. There is no such thing as a small gift.
If we had $5, $10, $20 per month from everyone who is troubled by the direction of our country and wants to restore it, the campaign would be in GREAT financial shape.

By law, the maximum a person can give is $5800 ($11,600 per couple).
We're praying for people who can help jumpstart the campaign with this level of support.

If you are donating $500 or more, please consider giving by check in order to avoid the 4% credit card processing fee and help maximize the impact of your donation.
## **[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=96c9387700&e=12a37459a2)**

**Meet & Greets**
The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference to help District 4.** [Email Us For More Info](mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets)**

**It's Time To Get Involved**
Jeff is standing with you and for you and Jeff needs you to stand with him as well. He needs your help.

**Social Media**
With whom can you share Jeff's website? Who can you invite? If freedom matters to you, now is the time to act. We need others who can share, like, post, re-post, etc.

We're looking for someone with social media savvy and experience. Who do you know who could help? Please have them contact us or let us know so we can contact them.

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff

---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=6cfb5a5cc8&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|

P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=a989015485) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=a989015485).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Daniel?=
subject: Fight for OH 15 and fight for our democracy.
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8974b8197422/fight-for-oh-15-and-fight-for-our-democracy?e=72277f99e1)

** I'm running!
------------------------------------------------------------

In 2020 I entered my first run for public office at the age of 28. At the time I was the youngest openly gay candidate to seek federal office in Ohio and with being the first to do something there will always be naysayers. I pushed through on the most progressive platform for this district guided by the principles and philosophy of Franklin Roosevelt.

Yet the world has changed since 2020 and we are still in the grips of a pandemic. We have seen the heart of democracy under attack by an insurrection on our Capitol. The Peoples' House! Since then members have resigned and special elections took place and of course, former President Trump handpicked someone to fill the void.

And just like before, the voices of this district are being ignored by the Republican representatives. The world has changed and things we once took for granted have been threatened.

I wasn't born with a silver spoon or experienced a life of privilege. I was raised off of Social Security by my grandparents. I have experienced the hardships that come with homeless while working two jobs to try to stay afloat. And I know what it's like to face the headaches and nightmares of putting food on the table and praying not to get sick so you won't lose a paycheck.

I will always have your back and fight for you always.

I fully support a living wage, Medicare for all, LGBTQ equal rights, a federal jobs guarantee, fight climate change, affordable college and so much more.

I will fight every day in Washington for working-class families and to bring back union jobs to this district.

I'm Daniel Kilgore and I'm running for The United States Congress, and to make this run possible I'm asking for your support today.
Please Donate Here (https://kilgoreforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91c51b170be3ba7039664f6e3&id=de51eaa437&e=72277f99e1)

_**United we stand.**_ That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens.

Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling.

That’s what the Democrats deserve this Christmas, and that’s exactly what I intend to deliver, you want to help? | Fellow American- Democrats deserve coal for Christmas, and I’m going to give it to them. Let me be clear, this is not a joke. I’m very serious about sending coal to the very Democrats who openly discuss barring us from our loved ones during the most important holiday in our nation. They want to take away jobs if you refuse to get the vaccine, to destroy businesses if they don’t enforce vaccine mandates, and they want to continue dictating every aspect of our lives. They want us to be afraid and to fight each other. No more. These Democrats have done nothing good for our nation except waste our tax dollars, censor our speech, and threaten American’s for not obeying their mandates. Democrats don’t understand anything except action, and that’s why with your help, I’m going to give them coal from the American people so they can see what we really think of them. United we stand. That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens. Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling. America is done with these radical liberals who hate the police, hate your desire for freedom, and treat our traditional values like a joke. If you’re sick and tired of it, then show them we’re not going away. Actions speak louder than words, and Coal is going to get that message across. body:

---
Peter,

I know it's late, but we met with Blake today, and we are all worried about our fundraising numbers for this quarter.

While we still have some time before the end of the year, this season is so busy with events that we realistically only have a few days left to fundraise before our December 31st deadline.

Can you help us meet that goal by chipping in today?
[**www.blakemasters.com/decemberdeadline**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e933ed275cac4b638c2714b4706fd524&_e=2nshCzAKZve1JOaX18d7oHGykhUj-4AzP0W0edcWSVNSIXmdujtGhTL5ltq_QtrDYG1FMho_y3f6GCcDMh5t3xnCB7zq_oBEL-C2GLGKMBhj1deV3X1erOwML3KfQxsqsOKYfjtmcYQv5lugGpkgoamGlVfJQl96tMH6iem31K0gmlpeEVdFR46PX1AdjRVb4CU08xnkXW4beSfwZWkh6aBbLpY1IfdgQRHf0CcnbIfCGuBs6RKVw76vbD_Dg_h3dtcjRM9ytcNw8M8xLJB1l92ehrWHFlDimaeyzy6ERMviARIGd4wPz5myQJr3xChUVTpvkM649cRpPYDgSdXECKx4JUXTmgte23v1HFPjBp5zqi9eI72eKKi8GOU0gHPcr2JhfiLHaOCqSxOStrxVnnVNQFFblCOfygtoXzoKAhy0roMzYbU1NgwzvyVNoOP3o7LYdNznHAJN8vsuJPLjuw%3D%3D)

Thanks to the unlimited financial support from dark money allies and national Democrats, Blake's liberal opponent, Mark Kelly, continues to outraise our campaign by millions. We need to send a message to the Dems that Arizona is not for sale.

The best way to do that is to put up outstanding, jaw-dropping numbers on our end-of-year finance report. Right now, our campaign is building steam and getting ready to hit the ground running in 2022, and your support allows us to continue building that momentum to help Blake win.

We couldn't do this without you, Peter!

Sincerely,

**Amalia Halikias**
Campaign Manager
Blake Masters for U.S. Senate

[** ****SUPPORT BLAKE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e933ed275cac4b638c2714b4706fd524&_e=2nshCzAKZve1JOaX18d7oHGykhUj-4AzP0W0edcWSVNSIXmdujtGhTL5ltq_QtrDYG1FMho_y3f6GCcDMh5t3xnCB7zq_oBEL-C2GLGKMBhj1deV3X1erOwML3KfQxsqsOKYfjtmcYQv5lugGpkgoamGlVfJQl96tMH6iem31K0gmlpeEVdFR46PX1AdjRVb4CU08xnkXW4beSfwZWkh6aBbLpY1IfdgQRHf0CcnbIfCGuBs6RKVw76vbD_Dg_h3gfBojAE4UK3MQLMdHbvxx4gZMDCcjedvvlWFIk5ytTJ5tvKHeAoIY7iQ0Gbh5r675XkyqyNcZKMvmEggQx_TXNqFlV2KNWH9CAb8d-q0lq8KuKCcs3QtNupjb_9AG6z2JrVkpQtvwQzt0fMh8QgQXdN9AcxffMdXMKRWPHR5z9uUyx0TEaS2-GPvfrEeRc6lACZlBiKIQZZUpipzlI7wcg%3D%3D)

**December 10th, Christmas Coffee**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39760294/321299109/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211217_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTUxMjM4NC0yODVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIWi7l7j1uVFpYw3aQXxBlb-_JGMgi5VLqL51ajh_ck=)

Be on the lookout for more events in 2022! We'll see you there.

\-- Team Roe

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Please renew your support today
body:
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3gh5fi8h0qaa5ai323vgl4a4606eolrjmi7759o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom0o5mm5ijcc9gepo66s3icsqb4sj4chon6dlkm5h39p1i6mq36sj5m3jr2otnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbad9geao6ctj0mmomfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpieepj0s3hm4oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7sv60qemv0c03n1md1s978k96ufptq8s65786k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stj61o73c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms—including critical race theory—in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism—without which self-government is impossible—is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began—and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government.** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation—no matter the cost. That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5.5 million online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The**** project has three key objectives:
1. _**Expand**_ the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. _**Increase**_ the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. _**Launch**_**** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College**conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** —as it does all of its work—while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we only have days remaining in 2021 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/calendar-year-end-2021](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthil68ddpls3u28cct3pb0a8ctlk948ab20am6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stj61o73c9h2bs)** As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively—including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before our December 31 deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5.5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making a tax-deductible, year-end gift before December 31. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please renew your support today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2za2jpq84mb38h42mjcfnvs1bms22m4n7t6sj4ur0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcpvefefue5ro85366a5vhpiv7rbfq7g7sq1r3a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stj61o73c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Please renew your support today
body:
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8218%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Vnc6lH1MfC%2f14ojpjJSgzA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10963%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NwY4MQdoE84CxGgvNKr0jg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms--including critical race theory--in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism--without which self-government is impossible--is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began --and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. ** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost. That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5.5 million online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The** ** project has three key objectives:
1. _**Expand**_ the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. _**Increase**_ the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. _**Launch**_** ** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College** conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**--as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we only have days remaining in 2021 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/calendar-year-end-2021](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10964%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TIMsK%2b4HbBz%2fxzyoKM7LEw&sysid=1)** As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively--including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before our December 31 deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5.5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions **in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making a tax-deductible, year-end gift before December 31. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please renew your support today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8218%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Vnc6lH1MfC%2f14ojpjJSgzA&sysid=1)_

Good morning, Peter!

Last week my team sent out an end-of-year survey. It's a helpful way for me to know how best to stand up for Oregonians across the state.

I started going through the responses and noticed that **you hadn't responded yet.**

I know it's a busy time of year, but I'm hoping you can share your input. It only takes a few minutes. I know - I tested it out myself! [START YOUR SURVEY NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39761874/321301152/1110679258?ms=em21_211217_eoysurv2&refcode=em21_211217_eoysurv2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGIxZDRlNS0zMDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP-euUilLQryuhSYyILv4pSkuSY0KGT2erxGFOT-wtY=&emci=acbdbba4-205c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b8b1d4e5-305f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15353729) Thank you!

Tina

P.S. The original email is below, just in case you missed it.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team Tina**
Date: Thurs. Dec, 9
Subject: I really want to hear from you

Friend, Tina's working hard for all of Oregon and is excited to be working for you.

But the only way she can do that is to know what matters to YOU.

So we're rolling out the **2021 End-of-Year Survey**. This is important for everyone on our team, but especially Tina. She'll use all of these responses to figure out what matters most to Oregonians.
[START YOUR SURVEY NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39761875/321301153/1110679258?ms=em21_211217_eoysurv2&refcode=em21_211217_eoysurv2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGIxZDRlNS0zMDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP-euUilLQryuhSYyILv4pSkuSY0KGT2erxGFOT-wtY=&emci=acbdbba4-205c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b8b1d4e5-305f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15353729)
**This survey isn't long, it will only take 3 minutes of your time**. But it will make a real difference for our campaign.
**What is your biggest priority Tina should focus on?** clean_body: | Good morning, Peter! Last week my team sent out an end-of-year survey. It's a helpful way for me to know how best to stand up for Oregonians across the state. I started going through the responses and noticed that you hadn't responded yet. I know it's a busy time of year, but I'm hoping you can share your input. It only takes a few minutes. I know - I tested it out myself! Thank you! Tina P.S. The original email is below, just in case you missed it. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Tina Date: Thurs. Dec, 9 Subject: I really want to hear from you Friend, Tina's working hard for all of Oregon and is excited to be working for you. But the only way she can do that is to know what matters to YOU. So we're rolling out the 2021 End-of-Year Survey. This is important for everyone on our team, but especially Tina. She'll use all of these responses to figure out what matters most to Oregonians. This survey isn't long, it will only take 3 minutes of your time. But it will make a real difference for our campaign. What is your biggest priority Tina should focus on? We're so excited to see your responses. Thank you! Team Tina Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .

name: American Defense News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg5u7llcvr7umv4s6tc73ocl2jj1adk4tno5qbtg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stgm4ob4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjjcdjm9o35chg74p1geqpr7dr4mgqnaclhc5jbccjgs1q38cb3epg6ao9hckrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l6krr4cj66lib6p37m2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbg1b30iq0kt4e1b18dmipqr8ugtmpa7mr1mqmvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stgm4ob4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zljf0d3jm5f5sm27l7e30suf1lmh6a1s4nn5so20_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stgm4ob4c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgf8vrbvhbtrqrark3ji2reiicp4476n9gsf1c9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stgm4ob4c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Firearm Man
subject: Facebook admits critical issue with your account.
body:
Because you could be surprised by what's publicly available about you...
---
| If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can _[unsubscribe](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/117/56327/beb9f15bae0c05e80f0f64bf0dd2da8aab4689c2/171edfefa24daf49c316ec59f92f9e379261fa75)_ here at any time. [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/117/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/171edfefa24daf49c316ec59f92f9e379261fa75) **December 17th, 2021** [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/117/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/171edfefa24daf49c316ec59f92f9e379261fa75) | Facebook admits there’s a critical issue with your account.

And it took an act of Congress to get Facebook’s CEO to admit the truth...

The issue?

**Every single bit of your private data is owned by Facebook.**

And what they do with it is _extremely shady._

But what no one knows... and this is the big issue...Facebook tracks you everywhere you go on the Internet.

Then **they build a profile about you** and share it with 3rd parties.

So if you want to take back your privacy and protect your info it’s up to YOU.

And one of the best ways to protect your info is by using [this new website](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/117/56327/49349692852aa6be79bcfa6564ace9d5cc30e9f9/171edfefa24daf49c316ec59f92f9e379261fa75). It exposes personal records of millions of Americans - all with a simple computer search.

Since we take our subscribers' privacy very, very seriously we felt compelled to share this with you today...

Because you could be surprised by **what's publicly available about you.**

Look up your own name to see what others could potentially find out about you. Or you can search anyone you know.

_The process is simple:_

**Step 1)** Enter Name and State.
**Step 2)** See Results.

This might be the most important **web search you ever do**.

**NOTICE:** This site contains REAL police records, background reports, photos, court documents, address information, phone numbers, and much more. Please BE CAREFUL when conducting a search and ensure all the information you enter is accurate.

**[SEARCH YOUR NAME HERE](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/117/56327/49349692852aa6be79bcfa6564ace9d5cc30e9f9/171edfefa24daf49c316ec59f92f9e379261fa75).**

**Thank You.**
---

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Wisconsin winters are BAD ENOUGH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Peter,Wisconsin winters are hard enough. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Massachusetts Democrats are at it again ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign against their progressive liberal policies!
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
Have you seen the recent statements from my Democrat opponent, State Senator Sonia Chang-Diaz?
This past week, Chang-Diaz not only [defended a staffer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZJrY4orHq2NERkV2127CRbFn_rH-4zVC_XcUAdsabytc4mltys1XKl7p0ezY7ByDUtJCAEMyWKJOmBaUV1oKCqwKkeS2rfLUVvwetMpuFaqvvLGkqJS7AAE1s7sS-KPXQdhVzinR5AhbSuaMNNRiLzcnqWo7sl-UWUUg4T6KAUHtTg0ZPh3AsmH8Uwy7LKMU7nnBQPSLYaLma3CARGNOwf48_lOgHpxS_QdL6iPcVYWLE-EGKpON91YaN7hoEkPNLKTnHc3nNbpMRjk7A8SWe4lavtLoPiY&c=TtEYKLzxSK8DQyuG9I7SMJtTRBSYn68VnjETxEBcZow4Picduzs_2A==&ch=g3UoFhlJc15S70DysiaG_-PiPkpltNt52M2nFtmXwLahX2nKELI__A==) for wearing a hat with an anti-police slogan, but also doubled down on her own anti-police agenda:
"I'm the one running for Governor and my record is crystal clear: we need real police reform and accountability to restore community trust, we need to end qualified immunity, and we need to redirect funding from over-policing and unused prisons into communities that have been ravaged by the War on Drugs and mass incarceration." \- State Senator Sonia Chang-Diaz
Well, I've got news for my Democrat opponent: I am the one running for Governor who supports our first responders, especially the men and women who work in law enforcement. As your next Governor, I will always have the back of our police. I won't defund them, I'll defend them and their mission.
It doesn't stop there. Later in the week, Chang-Diaz was at it again, this time calling for a "[Green New Deal for Massachusetts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZJrY4orHq2NERkV2127CRbFn_rH-4zVC_XcUAdsabytc4mltys1XKl7p0ezY7ByXTJ5Ee7QSetmqf9gBPAOtXT2ynjr24Wml7ccHr_tN_C289q9m6ayj_FmnbmsGmyMpudwqXz5VEE7aspBdlGKX1ivNmf8jDBlIYk73dMytPY9n69pagP8c2O6jDZRPby25NvBo0MVyNKHy-foYIG0n3A6U3AFFffMECWD-HMvkSlRoXObn3_OVoHHhT37VifkEx-3gmkXPHY=&c=TtEYKLzxSK8DQyuG9I7SMJtTRBSYn68VnjETxEBcZow4Picduzs_2A==&ch=g3UoFhlJc15S70DysiaG_-PiPkpltNt52M2nFtmXwLahX2nKELI__A==)."
Whose side are the Democrats really on?
I'm running for Governor because I'm on your side. I'm advocating for policies to help people live a better life here in Massachusetts.
In short, I'm fighting for what's right for our state. But, I can't do it alone. I need your help.
Will you please help me as I work to get the message out and stand up against the progressive agenda of liberal Massachusetts Democrats? If you are able to, please consider making a donation today:
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZJrY4orHq2NERkV2127CRbFn_rH-4zVC_XcUAdsabytc4mltys1XD7GTwIlWq2v9RrFVa4YJlaAHcXwUVp0eUGivoPkIQ2MPF3G9mltnjEEcAYug938Wx1WVT7tTqBT3Z3_Tke2M7_D3LSO06NnR8LRhA1uMve_uAocHuTlQSUbs7k3oywjcw==&c=TtEYKLzxSK8DQyuG9I7SMJtTRBSYn68VnjETxEBcZow4Picduzs_2A==&ch=g3UoFhlJc15S70DysiaG_-PiPkpltNt52M2nFtmXwLahX2nKELI__A==)
---
Thanks, as always, for your support!
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

Reproductive rights are under attack, and our Democratic Senate majority is our last line of defense: = | | = | First, Marco Rubio voted to defund Planned Parenthood. Reproductive rights are under assault around the country and at the Supreme Court , so our last hope is Congress – but if extremists like Marco Rubio are in the Senate majority, that's not going to happen. Val Demings has been a strong advocate for reproductive rights for decades – and she is our best opportunity to flip Florida blue. and he could take Texas [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckdtill-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, Beto O'Rourke has promised to confiscate our guns, tax our churches, and turn Texas into the same over-priced, unsafe, dirty hellscape that Democrats create everywhere they get power.The scariest part . . . . _. . . is that he could win._ [CHIP IN $5 TO STOP BETO](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckdtill-yuddtktydi-y/) Polls show that Texas is on the verge of turning blue. Millions of people have moved to Texas over the last few years, particularly our increasingly Democrat-controlled cities.In 2018, Ted Cruz beat Beto by just 215,000 votes.Since then, more than 650,000 new people have moved to Texas, mostly from blue states.**[I fear for Texas, and we must act now, together, to stop him!](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckdtill-yuddtktydi-j/)** I don't see the leadership, urgency, or conviction needed for the fight ahead. That's why I am running for governor as a true Conservative Republican.Together, we can defeat Beto and keep Texas free.**[Chip in $5 today as a symbol of your commitment to protect our rights, our values, and our communities from radicals like Beto O 'Rourke.](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckdtill-yuddtktydi-t/)**Texas is too important to let it slip into the hands of socialists like Beto.For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ckdtill-yuddtktydi-i/) Don Huffines for Governor

Partisan gerrymandering, like what Greg Abbott and Republicans have done here in Texas, is not just unfair -- it actively harms our country by making our politics more extreme, bringing us farther apart, not closer together.

I’m running for Congress to bring decency back to our politics and deliver real, meaningful change for the people of South Texas. But until we pass the Freedom to Vote Act, partisan gerrymandering will stand in the way.

**[Will you add your name to my petition now? Together, we must demand an end to gerrymandering.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39769924/321326619/-629528362?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIwZTI2MS00ODVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zwy86z8q-SCAfBQEuQh0APqTrCzx-OXfUZlrf9Fi_6g=&emci=a02c3215-e059-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7320e261-485f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25686212)**

subject: Fox News: Georgia Lt. Gov. candidate Burt Jones, Trump's pick, campaigns on election integrity

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 17, 2021
Fox News: Georgia Lt. Gov. candidate Burt Jones, Trump's pick, campaigns on election integrity
JACKSON - In case you missed it, Fox News interview Burt Jones this week and [highlighted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012P5Nzpl2EXSZfyXqC_wxC6jdDBfLF3134akt4abHnxyhSmDfkc67vyrBZzWrrkfTGwrFUpVBKaooQopo4yxO04NiOkOTLoEFo8qhXd4SktfdoTn4u2dLpWolhCQbtt-e18FFCGuVi_jy0VqZIzsN5jRKWBv3wDKrgArT91NgajGn4x6UQh780vxnNAN9n1Fqr4QVY9xZfuQ=&c=spzCUiBhaK6SjkGx5Co-PsEDCY_FUhrtII7I9R3Vve9-1gwGaFZgVw==&ch=1q5ZQxfd8ogsIqr6ioaMXmDixb1GEj9W4jz20DQsb5ewdCrPzwS-Yg==) his campaign for Lieutenant Governor, his endorsement from President Trump, and his record of leadership on election integrity. The article also discusses Burt's vision for Georgia, including his plans to improve public safety, empower parents and teachers in our education system, and to provide relief to families by cutting the state income tax. Read the full text of the article below or click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012P5Nzpl2EXSZfyXqC_wxC6jdDBfLF3134akt4abHnxyhSmDfkc67vyrBZzWrrkfTGwrFUpVBKaooQopo4yxO04NiOkOTLoEFo8qhXd4SktfdoTn4u2dLpWolhCQbtt-e18FFCGuVi_jy0VqZIzsN5jRKWBv3wDKrgArT91NgajGn4x6UQh780vxnNAN9n1Fqr4QVY9xZfuQ=&c=spzCUiBhaK6SjkGx5Co-PsEDCY_FUhrtII7I9R3Vve9-1gwGaFZgVw==&ch=1q5ZQxfd8ogsIqr6ioaMXmDixb1GEj9W4jz20DQsb5ewdCrPzwS-Yg==) to read on Fox News:
---
|
---
| [Georgia Lt. Gov. candidate Burt Jones, Trump's pick, campaigns on election integrity](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012P5Nzpl2EXSZfyXqC_wxC6jdDBfLF3134akt4abHnxyhSmDfkc67vyrBZzWrrkfTGwrFUpVBKaooQopo4yxO04NiOkOTLoEFo8qhXd4SktfdoTn4u2dLpWolhCQbtt-e18FFCGuVi_jy0VqZIzsN5jRKWBv3wDKrgArT91NgajGn4x6UQh780vxnNAN9n1Fqr4QVY9xZfuQ=&c=spzCUiBhaK6SjkGx5Co-PsEDCY_FUhrtII7I9R3Vve9-1gwGaFZgVw==&ch=1q5ZQxfd8ogsIqr6ioaMXmDixb1GEj9W4jz20DQsb5ewdCrPzwS-Yg==)
Georgia state Sen. Burt Jones, the first elected official in that state to endorse Donald Trump for president in 2015, is running for lieutenant governor on a platform of election integrity, economic growth, education reform, and support for the police. Jones, who received Trump's endorsement in September, laid out his plan in an interview with Fox News.
"My four priorities as Georgia's next lieutenant governor will be to strengthen election integrity, reignite our economy, improve our education system and stand with our law enforcement to strengthen public safety," Jones said.
Jones castigated his fellow elected officials for delaying an investigation into irregularities in the 2020 election.
"We had a litany of problems, but nobody was willing to investigate them," Jones told Fox News. "The majority of the legislators and officeholders around the state didn't want to investigate anything."
He claimed that drop boxes were a "huge factor" in 2020 election concerns. He said, "there was a chain-of-custody issue where drop boxes would go missing for days at a time." He mentioned "allegations of ballot stuffing" in those boxes and leniency on signature verification.
Jones only tepidly supported S.B. 202, the election reform bill that President Biden demonized as "Jim Crow on steroids."
The Republican suggested that voter turnout suffered during the U.S. Senate runoff elections on Jan. 5, 2021, because "it seemed like there was no one trying to address or look into" these concerns.
Jones and three other state Senate Republicans signed a petition calling on the Georgia General Assembly to award Georgia's 16 electors to Trump, who lost the state to Biden by 0.23% of the vote, according to the official results. In Jan. 2021, Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan stripped Jones of his chairmanship and membership of the state Senate Insurance and Labor Committee.
Duncan decided not to run for reelection.
Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger contested Jones' election-related claims in a statement to Fox News.
"Together with the Georgia Bureau of Investigation, investigators in my office have looked into hundreds of allegations of voter fraud since the November 2020 election but have found nothing that puts the overall integrity of Georgia's elections in doubt or anything even close to putting the election results in question," Raffensperger said. "Thankfully, many conservatives recognize that we had a free and fair election but came up short, and that the people of Georgia are better off if we look forward rather than relitigating the past."
Jones told Fox News he would push for the legislature to "get rid of machines and return to paper ballots," if elected lieutenant governor.
On the economy, he said he would cut the state income tax, reduce regulations on small businesses, and lower fees and costs. On education, Jones vowed to "prioritize vocational and technical education in K-12, lower the cost of higher education, and ban critical race theory and infuse more civics-based curriculum."
He also vowed to champion public safety, increasing funding and enhancing retirement benefits for law enforcement and strengthening penalties for sex traffickers, gang members, and repeat offenders.
Jones expressed confidence in his standing in the race, particularly due to Trump's endorsement.
"I'm honored to have President Trump's complete and total endorsement for lieutenant governor because I'm the only person in my race who has fought for the President from day one--and I'll continue to do that as we deliver results for every Georgia family," he said.
Jones, a sixth-generation Georgian, attended the University of Georgia and served as football team captain for the 2002 season, helping to steer the team to its first SEC championship in 20 years. He previously considered a run for lieutenant governor in 2018, but decided against it for family and business reasons.
Jones faces state Sen. Butch Miller, the Senate president pro-tempore, who announced his campaign in May.
In Georgia, voters elect the governor and the lieutenant governor separately. While the lieutenant governor would replace the governor should the post become vacant, the lieutenant governor's primary job is to serve as president of Georgia's state Senate. Jones has served in the state Senate for nearly nine years.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 17, 2021 Fox News: Georgia Lt. Gov. candidate Burt Jones, Trump's pick, campaigns on election integrity JACKSON - In case you missed it, Fox News interview Burt Jones this week and == his campaign for Lieutenant Governor, his endorsement from President Trump, and his record of leadership on election integrity. The article also discusses Burt's vision for Georgia, including his plans to improve public safety, empower parents and teachers in our education system, and to provide relief to families by cutting the state income tax. Read the full text of the article below or click == to read on Fox News: | | == Georgia state Sen. Burt Jones, the first elected official in that state to endorse Donald Trump for president in 2015, is running for lieutenant governor on a platform of election integrity, economic growth, education reform, and support for the police. Jones, who received Trump's endorsement in September, laid out his plan in an interview with Fox News. "My four priorities as Georgia's next lieutenant governor will be to strengthen election integrity, reignite our economy, improve our education system and stand with our law enforcement to strengthen public safety," Jones said. Jones castigated his fellow elected officials for delaying an investigation into irregularities in the 2020 election. "We had a litany of problems, but nobody was willing to investigate them," Jones told Fox News. "The majority of the legislators and officeholders around the state didn't want to investigate anything." He claimed that drop boxes were a "huge factor" in 2020 election concerns. He said, "there was a chain-of-custody issue where drop boxes would go missing for days at a time." He mentioned "allegations of ballot stuffing" in those boxes and leniency on signature verification. Jones only tepidly supported S.B. 202, the election reform bill that President Biden demonized as "Jim Crow on steroids." The Republican suggested that voter turnout suffered during the U.S. Senate runoff elections on Jan. 5, 2021, because "it seemed like there was no one trying to address or look into" these concerns. Jones and three other state Senate Republicans signed a petition calling on the Georgia General Assembly to award Georgia's 16 electors to Trump, who lost the state to Biden by 0.23% of the vote, according to the official results. In Jan. 2021, Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan stripped Jones of his chairmanship and membership of the state Senate Insurance and Labor Committee. Duncan decided not to run for reelection. Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger contested Jones' election-related claims in a statement to Fox News. "Together with the Georgia Bureau of Investigation, investigators in my office have looked into hundreds of allegations of voter fraud since the November 2020 election but have found nothing that puts the overall integrity of Georgia's elections in doubt or anything even close to putting the election results in question," Raffensperger said. "Thankfully, many conservatives recognize that we had a free and fair election but came up short, and that the people of Georgia are better off if we look forward rather than relitigating the past." Jones told Fox News he would push for the legislature to "get rid of machines and return to paper ballots," if elected lieutenant governor. On the economy, he said he would cut the state income tax, reduce regulations on small businesses, and lower fees and costs. On education, Jones vowed to "prioritize vocational and technical education in K-12, lower the cost of higher education, and ban critical race theory and infuse more civics-based curriculum." He also vowed to champion public safety, increasing funding and enhancing retirement benefits for law enforcement and strengthening penalties for sex traffickers, gang members, and repeat offenders. Jones expressed confidence in his standing in the race, particularly due to Trump's endorsement. "I'm honored to have President Trump's complete and total endorsement for lieutenant governor because I'm the only person in my race who has fought for the President from day one--and I'll continue to do that as we deliver results for every Georgia family," he said. Jones, a sixth-generation Georgian, attended the University of Georgia and served as football team captain for the 2002 season, helping to steer the team to its first SEC championship in 20 years. He previously considered a run for lieutenant governor in 2018, but decided against it for family and business reasons. Jones faces state Sen. Butch Miller, the Senate president pro-tempore, who announced his campaign in May. In Georgia, voters elect the governor and the lieutenant governor separately. While the lieutenant governor would replace the governor should the post become vacant, the lieutenant governor's primary job is to serve as president of Georgia's state Senate. Jones has served in the state Senate for nearly nine years. | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@burtjonesforga.com | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | == | == == == | | | == | PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA | | Burt Jones for Georgia | P.O. Box 767, Jackson, GA 30233 | | Sent by mailto:press@burtjonesforga.com powered by

Team, In case you missed the news on Wednesday, **former Governor Parris Glendening officially endorsed Wes for Governor of Maryland!** Gov. Glendening served two years as governor from 1995 to 2003, and is the only county executive in Maryland history to serve three terms as Prince George’s County Executive from 1983-1994, so he knows good leadership when he sees it! He is notably the first former Governor to endorse a candidate in this crowded Democratic primary, and the highest profile official in Maryland to endorse in the Democratic field this cycle — _and he chose Wes._ This is a huge testament to Wes’ leadership and the campaign he’s building with Aruna as his running mate: great leaders recognizing and supporting other great leaders. Gov. Glendening is the latest in a string of elected officials and Maryland Democratic Party leaders to endorse our ticket, which has seen remarkable statewide momentum! **[Help us keep up the momentum into the new year and get Wes on the ballot next November: pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to fuel our campaign into 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39771828/321334854/1512802716?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211217glendening2_tw_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1ZjU4Ny00YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjOUebk2Mo-mscDM1DFSmh6kLwkgwOq70UvZyJLQS_I=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, In case you missed the news on Wednesday, former Governor Parris Glendening officially endorsed Wes for Governor of Maryland! Gov. Glendening served two years as governor from 1995 to 2003, and is the only county executive in Maryland history to serve three terms as Prince George’s County Executive from 1983-1994, so he knows good leadership when he sees it! He is notably the first former Governor to endorse a candidate in this crowded Democratic primary, and the highest profile official in Maryland to endorse in the Democratic field this cycle — and he chose Wes. This is a huge testament to Wes’ leadership and the campaign he’s building with Aruna as his running mate: great leaders recognizing and supporting other great leaders. Gov. Glendening is the latest in a string of elected officials and Maryland Democratic Party leaders to endorse our ticket, which has seen remarkable statewide momentum! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER. Friends,

I’m in this race because I’m tired of seeing the everyday people and working families of South Dallas left behind. I’m in this fight to make sure your voice is heard.

Our democracy thrives when it’s represented by local communities and their values. By elevating your stories, we are able to make meaningful change in Washington.

That's why I’m checking in with you today to find out what matters most to you. name: Roger Stone
subject: Statement of Roger Stone regarding the January 6th Committee
body:
| |
---
**ROGER STONE**
Ft. Lauderdale, Florida
---
| Dear Friend, **This morning at 10 am I must, by law and in response to a subpoena, appear before Nancy Pelosi 's phony January 6th Committee.** Considering that I was not present on the Ellipse, did not march to the Capitol and was not at the Capitol and know nothing whatsoever about the illegal events that day it is obvious that this is just another transparent attempt by Trump hating lunatic Adam Schiff to frame me in some transparent process crime by twisting my words and leaking a distorted version of whatever I might say under oath. Been there. Done that. _I will invoke my 5th Amendment right not to answer their loaded questions_**\- not because I have done anything wrong- but because I recognize the whole thing as an elaborate trap.** Less than a week ago a "comedian" on Saturday Night Live joked that my 74 year old wife, who is successfully battling stage 4 cancer, should be gang raped by the Committee members because I refuse to co-operate with their latest witch-hunt. Not a single member of the committee has denounced this vile attack on my wife who is a mother and grandmother! Because of the many death threats against me and my family generated by the constant smears in the media the professional security protection I need to travel to Washington, attend the Committee session and return home **will cost over $10,000**. The lawyers I need to advise me to avoid this latest attempt to set me up and destroy me **will cost another $25,000**. The Democrats know their last attempt to destroy me left my wife and I broke battered and exhausted. Now they are at it again- all because I resisted their pressure to testify falsely against President Trump in the Mueller witch-hunt! I have the will to continue to fight these demons but I just don't have the means. Won't you please send a contribution to my [legal defense fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pppopwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=880aba17e1dc450bb7ecb4e753797c8a) today? I will never stop fighting these criminals. **They want to destroy me for the same reason they want to destroy President Trump; they are afraid we will be be back to beat them again in 2024.** Only this time they know President Trump will clean house and send these criminals and traitors to prison. Only by the grace of God and my redemption in the blood of Jesus Christ am I alive today to continue this vital fight to save this nation. Won't you help my wife and I now in our time of need? God Bless You, Roger Stone PS - If you are uncomfortable using your credit card information on the Internet you can make a check payable to the "Stone Defense Fund" and mail it to 1007 N. Federal Highway, #405 Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304. [www.stonedefensefund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pppopwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=bef3a021db65499a8256ac3e60a7cc3a)

|

On the Road

Last week I stopped by Lamar County, Hortense, Brunswick, and Sepalo Island. It was so much fun hitting the gun range with fellow patriots at the American Patriot Range and Gun Club! Thank you, for hosting a great event. In Brunswick, I witnessed some incredible Toys for Tots volunteers who are doing some amazing work! Georgia is full of so many hardworking, selfless Patriots!

Stay up to date with my schedule on my website or my social media.

|

---

When I announced that I was running for Governor in April, I published my Contract with Georgia. If elected Governor of Georgia, I am committed to these promises, so we can Take Georgia Back!

I'm fighting to Take Georgia Back! I am the only candidate that can beat Stacey Abrams. I need your help to win. Please donate now!

name: Team Nikki
subject: How ironic
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
You can't make this up, Peter.

On Wednesday, while announcing a bill that will do nothing but fan the flames of racism and hatred in our state, Ron DeSantis quoted Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

That’s pretty ironic, considering that, if DeSantis had his way, our students wouldn’t even learn Dr. King’s name.

It’s time for a change, Peter. Help elect a Governor who will work to amplify diverse voices and promote racial justice. Click here to rush a $10 donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=1216]

— Team Nikki

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Senator Rand Paul blocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
Iron Dome funding https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2]Dear friends,
When I worked as Senior Advisor to the Secretary of Defense in the Obama-Biden Administration, I was the lead official on the Iron Dome rocket defense system.
This system has been extremely successful, saving countless lives by disabling rockets mid-flight. It’s considered a leap forward in defensive technology to keep the world safe, so much so that the U.S. is now implementing it to protect us and our troops.
So why is Republican Senator Rand Paul blocking funding for the Iron Dome?
We need to send Senator Paul a message that blocking this defensive system is not okay. Will you sign our petition today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2]When I found the Iron Dome file rejected by the Bush Administration, I brought it to the attention of the Secretary of Defense and President Obama as an important opportunity to save civilian lives. At that time, it was promising, but we did not know it would become one of the successful defensive systems used on the planet. We need to continue funding this system to keep Americans and our allies safe.
When I become a Member of Congress, I will stand up to protect civilians and will not block essential programs for the sake of political posturing. Senator Paul has put lives at risk, and we need to tell him to stop this political game.
Please click here to sign our petition. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n0cxtGwL_k2QbQ3D25zMuw2]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

we're gearing up to expand our field organizing effort, and we’re hiring qualified staff to lead these efforts. In order to do that, we need to raise $30,000 to meet payroll for new field staff. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39774323/321345527/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGM4YmIzYy00ZTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1FBhOSc736ojdko4HsoiRzEh9AU_DBOQIjTVYKLKh0=)
Friend,

After visiting over 50,000 doors in our community last cycle, we know what it takes to reach voters where they're at.

This campaign is about building support at the grassroots level -- door to door, neighborhood to neighborhood, and city to city. That's how we broke turnout records in 2020, and that's how we are going to finish the job in TX-37.

Many are burnt out from the 2020 election, and tuned out, but for Texas – 2022 is everything. Voter suppression, reproductive health care, and defeating gerrymandering is all at stake! We must reach out to voters where they are, and going to their door is the way to do it.

That's why we're gearing up to expand our field organizing effort, and we’re hiring qualified staff to lead these efforts. In order to do that, we need to raise $30,000 to meet payroll for new field staff.

This campaign is about building support at the grassroots level -- door to door, neighborhood to neighborhood, and city to city. That's how we broke turnout records in 2020, and that's how we are going to finish the job in TX-37. Many are burnt out from the 2020 election, and tuned out, but for Texas – 2022 is everything. Voter suppression, reproductive health care, and defeating gerrymandering is all at stake! We must reach out to voters where they are, and going to their door is the way to do it. That's why we're gearing up to expand our field organizing effort, and we’re hiring qualified staff to lead these efforts. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Senators Vow to Defund Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn't whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate's announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun's letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden's vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden's un-American policy - or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can't wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[ Please help us elect more courageous conservatives! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59041690:JpP8HLEN2:m:1:3298722022:95B2A73BDEE1B453365264597CEB5615:r) **

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

** [ We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59041690:JpP8HLEN2:m:1:3298722022:95B2A73BDEE1B453365264597CEB5615:r) **

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[ Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59041690:JpP8HLEN2:m:1:3298722022:95B2A73BDEE1B453365264597CEB5615:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
|
---
| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59041690:JpP8HLEN2:m:1:3298722022:95B2A73BDEE1B453365264597CEB5615:r "DONATE")
---
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate! Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE. None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. They are SENATORS, not just pundits. And they acted like it! On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning. SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight. The defunding vote is coming soon. Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.
