name: Peter Franchot
subject: We can’t pass the buck on climate change
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
With many of our communities situated on or near the Chesapeake Bay, Maryland is especially vulnerable to rising sea levels caused by climate change. If we want to avert total climate catastrophe, then we need to take urgent steps to lower our reliance on fossil fuels.
As your next Governor, I’ll take bold action to combat climate change by making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation and a net supplier of renewable energy. I’ll convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric by the end of my first term, and I’ll prioritize investment in carbon-capture technology to address our historic emissions. I’ll also combat coastal erosion and launch a statewide effort to preserve Maryland’s tree canopy.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=20.22]Our climate future is on the ballot in 2022. W e cannot risk getting outspent by a Republican opponent who refuses to take climate change seriously, which is why I am asking for your help today. Will you chip in to help us meet our fundraising goal for December? We’re looking to raise an additional $3,000 by 11:59 PM tonight, and a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021]Our people-powered movement relies on grassroots supporters like you to bring about the change that Maryland needs and deserves. Climate change is not some far-off specter. It’s here now, and we will continue to witness its devastating effects in the form of more extreme weather events, more intense flooding, unseasonably warm weather, and disruptions to our ecosystem. We simply don’t have the luxury to pass the buck on climate change like so many of our political leaders have before -- we must take urgent action to avert total climate catastrophe.
I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of this movement. With your help, we’re going to achieve net zero carbon emissions before any other state in the nation, and make Maryland the national leader in renewable energy.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatechange_dec2021?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f9aeda37-f15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/c3fd1471-525f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2ZkMTQ3MS01MjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xyJoXBaEw9Tz64XYixcQZyCfanfiT4U4u4AWQYrftQ=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!

name: Brit Bender
subject: re: we're behind
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,

The New Year is almost here, and we're behind. Governor Lee is the weakest he's ever been, but we need to bring in more support if we fully want to seize this opportunity and defeat him in 2022.

December is our last chance to build up the resources we need to start 2022 off strong. 2022 is not going to be a normal year — we are still waiting for the new district maps to drop, and Republicans are more extreme than ever before.

There is so much on the line — will you chip in $25 today to help get us back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Brit Bender

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Pennsylvania will NOT be sold off to the highest bidder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey folks — We hate sharing bad news, but this is urgent.
A brand-new super PAC just launched for Dr. Oz, which means he’ll have his own immense wealth and a flood of money from ultra-wealthy Republican donors on his side.
Their endgame is pretty clear: Dr. Oz and the GOP think they can buy this seat.
We need your help to send a message that Pennsylvania will NOT be sold off to the highest bidder.
[Can you make a $3 donation to Malcolm Kenyatta’s people-powered campaign for U.S. Senate? If we all stand together, we can make sure Pennsylvania’s next senator is a real working person, not a reality TV doctor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39777541/321361193/-360183459?refcode2=f8052fa9-565f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211217-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODA1MmZhOS01NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4NbzFsfOohE5p6BhbPFmoro5VVbwaMbGKVsUDjAq5Y=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39777542/321361194/-360183459?refcode2=f8052fa9-565f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211217-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODA1MmZhOS01NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4NbzFsfOohE5p6BhbPFmoro5VVbwaMbGKVsUDjAq5Y=)**
If we’re going to expand health care access, protect Roe v. Wade, and fight climate change, we need more working people in the Senate — period.
No one will fight harder for working families than Malcolm because he’s the only candidate who knows in his bones that our government does not work for working people.
But this is a grassroots movement, and it’s going to take all hands on deck for us to fight back against Dr. Oz and this new super PAC, so we’re asking for your support.

clean_body: Hey folks — We hate sharing bad news, but this is urgent. A brand-new super PAC just launched for Dr. Oz, which means he’ll have his own immense wealth and a flood of money from ultra-wealthy Republican donors on his side. Their endgame is pretty clear: Dr. Oz and the GOP think they can buy this seat. We need your help to send a message that Pennsylvania will NOT be sold off to the highest bidder. = = If we’re going to expand health care access, protect Roe v. Wade, and fight climate change, we need more working people in the Senate — period. No one will fight harder for working families than Malcolm because he’s the only candidate who knows in his bones that our government does not work for working people. But this is a grassroots movement, and it’s going to take all hands on deck for us to fight back against Dr. Oz and this new super PAC, so we’re asking for your support. = = Thanks for helping us fight back, Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Bri Carpenter
subject: Reaching out about your membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| Hi there,

I’m Bri, Finance Director for Annie’s campaign. We’re starting to strategize for the year ahead, and one thing is clear: we’ll need a people-powered movement to win.

Grassroots donors like you are absolutely critical to a campaign’s success. It’s because of you that we’re able to get ads put on TV, distribute yard signs and campaign merch to our supporters, and execute our roadmap to victory.

[In order to help us stay on track to defeating Nancy Mace, can you chip in $10 today and become a founding member of the campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39777880/321363362/842103971?amount=10&refcode=AA_EM_FR_1MO_211217_1_3&refcode2=&contactdata=sWzBI7zlwIfP5xPJkQBrdKVJT6OJ1x4GifQ1%2Fl8pcNHeaqCbOd4JMsJxRktKbtV8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY2MWJiYS01ODVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KffqT58IkwU21PSqWOMsyQkIa1kWPzvmSFxpay9L7rQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39777882/321363364/842103971?amount=10&refcode=AA_EM_FR_1MO_211217_1_3&refcode2=&contactdata=sWzBI7zlwIfP5xPJkQBrdKVJT6OJ1x4GifQ1%2Fl8pcNHeaqCbOd4JMsJxRktKbtV8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY2MWJiYS01ODVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KffqT58IkwU21PSqWOMsyQkIa1kWPzvmSFxpay9L7rQ=)
I know that oftentimes it may feel like giving a small amount doesn’t make a big difference, but in fact, **small-dollar donors make up the majority of a campaign’s total amount raised.**

Whether you can give a $10 or $100, I can promise you that it will help our efforts in electing a true leader for South Carolina’s First Congressional District.

We can’t risk waiting until the last moment to get the ball rolling. Our team is busy prepping now to win next year, because just like anything else – the more time you invest in it, the better the outcome will be.

[Join us by contributing $10 now and become a founding member of our campaign to defeat Nancy Mace.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39777884/321363366/842103971?amount=10&refcode=AA_EM_FR_1MO_211217_1_3&refcode2=&contactdata=sWzBI7zlwIfP5xPJkQBrdKVJT6OJ1x4GifQ1%2Fl8pcNHeaqCbOd4JMsJxRktKbtV8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY2MWJiYS01ODVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KffqT58IkwU21PSqWOMsyQkIa1kWPzvmSFxpay9L7rQ=)

Thank you,
Bri

Brianna Carpenter, Finance Director
Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress

body:
Join us tonight for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bbdlut-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bbdlut-iduiyhurdd-y/)

[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bbdlut-iduiyhurdd-j/)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk7kmturuhof4ro8blieccmch3u6itnq671iuhn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stim1o74cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkdjk5jvj9jonudlvomi3sodsb39k66bldrrddqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stim1o74cjh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zind5theec9qk07r5j75mrr2qj52shjgcfh22rb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stim1o74cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: RE: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Team – last night I went on the air with Rachel Maddow, and I need to share this important message. Right now, our democracy is under attack – extreme politicians are seeking to systematically undermine our election system in a dangerous attempt to stay in power. Without free and fair elections, the United States of America as we know it would not exist. **That is why I am calling on my colleagues to change the Senate rules to allow a majority vote to pass laws that will protect American democracy.** With so much at stake, we cannot afford to lose the Senate. Our democracy is at risk – if Mitch McConnell succeeds in flipping the Senate, far-right Republicans could strip away the right to vote, undermine our elections, and dismantle the fundamental framework of our country. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose our fragile Senate majority. I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the GOP has deep pockets and nearly endless resources. Republican megadonors and dark money super PACs have already spent $7 million attacking me: more than they've spent against any other Democratic incumbent. **[That's why we set an emergency goal of $10,000. With all eyes on New Hampshire, we cannot afford to fall short in this critical moment. name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Reproductive care is hanging by a thread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Last week, the Supreme Court once again failed to block Texas' extreme six-week abortion ban. That means patients across Texas are still without access to the reproductive care they need. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39778706/321367773/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmY3ZDFjZC01YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rt0ULx5OdAtjEU3cJVv6tA0HLV7dO664mYajGonc5-Q=&emci=8afd10ab-e45d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cff7d1cd-5a5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)
---
Important update regarding the fight for reproductive rights, Peter.

**The Supreme Court's refusal to take action means we can expect to see even more attacks on reproductive care.** Abortion access across the country continues to hang by a thread with 19 states introducing 106 abortion restrictions this year alone -- the highest recorded since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided in 1973.

To make matters worse, the Supreme Court heard a challenge to a Mississippi anti-abortion law earlier this month that could decide the fate of _Roe_. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, our reproductive rights are in clear danger.

This is not the time to get complacent and hope the courts will protect abortion access. We need _Roe_ codified into law and ensure that every person has access to the reproductive care they need.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. That's why yesterday, she was endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. And Kim was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House to protect Roe, but she wants to know you're with her in this important fight.

**[If you agree we need to codify _Roe v. Wade_ , add your name right away to stand with Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39778715/321367780/-1583876044?ms=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=LyRA3hVI91JtKE2KNlwCAHRR28zm9VETuo0X%2F8WK6LCFNNxMbRYFk4yVBAFRZ8pszE1UDLjfdXiboFxwzkLrdvZFMlnYukNj13UNevJTCVEm5zuEgva9JshJYaHFM2pyk%2FfV5CA14VgEcQP8XelUuqGtTlOoNhTsfGd99mIS8ss%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmY3ZDFjZC01YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rt0ULx5OdAtjEU3cJVv6tA0HLV7dO664mYajGonc5-Q=&emci=8afd10ab-e45d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cff7d1cd-5a5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39778733/321367793/-1583876044?ms=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211217_reprod_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=LyRA3hVI91JtKE2KNlwCAHRR28zm9VETuo0X%2F8WK6LCFNNxMbRYFk4yVBAFRZ8pszE1UDLjfdXiboFxwzkLrdvZFMlnYukNj13UNevJTCVEm5zuEgva9JshJYaHFM2pyk%2FfV5CA14VgEcQP8XelUuqGtTlOoNhTsfGd99mIS8ss%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmY3ZDFjZC01YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rt0ULx5OdAtjEU3cJVv6tA0HLV7dO664mYajGonc5-Q=&emci=8afd10ab-e45d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cff7d1cd-5a5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)

With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, our reproductive rights are in clear danger. This is not the time to get complacent and hope the courts will protect abortion access. We need Roe codified into law and ensure that every person has access to the reproductive care they need. As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. That's why yesterday, she was endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. And Kim was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act in the House to protect Roe, but she wants to know you're with her in this important fight. | Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Before AOC gets her way AGAIN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "Headline") Peter, What can the Democrats do - they see how mad the American people are over their ridiculous mismanagement of our nation--the vaccine mandates, the massive inflation, the horrible jobs reports. Heck, people can't get Christmas gifts for their kids _if they can even afford them._ The Democrats KNOW they will lose badly at the ballot box, so they go back to an old familiar foe: **_President Trump and they will destroy anyone who refuses to help them._** **_They have scared everyone on Capitol Hill into submission - everyone except me and a few other patriots._ [If you also refuse to cower before Nancy Pelosi, I need you on my team.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "If you also refuse to cower before Nancy Pelosi, I need you on my
team.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "Headline")The truth is that President Trump stood up to the Socialist Democrats who want to transform the very fabric of this great nation, _and they will never forgive him for it.**Now, when his staff refuses to help them destroy a great American, they threaten to throw them in jail.**_ This is just **_an excuse to impeach President Trump AGAIN - they don't even care that he isn't in office -_** **THEN they will march around this nation in 2022 and hope voters forget that Joe Biden is a horrible President.** I'm Marjorie Taylor Greene and I'm fighting back against the tyranny and attempts to force socialism upon our nation. We need to SHOW Nancy and her cronies that the conservative movement has seen through their plan and intends to stop them. **They are traitors. We're _the patriots._** **[We cannot allow this to happen- you need to help me fight back and stop Nancy Pelosi's next witch-hunt.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "We cannot allow this to happen – you
need to help me fight back and stop Nancy Pelosi's next witch-hunt.")** It is clear these radical socialists will stop at nothing to keep their hold on our lives and will stop anyone who stands in their way - **_someone like me --someone like YOU._** When you stand with me, Nancy will KNOW that there is another real conservative to contend within the House - not another Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, or Nancy Mace RINO, who is scared of being unpopular on Twitter and the liberal media. I've been unpopular with the DC folks all year and I wear that as a badge of honor because I work for my constituents and the American people. **[Please help me end the latest Pelosi hoax before she gets away with the third unconstitutional impeachment of President Trump.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "Please help me end the latest Pelosi hoax before she gets away
with the third unconstitutional impeachment of President Trump.")** Don't sit this one out. Pelosi has already proven there is no lie or amount of money that will keep her from attacking President Trump and the entire Republican Party if it allows her to stay in power and promote AOC's vision for deconstructing our great nation. For America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59029358:69yXiLENQ:m:1:3103520637:DB1D507F2E0EA52D9EAE15C76F182CF0:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

clean_body: "Headline" Peter, What can the Democrats do - they see how mad the American people are over their ridiculous mismanagement of our nation--the vaccine mandates, the massive inflation, the horrible jobs reports. Heck, people can't get Christmas gifts for their kids if they can even afford them. The Democrats KNOW they will lose badly at the ballot box, so they go back to an old familiar foe: President Trump and they will destroy anyone who refuses to help them. They have scared everyone on Capitol Hill into submission - everyone except me and a few other patriots. "If you also refuse to cower before Nancy Pelosi, I need you on my team." "Headline"The truth is that President Trump stood up to the Socialist Democrats who want to transform the very fabric of this great nation, and they will never forgive him for it.Now, when his staff refuses to help them destroy a great American, they threaten to throw them in jail. This is just an excuse to impeach President Trump AGAIN - they don't even care that he isn't in office - THEN they will march around this nation in 2022 and hope voters forget that Joe Biden is a horrible President. I'm Marjorie Taylor Greene and I'm fighting back against the tyranny and attempts to force socialism upon our nation. We need to SHOW Nancy and her cronies that the conservative movement has seen through their plan and intends to stop them. They are traitors. We're the patriots. "We cannot allow this to happen – you need to help me fight back and stop Nancy Pelosi's next witch-hunt." It is clear these radical socialists will stop at nothing to keep their hold on our lives and will stop anyone who stands in their way - someone like me --someone like YOU. When you stand with me, Nancy will KNOW that there is another real conservative to contend within the House - not another Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, or Nancy Mace RINO, who is scared of being unpopular on Twitter and the liberal media. I've been unpopular with the DC folks all year and I wear that as a badge of honor because I work for my constituents and the American people. "Please help me end the latest Pelosi hoax before she gets away with the third unconstitutional impeachment of President Trump." Don't sit this one out. Pelosi has already proven there is no lie or amount of money that will keep her from attacking President Trump and the entire Republican Party if it allows her to stay in power and promote AOC's vision for deconstructing our great nation. For America, "Marjorie Taylor Greene" Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service free of charge. | | Team,

After last month’s close governor’s race here in New Jersey and our loss in Virginia – the GOP is convinced that their path back to power in the House runs through our two states. They have no idea how hard we’re going to fight, or how fired up our grassroots supporters are, to prove them wrong. With your help, that’s exactly what we are going to do.

In 2018, Representatives Andy Kim, Abigail Spanberger and I flipped our three seats from red to blue. None of us were career politicians – we’d spent our careers serving our country in the Defense Department, the CIA, and the State Department. But defending democracy at home has been the most important mission of our lives.

[Now the GOP attacks have begun, with millions of dollars already spent in our districts to replace us with Trump and Kevin-McCarthy acolytes. Will you step up and help Andy, Abigail, and me by making a split donation to our campaigns? In the last year, we’ve taken the country from insurrection to infrastructure -- passing once in a lifetime legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill to help rebuild our country and speed the path to clean energy. Meanwhile, the GOP is focused on doing everything they can to take back power in Washington.

Andy, Abigail and I have dedicated years to public service and to promoting American values around the world. We believe that America must stay true in our own democracy to the ideals that our soldiers and diplomats defend abroad.

[So, we need your targeted support in races like ours. Please, make a split donation to our campaigns today and help us continue to work for you in Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779457/321370541/1194858328?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211217_1_1&refcode2=659cda82-5b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTljZGE4Mi01YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7CX3PHA1epe2I5YAuwtzf1HrUf9vZHXvXHCugz_h6I=)

Tom

Don’t delete! | Friend, Matt is asking if you saw his scathing message about GOP extremism and the dire need to take action? We fell _just_ short of our goal last night, and we want to make sure you know the stakes of this election There’s simply too much on the line to quit fighting, and Matt could really use your help. **[Chip in $25 (or whatever you can) to help us defend Oregon from these right-wing kooks before it’s too late>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779730/321371678/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFmNjUzNC01YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxD5jFCnJiUGiwqsB0Fg6VgSDDuj9PON7K7QgoN5eto=)** _**[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779732/321371679/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFmNjUzNC01YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxD5jFCnJiUGiwqsB0Fg6VgSDDuj9PON7K7QgoN5eto=)**_ Thanks for your support, Team West

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Matt West
**Date:** December 14, 2021
**Subject:** I can’t stop thinking about this:
> I’ve got a lot on my mind, friend:
> 1. **GOP leaders are peddling dangerous anti-vaccine conspiracies while the Delta variant ravages hospitals and the Omicron variant spreads across the country.**
>
>
> 2. **Republican state legislators in 49 states proposed over 400 extreme voter suppression laws to disenfranchise Black and brown voters and secure their coordinated power grab in 2022.**
>
>
> 3. **Far-right loyalists are encouraging Donald Trump to run for president again, even after inciting a violent insurrection and working to discredit the 2020 election results.**
>
But here’s what really scares the hell out of me: **If the midterm elections were held tomorrow, experts predict Republicans would take back the House without breaking a sweat.** I can't emphasize this enough: if Republicans beat us in 2022, we can kiss our country as we know it goodbye — our democracy, progress on climate change, reproductive rights, healthcare, and more will be all for nothing unless we do SOMETHING. That's why there’s no plan B for Democrats like myself. **_[We must win BIG next year to keep the GOP out of power. I am counting on 500 grassroots fighters to chip in $13.23 (our average contribution!) before 11:59 pm on Friday to take us closer to our crucial end-of-year fundraising goal>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779733/321371680/2035722763?amount=13.23&refcode=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.301f6534-5c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDFmNjUzNC01YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxD5jFCnJiUGiwqsB0Fg6VgSDDuj9PON7K7QgoN5eto=)_** Friend, our new Congressional District is one of a handful of real opportunities to win a new seat. And I believe I am just the scientist to do it. Congress has no place for Donald Trump’s far-right extremist movement. 2022 is not about Democrats vs. Republicans. It’s about democracy defenders vs. unhinged extremists. It’s about pro-science followers vs dangerous propagandists. And we’re running out of time to prepare for the most crucial election of our lifetime. We need leaders who will never back down from this fight. So I’ll ask once more, **_[If you’re ready to keep Republicans out of power next year, will you chip in $13.23 or more to help me finish 2021 with a name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Chilling new details from the Jan. 6 investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Vxk0LNhzg7nDWw4ZFwaLqJn94%2Bk9KhLE&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, the House just voted to hold former Trump chief of staff Mark Meadows in contempt of Congress for refusing to cooperate with the bipartisan fact-finding inquiry.
This is big news, and it comes not long after Steve Bannon - longtime Trump ally and purported architect of the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol - was also held in contempt of Congress, and then promptly indicted by a federal grand jury.
Text messages from the day of the attack show that Meadows received numerous messages from Fox News personalities - including Laura Ingraham and Sean Hannity - as the riot unfolded, pleading with Meadows to make the president tell his violent supporters to stand down.
**While it 's yet unclear what Meadows did during the attack itself, what we know is that a day before the riot, he was well aware of the coup to keep Trump in power - even receiving a plan to overthrow the election in a PowerPoint presentation.**
The details outlined in the presentation included recommending that then-President Trump declare a "national security emergency" over foreign interference in our electronic voting systems in order to invalidate all votes cast electronically - and then activate national units to oversee a "recount" of paper ballots only.
The fact that the president's top adviser was in possession of such a plan illustrates the extent to which the plot to undermine the 2020 election reached _the highest levels_ of the Trump administration.
**The chilling PowerPoint presentation also suggests what we feared all along: The corrupt former president was being advised by some to take authoritarian measures in order to cling to power.**
Yet in spite of all that's been revealed, the vast majority of Republicans are still standing by, defending, and emboldening Donald Trump. They're counting on Americans like _you_ to speak up. To let it slide. To be too busy to care. They're trying to sweep all of this under the rug and bank on people looking the other way. **I know Americans like you refuse to let that happen, which is why I must once again ask for your help to hold Donald Trump and his co-conspirators accountable.**
**In light of these documents that show the Trump administration considered a coup, please speak out:[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, members of his administration, and members of Congress who aided the Jan. 6 insurrection? Click if you agree - I need grassroots Democrats like you to speak out by the thousands.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1080-su-nd) **
This isn't the last sliver of truth to come out. Not in the slightest. The more we learn, the more we must push to hold Donald Trump accountable for his attacks on America. Thank you for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zr8b3tetMXsOkTfnaE04obGYbD9tEcd8&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: Shontel Brown for Congress
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Thank you for being a part of our team.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779949/321372868/47178721?refcode=EM_FR_211217holidays_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRiOTJlYS01YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gul7OZyYSgq0mNMXOG7G8Ea8Iu3MPd2lAfxr7II1G3E=) Peter,

Before we take a short break, we wanted to wish you happy holidays, from our team to you.

It's safe to say 2021 has been a unique year for us all. We've come a long way recovering from this pandemic and reimagining an economy that works for us all. Our work isn't done yet, but as we continue to make progress, it's always good to take a step back and reflect on all we're thankful for.

**Thanks for standing with us, and happy holidays to you and your loved ones.**

Thankfully,

Shontel Brown for Congress

[**_P.S.: We're still working towards our end-of-year goal of raising $10,000 more by December 31. Will you join us by making a donation today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39779950/321372869/646843223?refcode=EM_FR_211217holidays_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRiOTJlYS01YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gul7OZyYSgq0mNMXOG7G8Ea8Iu3MPd2lAfxr7II1G3E=) |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

Friend, I have asked the DOJ to prosecute Dr. Anthony Fauci for lying to Congress.
Dr. Fauci is an unelected technocrat who has been in the federal government since 1968. During the pandemic he has distorted science and the facts to exercise authoritarian control over millions of Americans- and to cover-up his serious misconduct at the heart of the COVID-19 crisis.
**Dr. Fauci lied to Congress.**
**He lied about his secret “gain-of-function” research in Wuhan, China.**
First- you need to know that “gain-of-function” research is a term the government uses to describe risky lab experiments that make viruses more contagious and virulent to study them better.
Fauci has claimed the federal government and his NIH did not fund “gain-of-function” research in Wuhan, China. But new evidence shows this is a lie.
_And yeah - spending millions of taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly in China sounds like a really bad idea. That’s why Dr. Fauci doesn’t want us all to know the truth..._
**I had to act.** [**I’ve called for the DOJ to investigate and prosecute Fauci.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzUxLWQ5MzJlMmIzMThjYTQxMDc5MDNjMWQ3NjU4OTRhNzgwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL3RlZGNydXovaGVscC10ZWQtZW9tLW9jdG9iZXItd2lucmlnaHQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMjQ2ODYifQ/QsTD3gRytsMSyAzNNRp2GQ)
**Here are the facts:**
**(1)** On May 11, Dr. Fauci testified before a Senate Committee that quote: “the NIH has not ever and does not now fund gain-of-function research in the Wuhan Institute of Virology.”
**(2)** However, in October, NIH wrote they funded an experiment at the Wuhan lab to test if “spike proteins from naturally occurring bat coronaviruses circulating in China were capable of binding to the human ACE2 receptor in a mouse model.” That’s gain of function research.
**(3)** Fauci’s statement and the NIH’s October 20 letter cannot both be true. The statements are directly contradictory.
**(4)** 18 USC 1001 makes it felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison, to lie to Congress.
No amount of ad hominem insults or parroting of Democrat talking points will get Fauci out of this contradiction.

Fauci either needs to address the substance—in detail, with specific factual corroboration to explain why his seemingly false statements were truthful—or DOJ should prosecute him for making false statements to Congress.

**It’s up to us:[_I_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzUxLWQ5MzJlMmIzMThjYTQxMDc5MDNjMWQ3NjU4OTRhNzgwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL3RlZGNydXovaGVscC10ZWQtZW9tLW9jdG9iZXItd2lucmlnaHQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMjQ2ODYifQ/EDljE7fBccqBevOwwF-meg)** _**[__ need your help to keep the heat on Dr. Fauci and expose the truth](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzUxLWQ5MzJlMmIzMThjYTQxMDc5MDNjMWQ3NjU4OTRhNzgwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL3RlZGNydXovaGVscC10ZWQtZW9tLW9jdG9iZXItd2lucmlnaHQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMjQ2ODYifQ/4XA4Ho25VSwZevu5hkH6EQ).**_

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- HB1001 Proves that INGOP is Bad for Business, Bad for Workers -** **** This week, the Indiana Republican Party pressed on with their partisan goal of passing HB 1001, which forces businesses to pay for COVID-19 testing and creates unsafe environments for workers. The bill was heard in the Indiana House Employment, Labor and Pensions Committee and received over _seven hours of testimony_ , prompting Republicans to reconsider the bill’s wording before advancing it further. What’s worse: the legislation comes as COVID-19 cases have reached levels not seen since last winter - an era described then by Governor Eric Holcomb as Indiana being “on fire” with COVID-19. The Indiana Republicans’ decision to ignore Indiana’s business community and shove through their partisan agenda is bad for Hoosier businesses – and bad for Hoosier workers. Last month, the Indiana Chamber of Commerce announced “strong opposition” to the Indiana Republican Party’s partisan crusade against the COVID-19 vaccine and the state government’s clumsy attempts to get more Hoosiers vaccinated. The Republicans’ extreme partisanship against President Joe Biden’s pandemic guidelines is now jeopardizing Indiana’s business community by having companies foot the bill for COVID-19 testing. Indiana Republicans’ never-ending movement against vaccines not only harms the state’s economic recovery, but once again puts lives at risk. And, it’s all to fulfill a form of partisanship that’s become too extreme for the Hoosier State. Meanwhile, Indiana Democrats have done everything possible to help Hoosier families put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, Hoosiers have every opportunity to get a vaccine, all 92 counties have received critical relief to make up for lost revenues, and Hoosier families received support through the Child Tax Credit. Democrats delivered this brighter future for families, but unfortunately, the Indiana Republican Party’s extreme partisanship is betting against this once-in-a-generation opportunity for the Hoosier State. **\- Governor Holcomb’s READI Program: Paid for by the ARP -** **** On Tuesday, Governor Eric Holcomb announced which proposals from across Indiana will receive some of the coveted $500 million grant funding that will help address economic and community needs. These projects will transform towns and counties in all regions – and it’s solely because of the American Rescue Plan. Indiana Democrats like U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan said “YES” to Holcomb’s READI program while every Republican in Indiana’s Congressional delegation said “NO”. It’s also worth remembering: Governor Holcomb criticized the American Rescue Plan for so-called “penalizing” red states - despite Indiana not losing a dime in funding opportunities, including the $500 million for Holcomb’s own READI program. What’s worse, Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Indiana Republicans have called programs like Holcomb’s READI program “socialism” and a “boondoggle”. Indiana Democrats will remind Hoosiers all 2022 that Indiana Republicans said “NO”, called Holcomb’s READI program “socialism”, and still took the dough. Indiana Democrats delivered on the American Rescue Plan and this better opportunity for Hoosier families. The Party and its leaders plan to campaign extensively on the Rescue Plan, the state’s READI program, and The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act through the 2022 state and midterm elections. Hoosiers have a brighter future on the horizon, and it’s because Democrats - not Republicans - got this done for them. **\- Opportunities -
\- Spring Interns 2022 -** **** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. **Benefits**
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

**Duties**
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

**Qualifications**
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

**Start/End Dates and Schedule**
Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 31, 2021.
We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022.
Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility. **How to Apply**
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. **\- Party Leader Trainings -**

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- HB1001 Proves that INGOP is Bad for Business, Bad for Workers - ** This week, the Indiana Republican Party pressed on with their partisan goal of passing HB 1001, which forces businesses to pay for COVID-19 testing and creates unsafe environments for workers. The bill was heard in the Indiana House Employment, Labor and Pensions Committee and received over seven hours of testimony , prompting Republicans to reconsider the bill’s wording before advancing it further. What’s worse: the legislation comes as COVID-19 cases have reached levels not seen since last winter - an era described then by Governor Eric Holcomb as Indiana being “on fire” with COVID-19. The Indiana Republicans’ decision to ignore Indiana’s business community and shove through their partisan agenda is bad for Hoosier businesses – and bad for Hoosier workers. Last month, the Indiana Chamber of Commerce announced “strong opposition” to the Indiana Republican Party’s partisan crusade against the COVID-19 vaccine and the state government’s clumsy attempts to get more Hoosiers vaccinated. The Republicans’ extreme partisanship against President Joe Biden’s pandemic guidelines is now jeopardizing Indiana’s business community by having companies foot the bill for COVID-19 testing. Indiana Republicans’ never-ending movement against vaccines not only harms the state’s economic recovery, but once again puts lives at risk. And, it’s all to fulfill a form of partisanship that’s become too extreme for the Hoosier State. Meanwhile, Indiana Democrats have done everything possible to help Hoosier families put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, Hoosiers have every opportunity to get a vaccine, all 92 counties have received critical relief to make up for lost revenues, and Hoosier families received support through the Child Tax Credit. Democrats delivered this brighter future for families, but unfortunately, the Indiana Republican Party’s extreme partisanship is betting against this once-in-a-generation opportunity for the Hoosier State. \- Governor Holcomb’s READI Program: Paid for by the ARP - On Tuesday, Governor Eric Holcomb announced which proposals from across Indiana will receive some of the coveted $500 million grant funding that will help address economic and community needs. These projects will transform towns and counties in all regions – and it’s solely because of the American Rescue Plan. Indiana Democrats like U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan said “YES” to Holcomb’s READI program while every Republican in Indiana’s Congressional delegation said “NO”. It’s also worth remembering: Governor Holcomb criticized the American Rescue Plan for so-called “penalizing” red states - despite Indiana not losing a dime in funding opportunities, including the $500 million for Holcomb’s own READI program. What’s worse, Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Indiana Republicans have called programs like Holcomb’s READI program “socialism” and a “boondoggle”. Indiana Democrats will remind Hoosiers all 2022 that Indiana Republicans said “NO”, called Holcomb’s READI program “socialism”, and still took the dough. Indiana Democrats delivered on the American Rescue Plan and this better opportunity for Hoosier families. The Party and its leaders plan to campaign extensively on the Rescue Plan, the state’s READI program, and The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act through the 2022 state and midterm elections. Hoosiers have a brighter future on the horizon, and it’s because Democrats - not Republicans - got this done for them. \- Opportunities - \- Spring Interns 2022 - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. Retaining a Democratic majority in Congress enables us to continue enacting policy that improves the lives of Virginians. Without it, we may have never seen the historic infrastructure bill signed into law and with it the thousands of good-paying jobs it's set to create across our state.

We set ambitious fundraising goals each month, and meeting them is essential in building our campaign's momentum. Your contributions play a huge role in enabling Abigail to continue this important work, and we are so grateful for your support.

clean_body: | | Hey Peter, It's Sam Signori, Abigail's Campaign Manager. In case you didn't see Whitney's message, we're close to our mid-month fundraising deadline, | Abigail has been working hard in Congress to improve life for Central Virginians, prioritizing our needs by expanding broadband access to rural areas and helping pass the historic infrastructure package. | | | | | | | | Thank you for your commitment, Sam Signori Campaign Manager \---------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, We're a few days away from our mid-December fundraising deadline, and I'm writing to humbly ask for your support in helping us hold the House in 2022. Retaining a Democratic majority in Congress enables us to continue enacting policy that improves the lives of Virginians. Without it, we may have never seen the historic infrastructure bill signed into law and with it the thousands of good-paying jobs it's set to create across our state. We set ambitious fundraising goals each month, and meeting them is essential in building our campaign's momentum. Your contributions play a huge role in enabling Abigail to continue this important work, and we are so grateful for your support. | | | | | | | | Thank you for your ongoing support, Whitney * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. **** We have some positive breaking news, team! **Today, Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham signed off on finalizing our state's new congressional district maps, and NM-02 is more blue than before!** Previously, our congressional district leaned Republican by 14 points, according to Nate Silver’s 538. Now, this new map gives Democrats an edge of 4 points, giving us an even better chance of flipping this House seat from red to blue in 2022! _The Associated Press_ said the redistricting “has deep implications for New Mexico's three first-term congresswomen, including Republican U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell, a staunch ally of former President Donald Trump who ousted a Democratic incumbent in 2020.” This was already one of the most important and competitive House races to watch in 2022, but now that it's gone from a Trump to Biden district, Gabe is in an even stronger position to replace far-right Yvette Herrell in Congress! body:

We aren’t here to tell you that the sky is falling because we're behind on our fundraising goals, but we hope you’ll give us a minute to explain why it is so important for us to stay on track. And we won’t hide behind a gimmick or sugarcoat our request: When you’re done reading this email, [**we hope you’ll consider chipping in to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39780580/321375702/317923863?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.17_b1_tmft_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjk3MmE1NS02MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MOiHL5ebA3bPdRlja5mf0fx5R06Atq-wqo1Gn1aJWYk=)

All of us at Team Mathis are fundraising _proactively_ to prevent us from falling behind on our goals in the future. We need to make early, consistent investments in our campaign in order to build an operation that can win in 2022, so we can’t wait for fundraising to pick up before we get to work. This race couldn’t be more competitive, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. **_Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats in order to take back control of the House and restart their efforts to undermine health care, roll back protections for the environment, and give handouts to their wealthy donors._**

[**No gimmicks -- like we said, this *isn’t* an emergency. But we’re working around the clock to stay ahead of our goals before crunch time, and we could really use your support. name: Team Gearing
subject: What a week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

The past week on the campaign has been incredible! Both Ambassador Ron Kirk and Wendy Davis have endorsed our campaign and we couldn’t be more excited to have them on Team Gearing. These endorsements show that the work we have been doing to reach voters across our communities and to run the strong campaign needed to win are being noticed.

They both know how important this election is and that Charlie is a principled coalition builder who is ready to get to work building a better Texas on day one. Will you join them in supporting Charlie’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Texans deserve leaders in Austin who will fight for their rights and deliver the changes that our families need. As our next State Representative, Charlie will always focus on the issues that matter most to our families like creating good paying jobs, fixing and securing our power grid, reducing property taxes, restoring and protecting reproductive rights, and defending LGBTQ+ children from senseless bullying.

Our campaign is in full swing, can you help us keep our momentum going? Chip in $15 or more today to help us get our message out >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Together we can build a better Texas for all of our neighbors,

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

Charlie Gearing for Texas
10440 N. Central Expressway Suite 1400 Dallas, TX 75231

name: Amy McGrath, Founder & CEO of Honor Bound
subject: 🚨 YET ANOTHER ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Supporting Jessica’s continued service to this country.
body:
Through her time serving in the Navy, to her social activism, to her work in affordable housing, Jessica Mason has consistently proven her stead-fast commitment to this country and her community time and again.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39780741/321376504/-1288899752?refcode=211217_FR_honorboundendo1mcgrath_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYxMDY4Ny02MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgGuBjjHWzGymx5LNHRIJGquHGug8RhzKYleUSHyQrE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39780742/321376505/-1325626652?refcode=211217_FR_honorboundendo1mcgrath_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWYxMDY4Ny02MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgGuBjjHWzGymx5LNHRIJGquHGug8RhzKYleUSHyQrE=)
---
Team New Deal,

As a Marine, I took an oath to _“support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.”_

After my 20-year military career, I stepped into the political arena in 2017 because I believe the best way to get our country back on track is to elect more servant-leaders who will continue to honor the vow they took in service — **to always put country above all else and prioritize the needs of our country over political party and personal power.**

**[Jessica is an ideal example of these values, which is why I’m so proud to support her today with an official endorsement from my organization Honor Bound. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: 1,017 votes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I promise I wouldn’t ask if the stakes weren’t so high.
#
Peter,
**I won my last Senate race by 1,017 votes.** I am no stranger to close races -- and I know 2022 will be no different with the GOP going all out to hand the Senate majority to Mitch McConnell. That’s why I’m teaming up with Senators Patty Murray from Washington state and Catherine Cortez Masto from Nevada to end 2021 strong and make sure we are on track to keep the Senate blue.
**[Make no mistake: Mitch McConnell wants to defeat Democratic women and replace us with far-right Republicans. Will you help us fight back? subject: I’m asking you personally

body:
Peter,
I have good news: so far, so good! We’re on track to reach our December goal and end the financial quarter AND year on a high note. **But there’s one thing we have to keep in mind: in 9 days it will be Christmas and donations will dry up** as people rightfully prioritize their time with family and friends and save their money for gifts, foods, and holiday travel.
**What that means for us is that we have about 10 real days left in the month when we can realistically fundraise, including today.** I’m reaching out to you personally to make a direct appeal. This is our most important fundraising deadline of the year, the one that will have the biggest impact on our cash on hand reserves going into the new year.
**[I’m asking you personally if you will contribute to our campaign and invest in the machine we’re building to flip this district from red to blue in 2022. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39781112/321378691/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFlNTAzMy02MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3pfyCYKkrQAVFvpxe6R9BXim_F1WgscomN-FE5wkNGQ=)**

We’ve had an incredible year and I’m unbelievably proud of everything my team and I have achieved over the past 12 months. It’s hard to believe that the year has flown by so fast. But almost $350,000 later, I know that this race is not just viable, but truly winnable. **Every single penny of that money has come from individual donors like yourself, who have given to this campaign because they believe in our vision for California’s 8th and the nation itself. **
Starting in January, everything will speed up. I will be spending more time engaging voters, connecting with community leaders, and starting up our field program. That means fundraising now is even more important. **We’ll be paying more staff, expanding our field, political, and communication programs, and preparing for a competitive general election.** Every single dollar counts.
**[That’s why your donation today could not be more important. Will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39781128/321378704/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFlNTAzMy02MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3pfyCYKkrQAVFvpxe6R9BXim_F1WgscomN-FE5wkNGQ=)**
In solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

body:
Coal. Yes, Coal. That’s what the Democrats deserve this Christmas, and that’s exactly what I intend to deliver, you want to help? |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=78326f7ece3445baaf4ee4ab436ed804&_e=R46XbOdEvRY83eDfTf_5eTSgQpsAiiiDJ6a4S-3K8YSBquZUl9DIN3Hqh_4AD6pYgrxSd8bcAzI-h3Mofo4542h9hHzOn5aeti2Q7nIJ0kptBWviVjZY7JhLuux9IAPtjylM4Oi05MY4NCsrT54k9fbjSR_LrfS3uD0ZIADQUz5tHsQN7Yjwv-ElOkDBCltHw4AevH8z85p4pF_jazUya9xoOrzLq6KD-kTQyzIoQThMEP-DDin9VdDDx54ItW6YuDikZ8XtJioshLUcJ1eKzq61AvXQOXNm6i2_qFUCQt-dZrL_YIWHL994cvISEtfkhH8fEQk549aozW4IOb8gWmvXq3xCQfixhTo-__VNv9w80UQNSvYI6g5ChKEW3tq8YyF_tRjT1K1escHg5izDKsjPHcIjSBWFiygN6lRkOQQeVngnLwIAVCWj48EGjhnf)
**Fellow American- Democrats deserve coal for Christmas, and I’m going to give it to them.** _**Let me be clear, this is not a joke.**_ I’m very serious about sending coal to the very Democrats who openly discuss barring us from our loved ones during the most important holiday in our nation.

They want to take away jobs if you refuse to get the vaccine, to destroy businesses if they don’t enforce vaccine mandates, and they want to continue dictating every aspect of our lives.

They want us to be afraid and to fight each other. _**No more.**_ These Democrats have done nothing good for our nation except waste our tax dollars, censor our speech, and threaten American’s for not obeying their mandates.

**Democrats don’t understand anything except action, and that’s why with your help, I’m going to give them coal from the American people so they can see what we really think of them.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=78326f7ece3445baaf4ee4ab436ed804&_e=R46XbOdEvRY83eDfTf_5eTSgQpsAiiiDJ6a4S-3K8YSBquZUl9DIN3Hqh_4AD6pYgrxSd8bcAzI-h3Mofo4542h9hHzOn5aeti2Q7nIJ0kptBWviVjZY7JhLuux9IAPtjylM4Oi05MY4NCsrT54k9fbjSR_LrfS3uD0ZIADQUz5tHsQN7Yjwv-ElOkDBCltHw4AevH8z85p4pF_jazUya4BXLwQJaGkc5I6nilIY0pLdjBlP1AzDsigSqyxsNrQnBZhDMPE7dd2kGUWJ2ovZlP4iz07xRH9-4vmjcb1h6awpSDh5pzAskck096m6HZRiOzL-p_0NJgZqq8ulQt8V8EoUJxJw3SUO5MDjFjOCr4gkY3ao0iQyu8iVlsAjxCq4cXduZ6GT_L86Pey9TDYHXXmUzyNaI6kigQ_J-6G90b4GHa4SYOCzmFbcDC0C5IgQ)
[** ****HELP ME SEND COAL TO THE DEMOCRATS WHO WANT TO CANCEL CHRISTMAS **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=78326f7ece3445baaf4ee4ab436ed804&_e=R46XbOdEvRY83eDfTf_5eTSgQpsAiiiDJ6a4S-3K8YSBquZUl9DIN3Hqh_4AD6pYgrxSd8bcAzI-h3Mofo4542h9hHzOn5aeti2Q7nIJ0kptBWviVjZY7JhLuux9IAPtjylM4Oi05MY4NCsrT54k9fbjSR_LrfS3uD0ZIADQUz5tHsQN7Yjwv-ElOkDBCltHw4AevH8z85p4pF_jazUya3vzeKAZsETNqf95PcuKeA0VWLoyapFfcjjbwbppUoNgxQ-98K6CA-2WLQPOfXwM-DBnD51LjWlgAfBRm5DmoUFAaEZVUmyXnQnxwWoBe0LbfYBFNQ5-h3WcWZ5cR9tW1sFtoaRMfOyp0U6WFHl1CGRtg-b2Sun-t6weT7poYFY1nZZTZY5HFWHae2d6bmGJ-1cQgrd72HWrbvSF11tCp6ZwhnE_6b-dEDJLHgQZ3Gjp)
_**United we stand.**_ That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens.

Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling.

America is done with these radical liberals who hate the police, hate your desire for freedom, and treat our traditional values like a joke. If you’re sick and tired of it, then show them we’re not going away. [**Pitch in $9 and help me send coal to them for Christmas, because that’s all they deserve for what they’ve done for our country.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=78326f7ece3445baaf4ee4ab436ed804&_e=R46XbOdEvRY83eDfTf_5eTSgQpsAiiiDJ6a4S-3K8YSBquZUl9DIN3Hqh_4AD6pYgrxSd8bcAzI-h3Mofo4542h9hHzOn5aeti2Q7nIJ0kptBWviVjZY7JhLuux9IAPtjylM4Oi05MY4NCsrT54k9fbjSR_LrfS3uD0ZIADQUz5tHsQN7Yjwv-ElOkDBCltHw4AevH8z85p4pF_jazUyawRaMwRILdwOskCXXS6JqTO477SY03htMSfchoa8t3x4cE6OQ2X0WDfVFPfWFyfiTINJAVVl91N4YHnKuL8dgp3PKm-lpKnb8ivhr7AnAuUppj9yAUFrIruqOrmLGnZQIaxLWTT4JXDXeTfVE8ieFpJnfCU-ozo8k3BINBBphKq_Mizu3_2l6cnktjUOBcK-_mSpS2r-zyCSViBIitVu7_azDbZRo0SBuqvV9de_n-KW)

Actions speak louder than words, and Coal is going to get that message across.

clean_body: Coal. Yes, Coal. That’s what the Democrats deserve this Christmas, and that’s exactly what I intend to deliver, you want to help? | Fellow American- Democrats deserve coal for Christmas, and I’m going to give it to them. Let me be clear, this is not a joke. I’m very serious about sending coal to the very Democrats who openly discuss barring us from our loved ones during the most important holiday in our nation. They want to take away jobs if you refuse to get the vaccine, to destroy businesses if they don’t enforce vaccine mandates, and they want to continue dictating every aspect of our lives. They want us to be afraid and to fight each other. No more. These Democrats have done nothing good for our nation except waste our tax dollars, censor our speech, and threaten American’s for not obeying their mandates. Democrats don’t understand anything except action, and that’s why with your help, I’m going to give them coal from the American people so they can see what we really think of them. United we stand. That’s what a mountain of coal in front of their offices from the American people stands for, and I’m asking you to join me to be the voice for the American people who are sick of being treated like second class citizens. Democrats give more priority to illegal immigrants, filthy rich celebrities, and liberals who bash you for not wearing a mask one minute, then take theirs off when the cameras aren’t rolling. America is done with these radical liberals who hate the police, hate your desire for freedom, and treat our traditional values like a joke. If you’re sick and tired of it, then show them we’re not going away. Actions speak louder than words, and Coal is going to get that message across. Joe Biden’s presidency is an unmitigated disaster. Our southern border is in crisis. The Afghanistan withdrawal was a mess.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3p8gvarcp45vrioh7a3vdgjvk4ijs7fcon3fnn8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq33cthmkp7ddtj68pnaor66jiecpjkckr6dc3kmio6edllc6qb7ctmetgb2t70sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im5j72s5lm9jrcoj66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpieeor1c1h62oh5u)

Friend, Joe Biden’s presidency is an unmitigated disaster.
__
* _Our southern border is in crisis._
* _The Afghanistan withdrawal was a mess. _
* _Americans are forced to choose between a vaccine and a job._
* _And China is watching closely, delighted by every failure._

__
**I’m sure you’ll agree that this isn’t leadership. It’s chaos.****_It’s tyranny. _**

There’s only one way to stop it: we MUST take back the Republican majority in the Senate to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin.

That's why I’m working with my conservative colleagues like Rand Paul to make sure we’re successful in 2022. And that’s why I'm contacting you today.

Will you chip in now to help us TAKE BACK THE SENATE?

The only hope we have to get America back on track is to make sure we limit Biden’s power.

Right now, he has full control in Washington.

The House - the Senate - and the White House.

And we’ve seen how he abuses that power!

We have a real chance to rein in the radical agenda if we take back the Senate.

And here’s the good news: we only need to gain ONE SEAT to win back our majority.

But Friend, trust me - these liberals aren’t going to play nice. They’ll do whatever it takes to win.

We have to work together NOW to prepare for the fight.

**[Will you step up today and commit to taking back the Senate with a contribution of $25, $35, $50, or $75?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdcf5nasvtkm7kk3q1sgb5htd23tab4bpaijsjm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sthm2o32c5h2bs)**

I can’t tell you how much we’re counting on you, friend.

|

Michael traveled 1,850 miles across Colorado this summer alone, talking to Coloradans about the issues that matter most to them. Last year, he visited every single one of Colorado’s 64 counties to talk to Coloradans about what they needed to recover from the pandemic. As he travels the state, Michael hears stories from the people he serves: he learns about their concerns, their struggles, and the issues affecting them the most. From the strain of trying to make ends meet to the rising costs of child care, health care, and more, these conversations are the motivation behind his fight to expand the Child Tax Credit, a tax cut for millions of working families. This tax cut for working parents has:
* Helped one million Colorado kids and tens of millions of kids across the country — increasing economic stability for families.
* Kept three million children out of poverty nationwide, this year alone.
* 3.3 million fewer people with kids went hungry after we implemented the program; adults with children who reported not having enough to eat fell by about 1/3.

This is one of Michael’s top priorities. He’s running between meetings and negotiations, while fighting to extend the program for another year, so he doesn’t have as much time as he’d like to focus on fundraising. That’s where you come in. Grassroots supporters like you are critical to our campaign to reelect Michael so he can build on these achievements for Colorado’s families in the years to come. **If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to help Michael win this race, keep Colorado blue, and continue fighting so our economy works for everyone.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39781764/321381058/-625499226?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJkMjIxOC02NDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKJNXXZY9zPYuHFTqACHSAxga9BRR3N9JsrBGdRiMm8=)****

From the strain of trying to make ends meet to the rising costs of child care, health care, and more, these conversations are the motivation behind his fight to expand the Child Tax Credit, a tax cut for millions of working families. This tax cut for working parents has: Helped one million Colorado kids and tens of millions of kids across the country — increasing economic stability for families. Kept three million children out of poverty nationwide, this year alone. 3.3 million fewer people with kids went hungry after we implemented the program; adults with children who reported not having enough to eat fell by about 1/3. This is one of Michael’s top priorities. He’s running between meetings and negotiations, while fighting to extend the program for another year, so he doesn’t have as much time as he’d like to focus on fundraising. That’s where you come in. Grassroots supporters like you are critical to our campaign to reelect Michael so he can build on these achievements for Colorado’s families in the years to come. If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to help Michael win this race, keep Colorado blue, and continue fighting so our economy works for everyone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| | Hi there — I hope you like our new branding! The reactions and feedback we’ve gotten have been overwhelming, and we’re so glad so many of you enjoy our new look! **I wanted to reach out today because our rebrand is so much more than just a new logo and some new colors —** this rebrand is about creating a visual that _really_ aligns with the mission of the Fairness Project, _and what we have in store for 2022._ We’ve been able to secure a 23/24 winning campaign track record because when we launch a new campaign or sign on to fuel an existing one, _we go all in._ Our new look is a visual showcase of our approach. **When we run a campaign, we make sure to use every. tool. at. our. disposal.** But in order to keep winning campaigns that raise state minimums to a livable wage, stop predatory payday lenders, expand health care access, secure paid leave policies, and so much more crucial work — [_**we need your help.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39781889/321381817/1503560849?refcode=E12990-20211216-EOYIntroKicker-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDdmZmQ5OS02NDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_gKFmE50I1IhLrG20V_RfBIUGyn_r9hvTjtrbs334E=) **That’s why we used this opportunity not only to launch our new branding, but to highlight our year-end fundraising goal.
