clean_body: | | Hi there — I hope you like our new branding! The reactions and feedback we’ve gotten have been overwhelming, and we’re so glad so many of you enjoy our new look! I wanted to reach out today because our rebrand is so much more than just a new logo and some new colors — this rebrand is about creating a visual that really aligns with the mission of the Fairness Project, and what we have in store for 2022. We’ve been able to secure a 23/24 winning campaign track record because when we launch a new campaign or sign on to fuel an existing one, we go all in. Our new look is a visual showcase of our approach. When we run a campaign, we make sure to use every. tool. at. our. disposal. But in order to keep winning campaigns that raise state minimums to a livable wage, stop predatory payday lenders, expand health care access, secure paid leave policies, and so much more crucial work — = That’s why we used this opportunity not only to launch our new branding, but to highlight our year-end fundraising goal. The donations supporters like you provide make this important work possible. = That means: = = = = = Our campaigns have already helped to change the lives of over 18 million people across America — = to fuel our 2022 campaigns and change millions more? Thanks for your support, Kelly \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Fairness Project Date: Weds, Dec 15, 2021 at 3:49 PM Subject: new look, new year, same fight for change To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hey team — notice anything different? We’re SO excited to announce the launch of our new branding. What do you think? Since our founding in 2016, we’ve fought hard alongside voters to enact powerful ballot measures that put $22 billion into the hands of workers, helped 875,000 Americans receive life-saving health care, and changed the lives of 18 million people across the country. How? Because when we run a ballot measure campaign we use every tool at our disposal. That means solving problems with dynamic solutions, building movements from diverse coalitions, and supercharging these issue campaigns with energizing ideas. And team, we wanted a new look to match. = While our look might be different, our core mission of putting progressive measures on the ballot, and bringing change to millions of Americans, is exactly the same. To complement our bold new look, we’ve set an ambitious end-of-year fundraising goal to raise $8,500 before December 31. AND a generous donor has agreed to match all donations up to $5,000! subject: Some exciting news!

body:
Friend – I wanted to share some exciting news – our finance team just informed us that we’ve received more individual donations this year than the current Congressman!
But here’s the truth – we can’t take a victory lap now. We need your support to finish the year strong!
With our FEC end-of-year deadline quickly approaching, if you haven’t had a chance to support Wade yet, can you make a donation today?
Become a Supporter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=121721whemB]We've been busy traveling around the District speaking to voters, and we need your help to keep that momentum going!
Thank you in advance,
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782232/321383441/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4ZDcyZS02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEB6jRTz6Wu6xm3fCFUK1eJWzc05C5VUiN8W4WJ7HTc=)
Hi, friend. Norberto here -- If we haven't met yet, I'm Marisa's Political Director reaching out with an urgent message.

We're more than halfway through the month of December, and unfortunately we came up just short of our mid-month fundraising goal. That's a bit concerning because in the New Year, the amount we raised goes public for all to see. We don't have much time to make up ground, so I'll cut to the chase.

**[Can you chip in a contribution -- of any amount -- to help us pick up the pace?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782233/321383442/-686739743?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4ZDcyZS02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEB6jRTz6Wu6xm3fCFUK1eJWzc05C5VUiN8W4WJ7HTc=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782234/321383443/-686739743?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4ZDcyZS02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEB6jRTz6Wu6xm3fCFUK1eJWzc05C5VUiN8W4WJ7HTc=) | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782235/321383444/-686739743?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA4ZDcyZS02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEB6jRTz6Wu6xm3fCFUK1eJWzc05C5VUiN8W4WJ7HTc=)**
---

Marisa's been laser-focused on holding Kevin McCarthy accountable and reaching more Democrats and undecided voters. With redistricting nearly complete, we're working to engage the new voters we suspect will be included in the new district lines. We have a real shot at reaching them before McCarthy does.

**It goes without saying that we can't afford to come up short on this important goal, so we're asking one last time:**

subject: Don't Forget to Stop by my Christmas Meet and Greet Tonight!

body:
Friend,

| | It is early in the season, but I am proud to announce that **I have already been endorsed by the Progressive Turnout Project – here is what they had to say:** _Representative Larsen has a history of championing pro-democracy legislation and a shared commitment to a reality that everyone has the right to vote in a country where voting is made simple and accessible to all._ And you know what? I am proud that you, share that commitment to protecting the right to vote and making access to the ballot available to all Americans. **The Progressive Turnout Project has agreed to match every donation, up to a maximum of $5000, made by the grassroots members of Team Larsen.** [**Will you chip in right now and help me maximize the impact of this donation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782453/321384192/1596212816?refcode=2021-12-17-ptp&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=70c0a6b5-675f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMwYTZiNS02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVQ-keF42bwLI5O2EClTh8POP8tj96hO18woM4ONLyA=) As we approach the one year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, it is more clear than ever that Congress must act to protect the right to vote, stop partisan gerrymandering, make it easy to register to vote, ensure access to polling places and vote-by-mail, and block partisan sabotage of election results. We voted for that in the House, and like you, I am a little frustrated that the Senate is taking so long to get it done. But when they do, our work will not be over. We will need to defend our majorities in the House and Senate, so that these crucial election protections cannot be repealed by Republican leaders. [**So, please donate now to support our big fight ahead in 2022. name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/3839f23329c83bdcc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, It's been a B.I.G. week for our campaign and the entire state of Georgia! We're heading into 2022 with the wind at our back — and it's no small part due to your prayers and support. [**If you haven't yet contributed but are able to spare a few dollars to support our efforts, I hope you'll do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/09d1391505c5130fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Rivian's B.I.G. Announcement_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/27719da810313e7ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Thrilled to be at Rivian's announcement in Atlanta yesterday! This monumental investment in our state is going to create 7,500 new Georgia jobs and is a major win for our state's workers and families. When I'm in the U.S. Senate, I'll continue working to create more opportunity, not dependency.
---
---
# **_Election Integrity_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/1cb50febe3c17298c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
This week, the Heritage Foundation released its first-ever Election Integrity Scorecard — and Georgia was ranked #1 for free and fair elections! The election law passed earlier this year made it easier to cast a vote and harder to steal one. Raphael Warnock and Democrats in the Senate are determined to undo all of that by nationalizing our elections, weakening voter ID, and funding their campaigns with our tax dollars. To save election security, we must defeat Warnock — and I'm the only Republican who can get it done. [**Read more from Heritage here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/abbd95593ee879d8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Cobb County Republican Women_**
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/087614a323a42915c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
It's always great to be back in Cobb County, and this week's Cobb County Republican Women's Christmas Party was no exception. **[I was asked lead the group in a rendition of "This Little Light of Mine" while they held small candles symbolizing letting our conservative lights shine](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/e3818599539676eec3d6b838967d376c/37793)**.
---
---
# **_Putting It On The Line_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/3225b05006e95e1dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Talked with the _Washington Examiner _about why I'm running for the U.S. Senate and why I'm the only who can defeat Raphael Warnock in November. **[Hope you'll take a few minutes to read the full story here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/a62999b19d12101cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** Below is a key line about the momentum we've already built with your help: _“Black, the state agriculture commissioner since 2011, has assembled an enviable list of local and state-based endorsements, including county commissioners, sheriffs, and state legislators.”_
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/d3b740e4688a1863c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/c9e436fae34465a8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/49b461070ed5c1f8c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! With one week to go until Christmas Eve, it's a busy season of life for all of us. On top of that the Biden administration's failed economic policies have created inflation and uncertainty. We don't take asking for contributions lightly, especially during this season. [**If you're able to help ensure this campaign continues to have the resources to win, please do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/eb447c922b39f8bec3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/9f76c28385170960c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/b810f0266b9f37dbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5107aa7196a3e108/8afa2f36f1897c75c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5107aa7196a3e108&d=c9cbc4827506e7eec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5107aa7196a3e108).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Ally is wearing out her red running shoes!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014jUf5Q9Jv3mA8B-QtcIMvvfwSRIogQUGY_g4BPxM5jdJoNPtECfhgcZ252HDIJct1FZis4xTnBZOorMPn_jz6lJU7b4JA4PaydIRZgfGA5jMW5Hlp5ved9QCoxe5RWdOXinAdBsmHo7RGj0xtrNtRg==&c=46ELPTcohywwrrvIH34HWU8dk8rLxfR_64a-2G8sfQtimGKUwONgNA==&ch=ND8lRv8xM3vMDAxI6N51L8lT1jDqy3UwndDY8ZVKbDyUcSSKZOBHhA==)
---
| | Hi there,
This week Ally Isom launched a new policy initiative, "The Right Things: A Compact with Utah. A Vision for America." Ally also visited the 69th city on her Walk-A-Mile tour; her red running shoes are showing some wear! Here is the latest from the #AllyForUtah campaign.
---
|
---
|
---
| The Right Things
Yesterday, Ally launched "The Right Things: A Compact with Utah. A Vision for America." -- a policy initiative. "Over the last six months, wearing my red running shoes, I walked with everyday Utahns in nearly 70 Utah cities and towns across this beautiful state," Ally [wrote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014jUf5Q9Jv3mA8B-QtcIMvvfwSRIogQUGY_g4BPxM5jdJoNPtECfhgZD6gyzfhk1JFJhI7pHXde1daBL_btcCDo96OFgYFRlrtWxqd4nhP3OXNgiT_QKPCLZ1xmkwhMjMSVbk6ZOwEJmJMnSHYFBptLXli6C4y1UHqr9mTkCE9vU=&c=46ELPTcohywwrrvIH34HWU8dk8rLxfR_64a-2G8sfQtimGKUwONgNA==&ch=ND8lRv8xM3vMDAxI6N51L8lT1jDqy3UwndDY8ZVKbDyUcSSKZOBHhA==) on social media. "I've listened to local community leaders, parents, business owners, entrepreneurs, ranchers, and everyone in between -- all in an effort to understand what's top of mind and in the hearts of my fellow Utahns.
"Consistent themes emerged: water, affordable housing, the economy, childcare, law enforcement morale, and the impact of the pandemic. Those conversations are now the foundation for my policy positions.
"Over the next several weeks I'll share more about my eight policy planks. They are clarity, stability, stewardship, family success, infrastructure integrity, innovation, health & well-being, and order in the Republic. This compact is a commitment to continue to truly listen to Utah, to fight for the right things, to achieve a vision for our nation--a shared vision of cooperation, prosperity, and family success."
To learn more, visit [https://allyforutah.com/the-right-things-a-compact-with-utah-a-vision-for-america/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014jUf5Q9Jv3mA8B-QtcIMvvfwSRIogQUGY_g4BPxM5jdJoNPtECfhgXHUmpKL8FhXu7IOQrAyy4BoQAubKB3navlrdtmEtB5OaoxdcJOK9CFVnRQlSNKMjU5KK-pyDSiZgMi77gfCFP4h6fT-fuqkjjy852xuhIeaGVu1AUmFxLuvQe75DFbgzYItJAAOqXb3PDH_UngBveFfRdz6tHurWS6Kz_oEZgG5&c=46ELPTcohywwrrvIH34HWU8dk8rLxfR_64a-2G8sfQtimGKUwONgNA==&ch=ND8lRv8xM3vMDAxI6N51L8lT1jDqy3UwndDY8ZVKbDyUcSSKZOBHhA==)
---
|
---
| Conversation with KSL's Boyd Matheson Ally talked with Inside Source's Boyd Matheson this week on KSLNewsRadio about "The Rights Things," policy initiative, the lens she uses for her candidacy and decision-making, and the impact of the Utahns she has met in the nearly 70 cities she's visited so far on her red-shoe Walk-A-Mile tour. A Vision for America." Ally also visited the 69th city on her Walk-A-Mile tour; her red running shoes are showing some wear! Here is the latest from the #AllyForUtah campaign. | | | The Right Things Yesterday, Ally launched "The Right Things: A Compact with Utah. A Vision for America." -- a policy initiative. "Over the last six months, wearing my red running shoes, I walked with everyday Utahns in nearly 70 Utah cities and towns across this beautiful state," Ally == on social media. "I've listened to local community leaders, parents, business owners, entrepreneurs, ranchers, and everyone in between -- all in an effort to understand what's top of mind and in the hearts of my fellow Utahns. "Consistent themes emerged: water, affordable housing, the economy, childcare, law enforcement morale, and the impact of the pandemic. Those conversations are now the foundation for my policy positions. "Over the next several weeks I'll share more about my eight policy planks. They are clarity, stability, stewardship, family success, infrastructure integrity, innovation, health & well-being, and order in the Republic. This compact is a commitment to continue to truly listen to Utah, to fight for the right things, to achieve a vision for our nation--a shared vision of cooperation, prosperity, and family success." Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is when a candidate calls through a list of reliable Democratic donors and asks them to contribute.
But because Dr. Martin is spending every spare moment of his time off the campaign trail treating COVID-19 patients at the hospital (with a dangerous variant on the rise making this even more urgent), he simply doesn’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and our opponent. **That’s why we set this $16,000 grassroots goal — if we can reach that before the end of the year, we’ll be in a good position to take on Bill Lee and the corrupt GOP money machine.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Demoralized by Education
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=5167ed8367&u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=b8a7237088)
---
|
---
|
---
# When Children are Under Siege by Ideology, Parents are the Solution
Peter,Today, our children are growing up more demoralized as Americans than previous generations. Our students are leaving school more anxious, more at risk for mental health crises, and more likely to be politically radicalized. The last generation to finish school, Millennials, swung more [dramatically towards socialism](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=0de9dc6275&e=5167ed8367) than most expected. And the next generation will most likely continue to turn away from fundamental American values if ideologies being imposed in the classroom supersedes academic excellence.
| [Help me Restore America, click HERE to DONATE](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=de61a2d7cb&e=5167ed8367)
---
It’s a shame that many schools are only focused on indoctrination and alienation instead of educating. First impressions are powerful: when your formative years are filled with experiences of social unrest, riots, wars, economic disasters and rising student debt, and part of your education might consists of the terms and concepts that are part of Critical Race Theory, anti-American philosophies and radicalism, it makes sense that a lot of young people think America is fundamentally evil.But we know America has been a force for good in the world – restraining communism, defeating terrorism, and protecting religious freedoms here and abroad. More than any nation in the history of man, it is better to live in America if you are a minority. We are a diverse nation of immigrants, which turns other nations’ tired, poor, and huddled masses yearning to breathe free into a society which offers equal opportunity for all.If there is any nation where you can make a place for yourself better than America, name it.If there is any place better in history where each and every person can thrive and enjoy the blessings of liberty, tell me.
| [DONATE to Defend our Parental Rights](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=8e939d8b64&e=5167ed8367)
---
When parents are involved in their child’s education and passing on the story of our Nation, we give our next generation the best chance to carry freedom forward. We should tell the painful story of the blemishes and burdens of an imperfect Nation. We should tell our children about how previous generations moved forward and overcame the challenges that faced them. Parents solely carry the responsibility of raising their children and are the best educators.
|
---
| [VOLUNTEER and Join a Campaign Fighting for New Jersey’s Parents](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=ed911314bd&e=5167ed8367)
---
I believe parents have proven themselves to be the best educators we have at our disposal. And I will support a variety of education options that work for New Jersey kids. School choice, educational savings accounts, and federal tax credits are good policies because they give parents the power to choose what’s best for their child.For New Jersey,Shawn Hyland

clean_body: | | | | | When Children are Under Siege by Ideology, Parents are the Solution Peter,Today, our children are growing up more demoralized as Americans than previous generations. Our students are leaving school more anxious, more at risk for mental health crises, and more likely to be politically radicalized. The last generation to finish school, Millennials, swung more than most expected. And the next generation will most likely continue to turn away from fundamental American values if ideologies being imposed in the classroom supersedes academic excellence. | It’s a shame that many schools are only focused on indoctrination and alienation instead of educating. First impressions are powerful: when your formative years are filled with experiences of social unrest, riots, wars, economic disasters and rising student debt, and part of your education might consists of the terms and concepts that are part of Critical Race Theory, anti-American philosophies and radicalism, it makes sense that a lot of young people think America is fundamentally evil.But we know America has been a force for good in the world – restraining communism, defeating terrorism, and protecting religious freedoms here and abroad. More than any nation in the history of man, it is better to live in America if you are a minority. We are a diverse nation of immigrants, which turns other nations’ tired, poor, and huddled masses yearning to breathe free into a society which offers equal opportunity for all.If there is any nation where you can make a place for yourself better than America, name it.If there is any place better in history where each and every person can thrive and enjoy the blessings of liberty, tell me. | When parents are involved in their child’s education and passing on the story of our Nation, we give our next generation the best chance to carry freedom forward. We should tell the painful story of the blemishes and burdens of an imperfect Nation. We should tell our children about how previous generations moved forward and overcame the challenges that faced them. Parents solely carry the responsibility of raising their children and are the best educators. | | I believe parents have proven themselves to be the best educators we have at our disposal. And I will support a variety of education options that work for New Jersey kids. School choice, educational savings accounts, and federal tax credits are good policies because they give parents the power to choose what’s best for their child.For New Jersey,Shawn Hyland | | | | | | | In the News | | | | | | | Real Talk with Ronnie I recently had the privilege to answer a series of questions by Ronald Lin on his Sunday Night show, Real Talk With Ronnie.| | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Hyland for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Closing the Door on 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470990?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Closing the Door on 2021_** Earlier this week we held the last 2021 meeting for the Indiana Republican State Committee, and to say that we're ready for the 2022 election cycle is an understatement. As I've been on the road meeting with county chairs, volunteers, and other active Republicans, it is clear that our statewide team is organized and motivated and ready to do our part to take back the House and Senate. We spent most of 2021 laying the groundwork for a successful cycle and will be ready to put our plans in place next year.

Until then, we are enjoying the final weeks of the year with friends and family. Christmas is right around the corner and I know most of you will join with me in spending these closing days of 2021 doing some last minute Christmas shopping, going to church, reveling in family traditions, and spending time with friends, coworkers, and loved ones. However you spend Christmas and the holidays, enjoy your time and let's be ready to win in 2022.

Thank you,
Kyle

**_Photo: Chairman Hupfer and Governor Holcomb at Taylor University's annual Silent Night basketball game._**
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb** announced the recipients of the [Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI)](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e842fb439e&e=1acd9bb3d6) grants. Launched by Governor Holcomb, READI encourages regional collaboration and data-driven, long-term planning that, when implemented, will attract and retain talent in Indiana. The governor and the Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC) awarded $500 million to support regional development plans across 17 regions representing all 92 counties. _**“The seventeen regions submitted innovative, creative and visionary projects that will result in a positive economic impact on Indiana’s future... These plans will shape Indiana for generations to come and bring value to our state like nothing we’ve witnessed before. I want to thank the general assembly for having the courage and leadership to prioritize this initiative,” Governor Holcomb.**_ **The governor** participated in the annual [Dentons Legislative Conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b13840ba9e&e=1acd9bb3d6) earlier this week and gave a preview of what 2022 might bring to the Statehouse.

**Governor Holcomb** also delivered the keynote address at the [26th Annual Governor's Luncheon for Scouting](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e1f12aea28&e=1acd9bb3d6) for Crossroads of America Council and the Boy Scouts of America. The theme of his address was Training Camp for Life.

_**Photos: (Top) Governor Holcomb chairs the IEDC board meeting earlier this week at Butler University. (Bottom) Governor Holcomb participates in a Q&A at the annual Dentons Legislative Conference.**_
---
|
---
| **_Automatic Refund for Hoosier Taxpayers_** Thanks to conservative fiscal management and a Hoosier economy that has proven its resilience, Indiana taxpayers will receive an automatic refund after they fil their 2021 taxes. An estimated $545 million will be returned to Hoosiers.

_**“Despite a pandemic, Indiana exceeded all expectations and closed the state fiscal year with an unprecedented amount in reserves. We have an obligation to put this money back in the hands of taxpayers instead of leaving it in the hands of government,” Governor Holcomb.**_

The Governor is working with leaders of the general assembly on legislation that will streamline the refund process and make an additional 910,000 taxpayers eligible for the credit. The typical taxpayer liability is approximately $1000. This payment represents a 12-13% one-time tax cut.

**Once again, Republican leadership is paying dividends for Hoosiers!**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Erin Lucas Elected GOP Vice Chair_** Longtime republican supporter, volunteer and former Congressional staffer **Erin Lucas** was elected Vice Chair of the Indiana Republican Party earlier this week during a meeting of the Indiana Republican State Committee.

_**"Erin is perfectly suited to serve as Vice Chair. I'm thrilled she stepped up to lead and am grateful the state committee unanimously elected her," said State Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer. **_

She and her husband Tyler live in South Bend. They are parents to one child and expecting their second. Prior to moving to South Bend, Erin served for nearly ten years in various capacities on the staff of Congressman Larry Bucshon. Erin is a development associate with the Boys & Girls Clubs of St. Joseph County. She earned her undergraduate degree at Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College and her MBA from the Indiana State University Scott College of Business.

She will fill the remainder of Holli Sullivan's term. **Congratulations Erin! **
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Ellen McDaniel (1950-2021)_** We want to thank all of you who've sent notes, cards, gifts, and flowers to our office for former State Party Chairman Mike McDaniel and his family. As you know, his wife [Ellen (Record) McDaniel](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=21ced4b6f4&e=1acd9bb3d6), a long-time supporter of our party, passed away last week. Again, if you wish to send a card or note you can send to our HQ and we'll make sure Mike and his family receive them: Indiana Republican Party
Re: McDaniel Family
101 W. Ohio Street
Suite 2200
Indianapolis, IN 46204 **A celebration of Ellen's life is being planned** and we will share details of that event as they become available. Until then, we will continue to lift up Mike and his family in prayer during this time.
---
|
---
| _**Thomas Joins Indiana GOP as Press Secretary**_ Luke Thomas has joined the Indiana Republican Party team as our new press secretary. Luke will be the main contact for media moving forward. He started his position today. Luke's email is [lthomas@indiana.gop](mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop).

Join us in welcoming Luke to the team!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Republican State Convention**_ The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place **on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. **

More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found [at this link.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae8bd989d5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Congress of Counties 2022**_ **[Registration is open for Congress of Counties 2022! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=79372e7814&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for February 25-26 at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c28560b87f&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**Bidenflation has NOT impacted registration for Congress of Counties! [General admission registration remains $100/person.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb357fff9f&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2022’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics. The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track.

THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES WILL BE RELEASED IN THE COMING WEEKS! **-[-> Register Now!<-](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0758216211&e=1acd9bb3d6)-**
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[January 29:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a7d87aed3f&e=1acd9bb3d6) Rush County Lincoln Day Dinner
[February 10:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef20d01b93&e=1acd9bb3d6) Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner
[February 25:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f5a5c85c3d&e=1acd9bb3d6) Congress of Counties
[June 18: ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=02aea4e35e&e=1acd9bb3d6)Indiana GOP State Convention
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[a](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b0209c664e&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ttends the Performance Racing Industry show in Indianapolis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e2762e5d61&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan**[continues connecting with Hoosiers on her 92 county tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b64f0c841&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [swore in deputy attorneys generals](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6236aa980&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a7d739bc9&e=1acd9bb3d6)[hares concerns about inflation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f48e95ea2d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[congratulates the Hoosier group, Girl Named Tom, on winning The Voice](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63e6db12bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congressman Greg Pence** [shares how inflation impacts Americans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b71681c989&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[visits a Newburgh gas station to discuss America's energy crisis](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4bc543f915&e=1acd9bb3d6)

The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track. name: Doug White
subject: This is our chance to turn Central Washington blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug White for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93505/images/White-FullColor-Logo-RGB.jpg]

Friend,
Representative Dan Newhouse has done one good thing in his career - voting to impeach President Trump. By doing so, he gave us a clear path to victory. For the first time in 30 years, we have an exciting opportunity to flip this seat from red to blue.
Even with our clear path to victory, the stakes for the 4th Congressional District have never been higher. We have seen multiple radical opponents enter this race. We are now up against 5 Republican opponents apart from Dan Newhouse. The most recent Republican opponent to enter this race is a white supremacist running on a platform to impeach President Biden.
District 4 deserves a Representative who will deliver policies to build our economy and address our water, immigration, and infrastructure needs, rather than jeopardize our democracy. That’s why I am running.
We finally have a chance to see new leadership represent Central Washington, but we need your help. We have a huge end of the year deadline coming up and our campaign needs to raise another $30,000 by the end of the month to make a strong showing in this race. We need your support before then. Can you donate $100, $250, or $500 right now to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem] Thank you, Doug White https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/ [https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]

The clean-energy economy is the future. | Team — we’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: **By expanding clean energy in Ohio, we’re not just protecting our environment — we’re also building our economy and creating good-paying jobs that will support middle-class families.** It’s just that simple. **[Do you support expanding renewable energy in Ohio, friend? Add your name right now to say you’re on board>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39784627/321394035/48537828?refcode=ea.e45d68e0-715f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.e45d68e0-715f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDVkNjhlMC03MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_Yn2tNrVobCvTsbFwuZDiASJYUgmV7WnLRMVZivw6Y=&emci=6eb91570-425f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e45d68e0-715f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)** With John as mayor, Cincinnati embarked on the largest municipal solar power installation in the country. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: The clean-energy economy is the future. | Team — we’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: By expanding clean energy in Ohio, we’re not just protecting our environment — we’re also building our economy and creating good-paying jobs that will support middle-class families. It’s just that simple. With John as mayor, Cincinnati embarked on the largest municipal solar power installation in the country. Now, the city is reducing its carbon footprint and is replacing fossil fuels with renewable energy. And we can do it across Ohio, too. John’s plan for Ohio’s comeback includes embarking on similar renewable energy projects in at least 10 counties every year — and creating 1,300 jobs per year at the same time. Thanks for standing with us! Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Let's get it done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Here's the deal, Peter --

As we work toward helping our nation recover from the pandemic, we can't go back to normal, because "normal" wasn't cutting it for too many Americans. That's why Derek proudly voted for the Build Back Better Act.

The Build Back Better Act will create millions of jobs, cut taxes for middle class families, combat the climate crisis, lower health care and prescription drug costs, and ensure **no community is left behind** as we build our nation back better.

Middle class families deserve a break. This legislation will spur economic growth and ease inflation, while helping countless Americans get back up on their feet -- especially the folks who are often left out or left behind.

Now, we need the U.S. Senate to bring this legislation to a vote, and Derek wants to know what you think: **[If you agree we need to lower costs for working families, address climate change, and boldly tackle economic inequality, add your name to join Derek in supporting the Build Back Better Act.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDVzLypcW-OT61kpdmIHtOrBdi_vkQCJFPiEF5zN0_4=/OP4Kd1uA0xt9e7YN9rKBWZBNTwP41Ed5cXukGkeiobE=?ms=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDVzLypcW-OT61kpdmIHtOrBdi_vkQCJFPiEF5zN0_4=/OP4Kd1uA0xt9e7YN9rKBWZBNTwP41Ed5cXukGkeiobE=?ms=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
Once-in-a-generation challenges call for once-in-a-generation solutions. Peter, the Build Back Better Act's potential to help communities across the nation can't be overstated!

Derek and House Democrats are delivering on their promise to build our nation back better. We need to keep putting pressure on the Senate to send this legislation to the president's desk without delay.

Thank you for your support,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDVzLypcW-OT61kpdmIHtOrBdi_vkQCJFPiEF5zN0_4=/uNEea0hNuppgByFgyx7DQfTt9ORd-91yv88wQ6dqT2w=?refcode=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211217_bbbpet_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Long, but important about 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This is an important email about our work heading into 2022. It’s long,
but please stick with me and read to the end.

In just a few years, Justice Democrats has made a major impact on politics
in Washington. In 2016, a bunch of us were Bernie campaign staffers and
super volunteers. We had just worked on his inspiring campaign for
president and were trying to figure out how to answer one important
question: How can we continue Bernie’s vision AND force Congress, and the
Democratic establishment, to prioritize a progressive agenda?

We launched in 2017 and it was really tough going at first. It’s not easy
to run a grassroots-funded organization fighting for progress — we know
how corporate donors and the political establishment will do anything to
protect the status quo. Through the initial struggle, the election of
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez made it all worth it.

When Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

We were still funded 100% from the grassroots and fundraising continued to
be a huge challenge for us. The Democratic establishment and the
right-wing have unlimited amounts of money pouring in from Wall Street,
fossil fuel companies, Big Pharma, and health insurance executives. We’re
trying to defeat them with a fraction of the money corporate Democrats
have in their campaign accounts.

That’s why your support is so critical,
Peter. Most Congressional races
are won by the candidate with more money. Yet, we continue to win
primaries with less money because we have the message, organizing
operation, campaign experience, and grassroots energy behind us.

The election cycle after AOC won and the Squad took office, we helped
elect Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and Marie Newman. We also helped defend
the Squad from primary challenges backed by Wall Street and the political
establishment. We’ve proven we can win.

This year we recruited five working-class progressives to take on the
Democratic establishment in 2022. Just this week, we endorsed a sixth.
With your help we can elect Odessa Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Kina Collins,
Jessica Cisneros, Summer Lee, and Greg Casar, and continue making our mark
on Congress.

Together we can raise up a progressive agenda and build our progressive
bloc in Washington so we can finally pass Medicare for All and a Green New
Deal. Our first 2022 primaries are right around the corner — in-person
early voting for our Texas Justice Democrats, Jessica and Greg, starts on
February 14.

So today, I’m asking you to help us make 2022 a winning year for Justice
Democrats. I promise you that almost no other org will spend your money
more efficiently. If we can raise enough this year, I know we can elect
more new Justice Dems than ever before.

Peter, now is
the time to chip in and support strong progressive primaries. We need your
help to prepare for 2022. We could go from 10 to 16 Justice Democrats in
Congress, putting even more pressure on Wall Street-backed corporate
Democrats. Can you make a contribution today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87560?refcode=em20211217-21020&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ ]→ Yes, I can donate to Justice Democrats right now to help elect the
next generation of the Squad to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87560?refcode=em20211217-21020&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ ]Contribute

With your support, we’ll elect the next generation of Justice Democrats to
challenge corporate Democrats and start fighting for working people in the
halls of Congress.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211217-21020-footer&t=1006&refcode2=21020_1203867_KTMyxQ&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=21020%2E1203867%2EKTMyxQ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I’m running for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)
---
| Peter,

My name is Valerie Foushee. I was born in Orange County, North Carolina, and have lived here for my entire life. [_**Now, I 'm running to represent my community in the U.S. House of Representatives.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)
---
| [SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN ](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)
---
It wasn't always easy for me growing up. I was the oldest of six children and was born to two teenage parents. I watched my parents work multiple jobs to make ends meet and attended segregated schools until sixth grade. **But even with these challenges, my parents instilled in me the importance of community, hard work, service to your neighbors, and education.** These values still shape who I am today.

While in high school, I worked as a church secretary, a clerk at a recreation center, and at UNC Hospitals, delivering food trays to patients to save for college. High school was also where I met my partner for life, Stan. We dated all through high school and have been married for 44 years -- we also raised two wonderful sons together! I worked hard to attend the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill (go Tar Heels!), and this educational background set me up for a **lifetime commitment to service.**

As a parent to young children in the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City schools system, I would leave work at the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7:00 a.m. to volunteer in my children's classrooms until 9:00 a.m. Through that volunteer service, I learned that kids, especially black and brown kids, could use another champion on the School Board who was always looking out for them and their success. **So I ran, and I won.**

Over the next twenty-four years, I served on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board, was the first African American female elected to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and served in the North Carolina state House and then state Senate. **In each of those elected positions, I focused on the issues that matter most: a good education, creating good-paying jobs, and being a champion for underrepresented communities.**

In the General Assembly, I worked across the aisle to increase access to health care and end the practice of child marriage. I also stood up to radical Republicans when they attacked a woman's right to choose, targeted our immigrant communities, and attempted to strip North Carolinians of their voting rights.

[_**I 'm proud of what I've accomplished as a public servant, but I'm not finished making a positive difference in my community. That's why I'm running for Congress. Will you help us launch our campaign in the right direction by donating today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)
| [DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)
---
If elected to Congress, I will be a champion for working families, a leader to reform our criminal justice system and tackle systemic racism, and a fighter to protect our environment and address climate change. [_**I hope you 'll help me get there by supporting my campaign for Congress in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)

Thank you for your time,

Valerie Foushee
_Candidate for Congress, NC-06_

* * *
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AaT6HjpKn5xijaNjnorzTenHSsPk2YSwAHleNTdfpkI=/kwr9wxx2MWr100iqsUiu4fMKYytW6V-7A41sC032Dhk=?refcode=BLU-VFC-Welcome1-EM)

---

PO BOX 16446
Chapel Hill NC 27516 United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **URGENT:** Justice Sonia Sotomayor penned an EMPHATIC dissent when the Supreme Court first let Texas BAN abortions after six weeks of pregnancy:

Thanks to conservative budgeting and Republican leadership over the past decade, Wisconsin sees budget surpluses year after year. Now, it's time to make a change that will help our economy AND do right by the taxpayers. clean_body: PETITION — let's get rid of the income tax in Wisconsin. Friend, Two of America's biggest and most prosperous states, Texas and Florida, are magnets for businesses, workers, and opportunity thanks to one huge factor – they don't have a state income tax. Why shouldn't Wisconsin join them? What do YOU think – would you like to drop your Wisconsin income tax bill to ZERO? Momentum is building for this idea – it's up to US to keep our foot on the gas pedal! Earlier this week, a UW-Madison economics professor found that eliminating the income tax (along with other changes) would increase employment in our state without adding to the overall tax burden for Wisconsinites. Thanks to conservative budgeting and Republican leadership over the past decade, Wisconsin sees budget surpluses year after year. Now, it's time to make a change that will help our economy AND do right by the taxpayers. Are you with me? Sen. Roger Roth Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin

name: response requested [Left Action]
subject: 👉 Sign Now: "I stand with the ACLU" >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stand with the ACLU: Fight back against Republican attacks on our rights!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93910c06-f942-4d1a-8fd6-f0e85f19c2b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dea8252-2eb2-44f5-8039-1e2557cc9717/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In states across the country, Republicans have been advancing their attacks on our civil liberties. Over 900 bills attacking our most fundamental freedoms made their way into state legislatures this year. So the ACLU is fighting back. With an on-the-ground presence in all 50 states, D.C., and Puerto Rico, the ACLU steps up to defend civil liberties on every front, from litigation to advocacy to organizing and beyond. When Texas introduced a bill that bans abortions after 6 weeks, before many even know they are pregnant, **[the ACLU was there.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33ceae26-8e45-4562-b8bd-b0d2a60cdcf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** When Georgia introduced a sweeping voter suppression bill, disproportionately targeting voters of color, **[the ACLU was there.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08fe6ae0-f87a-411e-a6c2-e451df19a3e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** When Arkansas introduced a law cruelly banning medically necessary health care for transgender youth, **[the ACLU was there.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T686a8600-919b-4fe9-8539-46ca6e2d17fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** But the ACLU can only continue this important work with the help of a strong grassroots army. We can win the progress our country desperately needs, and defeat Republican attacks on our rights. And we know there will be more fights coming our way. [Add your name now to join the fight – Stand with the ACLU and fight back against Republican attacks on our rights!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dc9610a-7d93-4172-aca2-ae3085323ab6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52e5749b-e475-47c7-8bdb-c81926da487d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

Looking to take action on another front? Check out the [list of some recent LeftAction Actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc86b8bc6-02fe-4225-be5c-c26eef102c87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Did you hear about our holiday party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211217-459-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ]Morgan Harper

I wanted to make sure that you saw this message my team sent out earlier
this week. We’re inviting you to our virtual Holiday event on December
19th at 5:30PM ET.

It’s so important to me that you’re there, because I really want to take this
opportunity to thank you for being on this journey with me. Here’s all the
details about the holiday party:

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/18419?t=1003&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ][IMG]

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/18419?t=1004&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ]If you are able to join us, please RSVP here! Hope to see you
there!

Wishing you a happy holiday season,

Morgan

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Morgan Harper for Ohio [contact@e.morganharper.org]
Date: Dec 15, 2021
Subject: Join us for a virtual holiday party to celebrate our campaign!

We’ve had a tough yet extraordinary year and Morgan and her team are
incredibly grateful for your support of her campaign! As we try to bring
change to Ohio and the greater Country, our team wanted to express our
deepest gratitude for coming along on this journey with us.

That’s why we would like to invite you to Morgan’s virtual Holiday event!
This year has come with challenges but we could not be more excited and
grateful for the support Morgan has gathered along the way and would love
to continue the momentum into 2022.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/18419?t=1005&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ]If you are able to join us, please RSVP here!

More details below. We really hope to see you there:

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/18419?t=1006&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ][IMG]

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/18419?t=1007&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc ]RSVP »

Morgan Harper Virtual Holiday Party
December 19th, 2021
5:30pm ET
Zoom Link Available upon RSVP

Thank you,

Team Morgan Harper

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1008&akid=459%2E90090%2EY7X4tc

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

clean_body: | = We just launched climate t-shirts in the Official Michael Bennet Shop.Take a look: | ** This year Michael made significant progress fighting climate change and protecting our public lands: He helped roll back Trump-era policies and restore Bears Ears National Monument to its original size and he passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill to expand access to clean water, protect the energy grid, and reduce carbon pollution. One of Michael’s top priorities is fighting climate change. When you buy a t-shirt today, you’re supporting his reelection efforts and his continued fight against climate change. All of this helps Michael keep fighting for us, so grab yours today. clean_body: | | | | To sunny Mar-a-Lago. | Friend, Why haven’t you entered to come to beautiful Mar-a-Lago in sunny Florida? The campaign event and photograph with President Trump is coming up and we want you to be our VIP guest, but sadly, we haven’t received your entry. Here’s what you could win: We’ll cover your flight and hotel You’ll attend a campaign dinner event And you’ll even get your picture taken with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago ALL YOU HAVE TO DO IS ENTER! Don’t miss out on this incredible trip to Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida. Thank you, Team Kelly for Alaska | | | | =

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Jussie Smollett = Hoax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Jussie Smollett is a criminal even if our media won't admit it | Have you ever heard the media be so quiet before?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)
**__[_Did you know all along that Jussie Smollett was LYING?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)__**

**[YES>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

**[NO>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

Peter,

_Have you ever heard the media be so quiet before?_

That's because they're hiding in utter shame over the Jussie Smollett HOAX.

Let's recap real quick. Jussie Smollett, a washed-up 30-something-year-old actor who was best known for his role as a 12-year-old in the _Mighty Ducks,_ decided he was going to resurrect his failed career by _**staging a hate crime.**_

He was trying to blame it on _" racist Trump supporters."_ _**So, of course, the liberal media fell for it.**_

They fawned over this clown, calling him everything from a victim to a hero. And, there's also this bogus statement from our "Vice President" referring to Smollett as the victim of a "modern-day lynching." _Yeah, this is exactly why the rest of the world is laughing at us._

_Peter, I called this hoax out from the start, but I want to make sure I'm not the only one who saw it. So I need you to tell me:_

**__[_Did you know all along that Jussie Smollett was LYING?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)__**

**[YES>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

**[NO>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

This should not be a hard question to answer, but then again we know the "journalists" who amplified this hoax aren't exactly the sharpest tools in the shed.

Peter, I will be reviewing the survey responses later and I'll be looking for YOURS.

**__[_Did you know all along that Jussie Smollett was LYING?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)__**

**[YES>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

**[NO>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59044233:6yawBLEUN:m:1:3298722022:CCBDA738D128163816534D677A8A39FA:r)
Donald Trump Jr.

Despite all of the solid progress we’ve made building out our campaign coffers over the last seven months we’re not exactly where we should be at this juncture. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0825f6bdde7042b294fb100fa029c254&_e=tcOHFUUwCV7w4N5vdJp4XrYC5hPvxPbsnA0Pm8-N6puB14Qsreb80BcT7qyWbccSLThAIjkNXUUuWScO4ek9ox2Jct0e03A8r0PgFYxQ0H79JT2hXFolj8y5XgyJrE0FYGZcaVOoYnCG1QkvV8u2ZZdH6IXqP-YaiyYWepX6BUjnxEMfCm-HlFVdU1P1fO5vLt8I-vrNVSWpR2gRGyoyZCXAI1FJrzQWBectbD5SU9iJBpbfT0lkyu7PAZhgKNGA5nUvzW3WZGlczOqEFINsvXn3khvaYrRNWq5RvOvvaUlVa_bZBDhuZAS1C8PPBtaXhH5SXNZPrPBGV-FXssmv5X1mXbsrpnZnSYux0OshAgfh_TiINpoPptSfSMaCHJKmt6rp0idkLpXCRB2SRxH_QWQDPcX8sZhjItCkyCoYSvo_OtcTt1qA5_ActzbovFQ3)

Peter,

**WHAT A YEAR. WHAT A YEAR IT’S BEEN.**

We’re on the cusp of not only INFLATION, BUT STAGFLATION setting in.

Elizabeth Warren is on the verge of making a concerted effort to expand the Supreme Court.

President Biden completely and undeniably botched the withdrawal from Afghanistan

We’re in debt more than $30 Trillion with no plan to pay it off.

**AND DEMOCRATS IN CONGRESS ARE FIGHTING FOR EVEN MORE DEBT SPENDING.**

**_Something’s gotta give._**

Since I launched my campaign in May for Oregon’s 4th district, we’ve seen a wonderful outpouring of support from every corner of the country. It’s such an honor to know that you’re as committed as we are to doing _our_ part in flipping the House majority next year.

Yet, despite all of the solid progress we’ve made building out our campaign coffers over the last seven months we’re not **_exactly_** where we should be at this juncture.

**HERE’S MY ASK OF YOU TODAY:** **Today marks two weeks to our very last fundraising deadline of 2021 and we need to raise an additional $7,500 before 11:59 p.m. on December 31st.**

While I know political giving is probably not your priority this year, **[I’m asking if you might possibly make a gift of even just one dollar right now.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0825f6bdde7042b294fb100fa029c254&_e=tcOHFUUwCV7w4N5vdJp4XrYC5hPvxPbsnA0Pm8-N6puB14Qsreb80BcT7qyWbccSLThAIjkNXUUuWScO4ek9ox2Jct0e03A8r0PgFYxQ0H79JT2hXFolj8y5XgyJrE0FYGZcaVOoYnCG1QkvV8u2ZZdH6IXqP-YaiyYWepX6BUjnxEMfCm-HlFVdU1P1fO5vLt8I-vrNVSWpR2gRGyoyZCXAI1FJrzQWBectbD5SU9j9V8w5qRKIRzZkwhxvDpDB1zIFpuDqGbP8b9Kxe2Zz1zK7Kg3Ww1lWa5HFehX3pvNjLpnlcCxq5Otfk5snoiiTJ-itO0o_6K_4HcGNm7X_iUWsMQShKMr64gf3G5rRyXQcSoUkfegyWfgpcw6U0vBa16bxjgD46cBpR3X-5xhSKcnki46cqyLwx5IvUTtLuciXk6fvDZf2irK0tLYTP-wR)** We’ve got enough people on my mailing list that if everyone who has donated before today made a small, **[we could close out our year TODAY.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0825f6bdde7042b294fb100fa029c254&_e=tcOHFUUwCV7w4N5vdJp4XrYC5hPvxPbsnA0Pm8-N6puB14Qsreb80BcT7qyWbccSLThAIjkNXUUuWScO4ek9ox2Jct0e03A8r0PgFYxQ0H79JT2hXFolj8y5XgyJrE0FYGZcaVOoYnCG1QkvV8u2ZZdH6IXqP-YaiyYWepX6BUjnxEMfCm-HlFVdU1P1fO5vLt8I-vrNVSWpR2gRGyoyZCXAI1FJrzQWBectbD5SU9gMIjfwHiqtRnil9I1MW9TP3MqMYK8JAfmHs8lC4EBGwCbIVn3WzGAmTaCbBeAkMga19tgQgwvkHIOlg-Mnv1MS6ytfMW2zNYwO_YCVceWSdXB0X0iVN6q8SnEgNbHc2jo5oRDBDOGQIGAU5wVPkgZjNO_0NV5Z7PWgeTsLa4JzWGpjybUAkS4EIqwKWVPdOqapWJRjy2qNaisUACW7cJ-O)**

**HELP ME MEET MY YEAR-END GOAL** [** CHIP IN $1 BEFORE DECEMBER 31ST ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0825f6bdde7042b294fb100fa029c254&_e=tcOHFUUwCV7w4N5vdJp4XrYC5hPvxPbsnA0Pm8-N6puB14Qsreb80BcT7qyWbccSLThAIjkNXUUuWScO4ek9ox2Jct0e03A8r0PgFYxQ0H79JT2hXFolj8y5XgyJrE0FYGZcaVOoYnCG1QkvV8u2ZZdH6IXqP-YaiyYWepX6BUjnxEMfCm-HlFVdU1P1fO5vLt8I-vrNVSWpR2gRGyoyZCXAI1FJrzQWBectbD5SU9gOH-hU0B_Hhq7Eh4jxVGBc4yqVMSj6ts7dF_m-IbFeT0dfE0Z6MbyWPs_ObOW03XVJ-AoXpbNHzBKwjSI6M4UjVdY3ZVCL_FcC_2BUYLT6K16sUaaQmpTymAvW1KYLDmfV4EPczdCcH5s-K_PtoVTLKPwTMGIH0oaz5kXGGB3bmlPVCI9jA54-_lK6f1T2XCbX54MB_rJXOi5VemnDdFBj)

I don’t take my money from large PACS like my former opponent did. **I’m only in this race because of the generosity of people like you, Peter.**

I want you to know how much I appreciate you.

My very best,

Alek

clean_body: WHAT A YEAR. WHAT A YEAR IT’S BEEN. Something’s gotta give, Peter. Despite all of the solid progress we’ve made building out our campaign coffers over the last seven months we’re not exactly where we should be at this juncture. | Peter, WHAT A YEAR. WHAT A YEAR IT’S BEEN. We’re on the cusp of not only INFLATION, BUT STAGFLATION setting in. Elizabeth Warren is on the verge of making a concerted effort to expand the Supreme Court. President Biden completely and undeniably botched the withdrawal from Afghanistan We’re in debt more than $30 Trillion with no plan to pay it off. AND DEMOCRATS IN CONGRESS ARE FIGHTING FOR EVEN MORE DEBT SPENDING. Something’s gotta give. Since I launched my campaign in May for Oregon’s 4th district, we’ve seen a wonderful outpouring of support from every corner of the country. It’s such an honor to know that you’re as committed as we are to doing our part in flipping the House majority next year. Yet, despite all of the solid progress we’ve made building out our campaign coffers over the last seven months we’re not exactly where we should be at this juncture. HERE’S MY ASK OF YOU TODAY: Today marks two weeks to our very last fundraising deadline of 2021 and we need to raise an additional $7,500 before 11:59 p.m. on December 31st. While I know political giving is probably not your priority this year, We’ve got enough people on my mailing list that if everyone who has donated before today made a small, HELP ME MEET MY YEAR-END GOAL My campaign is driven by small dollar donors like yourself. I don’t take my money from large PACS like my former opponent did. I’m only in this race because of the generosity of people like you, Peter. I want you to know how much I appreciate you. My very best, Alek HELP ME MEET MY YEAR-END GOAL | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. body:
Republicans keep blocking our efforts. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39787430/321409367/823540626?refcode=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk2Zjk3My03ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-X91MfomFomPNwBtHMt3y5XiN7jmcOz0buyyjBf7Ybo=&emci=be799bb9-7b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Peter, For years, Democratic leaders like Roy have been working to expand Medicaid coverage so North Carolinians can access the health care they need and deserve, and we won’t stop until we succeed. But yet again in 2021, Republicans blocked our efforts. **[By expanding Medicaid,_more than 620,000_ of our friends, family, and neighbors here in NC could finally afford health care coverage. Sign our petition now to DEMAND the GOP work with us to expand Medicaid next year >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39787431/321409368/297160991?refcode=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk2Zjk3My03ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-X91MfomFomPNwBtHMt3y5XiN7jmcOz0buyyjBf7Ybo=&emci=be799bb9-7b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39787432/321409369/297160991?refcode=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODk2Zjk3My03ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-X91MfomFomPNwBtHMt3y5XiN7jmcOz0buyyjBf7Ybo=&emci=be799bb9-7b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4896f973-7d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176) If this pandemic has taught us anything, it should be that health care cannot be a privilege for the wealthy few — it _must_ be something each and every one of us can count on when we need it. name: David Palmer
subject: Healthy people make strong communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39787524/321409604/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTI0MTNkMC03ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v37FjGnKZc0t9cZVDi0oGMmK4EH5kwuVQlqqHXds2kw=) | Peter, There’s really no nice way to say it, our healthcare infrastructure is broken. And, after two years of fighting against COVID, incredible stress on our system has shown just how bad things are. It also is a call to fight to ensure it serves every American. Illinois ranks twenty-second in healthcare in the United States. Smack dab in the middle of the pack. We have some of the best, most advanced hospitals in the world like Rush University Medical Center and Northwestern Memorial Hospital. **But, here in Central Illinois, good care is often out of reach.** **We need bold solutions to the healthcare crisis our country faces. We need Medicare for All. It is broadly popular amongst Americans and will be transformative to lessening inequities we see in healthcare right now. By ensuring that every man, woman, and child has access to quality care, free at the point of service, we will have healthier communities. Period.** When elected, I will fight for:
* Medicare for All, so all people have access to quality healthcare.
* A woman’s right to choose. Plain and simple.
* Lowering the cost of prescription drugs, because no one should not have to ration medicine.

**Healthcare is a basic human right. No one should have to worry about paying their medical bills when they or someone they love is facing a difficult diagnosis. Seeing a doctor should not mean going into debt. Bringing your child to the pediatrician should not mean choosing between a deductible and putting food on the table.** My promise to you is that I will work tirelessly to make sure you and your family have the peace of mind to visit the doctor and receive the treatment you need to get well without the risk of losing everything. Thank you, David

clean_body: | = | Peter, There’s really no nice way to say it, our healthcare infrastructure is broken. And, after two years of fighting against COVID, incredible stress on our system has shown just how bad things are. It also is a call to fight to ensure it serves every American. Illinois ranks twenty-second in healthcare in the United States. Smack dab in the middle of the pack. We have some of the best, most advanced hospitals in the world like Rush University Medical Center and Northwestern Memorial Hospital. But, here in Central Illinois, good care is often out of reach. We need bold solutions to the healthcare crisis our country faces. We need Medicare for All. It is broadly popular amongst Americans and will be transformative to lessening inequities we see in healthcare right now. By ensuring that every man, woman, and child has access to quality care, free at the point of service, we will have healthier communities. Period. When elected, I will fight for: Medicare for All, so all people have access to quality healthcare. A woman’s right to choose. Plain and simple. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs, because no one should not have to ration medicine. Healthcare is a basic human right. No one should have to worry about paying their medical bills when they or someone they love is facing a difficult diagnosis. Seeing a doctor should not mean going into debt. Bringing your child to the pediatrician should not mean choosing between a deductible and putting food on the table. My promise to you is that I will work tirelessly to make sure you and your family have the peace of mind to visit the doctor and receive the treatment you need to get well without the risk of losing everything. Thank you, David = Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. **Progressive Melanie D’Arrigo isn’t taking fossil fuel PAC money — or any corporate lobbyist money. Stand with her and fight back against the lobbyists who put profit over people and the planet.
**
[**Sign the petition: The Senate must pass a Build Back Better Act that invests in climate solutions right now!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmvtz74oD3ZjeJMKGoVFif2mDnLPOkKD8krwPMZerJtuByvuZ5Rsk6lHeo1W-U_vjeSSKO7druaQ13TdfCHTmbZC7if2pDsOzNnCdMEGbWkuPjabGkW4KTvuwAZP_hxY3JNx6vLSQmbc2OCc-9-IQ4wRge8oku2Yy5I6TZljhDeKISc0vIeyE5xx2D7cjKYwrSBCcrMBBtTxGIBP6sh_5IXyRHUYDZQU20Gchv2u041s3eu-4vSk3FU070GzzDHAMTWjwov3eDpoz75YRpqWIBoyikLKG7h3_T34QgOnhNuFLNSrKGRrLUmrZ7EFCR9W3u0vX5bEq6QSg6OHsLKoGmfgjyjQnUlR2B2EgLUxM8tJ2a5bPQygtkDSscTA9bknkzZP26JwCzgrmPL1orJgpM6wgkG_QEtOnMjbutzqUrKamOGXnj8Yvb7Ftff-hyJT23w6JXomq8ROHJ1CLUjh6zojtDOZSqafJEWNcq6jthRqEi9jLnZYEwvqYwvFGEYPLUWqbL031ICyIoH2HTuRveOJj-XB0ivpDiHCS5JmXI_hHUc2SPAsQ6z66dyeaY5XXJvsEPmQG-3FOhKHkj64uKV8tWmmvkusyX14cspskPa3U2FYVYHOBgaMJIsyWbqTlq8D0shKpO1GqPiCSQWsqXYjG-te9TwoDQXCrYu5yY-ug/3hx/oBLbwuLDTiOmjiyjSkFPUQ/h1/7AyE3EQEH7mXWFXHnasBIzMN8dn8wTpzCW0I1tMZk5A)
Over the last 30 years, the oil and gas industry has given over _$350 million_ to members of Congress while spending billions more on climate denial propaganda. Now, the fossil fuel industry is spending historic amounts of money to kill the Build Back Better Act which includes the largest investment in climate action in U.S. history
Let’s be very clear: Fossil fuel lobbyists are bribing members of Congress so they can continue destroying our planet for profit.
And there are some corporate Democrats who are all too willing to go along with it.
We’re up against powerful special interests, but we will not give up on a livable planet for our children. We have the collective power to defeat the corrupt corporate influence that has broken Congress.
**Join Melanie in the fight to STOP lobbyists that use legalized bribery to protect their profits.**
******[Add your name to the petition now! Tell the Senate to fight for the solutions that meet the moment of the climate crisis we face by passing Build Back Better.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmvtz74oD3ZjeJMKGoVFif2mDnLPOkKD8krwPMZerJtuByvuZ5Rsk6lHeo1W-U_vjeSSKO7druaQ13TdfCHTmbZC7if2pDsOzNnCdMEGbWkuPjabGkW4KTvuwAZP_hxY3JNx6vLSQmbc2OCc-9-IQ4wRge8oku2Yy5I6TZljhDeKISc0vIeyE5xx2D7cjKYwrSBCcrMBBtTxGIBP6sh_5IXyRHUYDZQU20Gchv2u041s3eu-4vSk3FU070GzzDHAMTWjwov3eDpoz75YRpqWIBoyikLKG7h3_T34QgOnhNuFLNSrKGRrLUmrZ7EFCR9W3u0vX5bEq6QSg6OHsLKoGmfgjyjQnUlR2B2EgLUxM8tJ2a5bPQygtkDSscTA9bknkzZP26JwCzgrmPL1orJgpM6wgkG_QEtOnMjbutzqUrKatxpvUzRAkwG0jGj3DMofJ6jpILITbK8vxSnvS7Lv0cNi7MFKw2qP7StgVBWi3jYJaVdmWLyjQpkUuD8xhy-q1mwBHwu-1aFR8KIdsSH3qpd_d6YDQ20L6E-VHhL35c5TC9jLntZ5ra5zr_ZeeRCYRn93NoQV26QOutXbpBHIX7VQ-SK2ZF3c-8g2aVeEiFN4erDUiB13KMQeHg-qktWjbt_e8DovbvCkGJQFo06uXVba6qvEm1Kt3lS6zgzJKIhnw/3hx/oBLbwuLDTiOmjiyjSkFPUQ/h2/CPEwI-NNE5hxRt6PZo38UvBqKRHujToi3PQJeeQxUE4)**
