clean_body: | | | Fourteen oil and gas industry PACs have given over $350,000 to 40 House Democrats so far this year. Progressive Melanie D’Arrigo isn’t taking fossil fuel PAC money — or any corporate lobbyist money. Stand with her and fight back against the lobbyists who put profit over people and the planet. Over the last 30 years, the oil and gas industry has given over $350 million to members of Congress while spending billions more on climate denial propaganda. Now, the fossil fuel industry is spending historic amounts of money to kill the Build Back Better Act which includes the largest investment in climate action in U.S. history Let’s be very clear: Fossil fuel lobbyists are bribing members of Congress so they can continue destroying our planet for profit. And there are some corporate Democrats who are all too willing to go along with it. We’re up against powerful special interests, but we will not give up on a livable planet for our children. We have the collective power to defeat the corrupt corporate influence that has broken Congress. Join Melanie in the fight to STOP lobbyists that use legalized bribery to protect their profits. **** Thanks for standing up for the future of our planet. \-- D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: This is a long email, and by the time you're done reading it, I hope you'll understand how important it is that we defeat Ron Johnson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I’m writing to you today to tell you a hard truth about what it will take to flip this Senate seat and then, I’m going to ask you to make a small donation to my campaign. But before I do, I want to share why I decided to run against Ron Johnson in the first place.

The truth is, I never planned to run for public office. But when Scott Walker tried to consolidate power and get rid of Wisconsin’s fiscal watchdog, I knew I had to do something about it. So, I launched a grassroots effort to take him on and save the State Treasurer’s office.

**Our scrappy campaign won with 62% of the vote statewide. It was the kind of landslide victory that just doesn't happen in Wisconsin.**

Then, I decided to run for the office that I worked so hard to save — flipping nine Trump counties, defeating my Republican opponent by more than 100,000 votes, and winning more of the vote share than the Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General in a down-ballot race.

That should tell you a lot about me. I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I first ran because politicians like Scott Walker slammed the door on workers and families. I believed Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests.

From Ashland to Marinette to Janesville and everywhere in-between, I’ve proven that I can compete and win all over our beautiful state. That’s why I’m mounting my third grassroots campaign — this time, for the United States Senate.

The fact is, Ron Johnson hasn’t just lost touch with Wisconsin workers and families, he’s lost touch with reality. Folks in our state have had enough of leaders who govern by conspiracy theory. We had plenty of that with Donald Trump.

We need someone who will fight for the kitchen-table issues that matter most to everyday families — like guaranteed paid leave, affordable childcare, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and building an economy that works for everyone. That’s why I’m in this fight.

With our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority hanging in the balance by just one seat, all eyes will be on our race. _CNN_ has already called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP Senator up in 2022, and _The Cook Political Report_ moved Wisconsin from Lean R to Toss-Up. Wisconsin is heating up.

I’m the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of our race, but we have a long way to go to get to the finish line. If we want to defeat him at the ballot box, I’ll need your help to build another winning campaign because flipping this seat will require lots of grassroots support from folks like you. So, I’m humbly asking:

[**Would you consider adding a small donation to my campaign ahead of our final FEC deadline of the year? I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means anything you can contribute will make a meaningful difference in our race to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue and defeat Ron Johnson. — Sarah Godlewski

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788216/321412382/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2NjNlZi04MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nt14RmYzyxOjHE8jEIQLYFwo6NhnbcqkTwIAkwCYaw=)

Hey team,

With the end of the year right around the corner, I wanted to reach out and share a rundown of our favorite moments from the campaign this past year.

Before we get into it, I think a second should be spent thanking everyone who's supported Kara and our campaign this year. Since June, when Kara announced her candidacy, folks from Hauppauge to Montauk have donated their time, energy, and hard-earned money to help flip this seat blue for working people and families.

Thanks to you all, Kara's been out and about meeting voters, building coalitions, and sharing her vision for the future that puts Long Island firmly on the path towards progress.

So, thank you! If you've been able to help, we're grateful to have you.

* * *
**On the trail in 2021:** **On June 2nd, we launched this movement with the support of hundreds of community members beside us.** We started things off on the right foot, and we're carrying this momentum forward to this day. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788217/321412383/-710890255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2NjNlZi04MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nt14RmYzyxOjHE8jEIQLYFwo6NhnbcqkTwIAkwCYaw=&emci=03c1ec8e-515f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=681663ef-805f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)
---
**On July 5th, we celebrated Independence Day by participating in the Port Jefferson Parade -- the same parade Kara went to as a kid.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788218/321412384/1387800442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2NjNlZi04MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nt14RmYzyxOjHE8jEIQLYFwo6NhnbcqkTwIAkwCYaw=&emci=03c1ec8e-515f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=681663ef-805f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)
---
**On August 2nd, Kara helped clean up beaches with local families:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788219/321412385/-760886352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2NjNlZi04MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nt14RmYzyxOjHE8jEIQLYFwo6NhnbcqkTwIAkwCYaw=&emci=03c1ec8e-515f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=681663ef-805f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)
---
**On October 2nd, Kara joined activists and progressives for a rally in protest of the Texas abortion ban.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788220/321412386/1506425641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2NjNlZi04MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Nt14RmYzyxOjHE8jEIQLYFwo6NhnbcqkTwIAkwCYaw=&emci=03c1ec8e-515f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=681663ef-805f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)
---
**On November 25th, Kara shared her family recipe of making one of the best Mac n Cheese recipes that _I've_ ever tasted.** **_Dad's Mac'n Cheese Recipe:_ (Makes 2 half trays)

What you'll need:**
* _1 quart whole milk_
* _1 stick butter_
* _3 heaping tablespoons flour_
* _3 lbs cheddar cheese( 1⁄2 mild 1⁄2 sharp)_
* _3 teaspoons mustard_
* _Save 1⁄2 lb cheese for top_
* _2 boxes of elbow macaroni_

**What to do:**
* Begin cooking elbow pasta, simultaneously start the cheese sauce.
* Pour milk into a big pot on the stove on low-med heat (3.5). Stir in flour, butter, mustard, and slowly add cheese while stirring continuously, so it doesn't burn on the bottom of the pot.
* Drain and Pour cooked elbows into a flat pan. Pour cooked cheese sauce onto elbows and stir in the pan so it evenly spreads throughout.
* Sprinkle leftover cheese on top and cook for 1 hour at 325-350 F.

---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Investing in early childhood education (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788478/321413755/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJmYWM1Ny04MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKVu4-bBApzUO5clwiQg0K7bv14j1YgTYVHaNb36sMg=&emci=e755936f-5e5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4a2fac57-835f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, investing in early childhood education will pay off for children and families today — and for generations to come. The truth is that, right now, there’s not an even playing field. Far too many children start kindergarten behind their classmates. We can fix that with the right investments at the right time. That’s why — on top of the _Build Back Better Act_ ’s major investments in universal pre-K — I’m leading my New Mexico Democratic colleagues in introducing legislation to invest about $127 million each year into New Mexico’s early childhood education and $84.7 million into K-12 schools. **This would be a game changer for our economy, children, families, and future.** **We can make this happen with the approval of Congress now and New Mexico voters next year.** [**Will you help us get this process started by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of our early childhood education legislation? Every child deserves the opportunity to thrive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788479/321413757/-228703438?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJmYWM1Ny04MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKVu4-bBApzUO5clwiQg0K7bv14j1YgTYVHaNb36sMg=&emci=e755936f-5e5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4a2fac57-835f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045) | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788480/321413758/-228703438?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJmYWM1Ny04MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKVu4-bBApzUO5clwiQg0K7bv14j1YgTYVHaNb36sMg=&emci=e755936f-5e5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4a2fac57-835f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
By making these investments in early childhood education, we can create a more equitable education system and set more kids up for success.
Thank you for your support.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39788482/321413759/1737618405?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJmYWM1Ny04MzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKVu4-bBApzUO5clwiQg0K7bv14j1YgTYVHaNb36sMg=&emci=e755936f-5e5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4a2fac57-835f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045). name: Team AOC Year in Review
subject: Door to door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Talking to voters only when it's time to vote is not enough to win the change we need.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211217?refcode=em20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=2692_2526796_pU-f-B&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)
_Welcome to part one of our 2021 Year in Review email series highlighting some of our major accomplishments from the year._
As we get ready to wrap up 2021, we’re excited to highlight some of our movement’s major accomplishments from the year.
We can’t talk about this past year without talking about the climate and our work to move the needle forward on the Green New Deal. So that brings us to part one of this series focusing on our Green New Deal deep canvass program.
In order to win a Green New Deal, we know we need to organize and talk to people one-on-one about what it is, how it would impact them, and what they can do to help.
**So we decided to lead by example starting in our own district** and developed a program to train volunteers to phone bank, text bank, and canvas door-to-door to talk with voters about the Green New Deal and the proposed NRG fracked gas power plant planned in Astoria, Queens.*
_* NRG is a Texas based energy company whose current power plant in the district is so dirty that the state is forcing it to shut down by 2023. But the company wanted to replace it with a fracked gas plant that would continue to pollute our community and climate just the same — instead of with a renewable energy option._
>From January to October 2021, here’s what we accomplished:
* 619 volunteers trained in deep canvassing
* 68 door to door and phone bank events
* 162,225 phone calls
* 3,349 doors knocked
* _**Successfully stopped the NRG fracked gas power plant**_

Working with a coalition of local elected officials, community organizations, and activists, **the pressure from our campaigning resulted in the NY Department of Environmental Conservation denying the permit for the power plant in a huge victory** for our community and for environmental justice.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211217?refcode=em20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2692_2526796_pU-f-B&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)
After Hurricane Ida devastated our community, we pivoted and used our weekly canvasses to share FEMA resources while drawing connections to the climate crisis, extreme weather, and the Green New Deal. We texted over 200,000 people with FEMA relief info.
Our conversations with voters focused on deep canvass techniques of sharing personal stories and finding common ground – and we tracked our persuasion efforts by asking voters to rank their favorability towards the GND on a 10-point scale, once at the start of the conversation and again at the end.
We learned valuable lessons about the efficacy of phone vs. in-person communication with voters, what scripts were most effective at persuading constituents, and the need to create more bilingual resources about the Green New Deal.
**This was a big undertaking but a worthwhile one.** Most campaigns only organize around elections, but our campaign is different. **We know that talking to voters only when it's time to vote is not enough to win the change we need.** Transformative change and organizing isn’t just electoral.
It requires outside community organizing on and off election years. That is our path forward and that’s why we will continue to invest our resources into advocacy and deep organizing in 2022.
[If you’re able to pitch in today, your $3 – or anything you can – enables us to do this kind of transformational work, take on big polluters, and win. Chip in here » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211217?refcode=em20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2692_2526796_pU-f-B&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211217?refcode=em20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2692_2526796_pU-f-B&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)**
None of this would have been possible without your support and we’re so grateful for all of you.
Stay tuned for more highlights from 2021 to come.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211217?refcode=em20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=23&refcode2=2692_2526796_pU-f-B&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211217-2692-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=24&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2692%2E2526796%2EpU-f-B)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The whistleblower's letter that rocked Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Wait till you see this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1d74637f5c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the only Secretary of State Candidate who has fought for ballot protection measures and fraud-proof watermarking on ballots. And this is exactly what Arizona needs.

[**We are less than two weeks away from the end of the quarter, where we need to hit our critical fundraising deadline. We have just $37,800 left to raise by the end of the month.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c29e6bfbec&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Every donation counts! Can you support my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State with a donation of $50, $100, $250 or more today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=180fe7a020&e=44b8c466b0)

We are making tremendous end-of-year strides for election integrity. Just this last Monday, we held an election integrity hearing in Pima County, Arizona’s second-largest county.

**I made headlines by reading a disturbing letter from a Democrat Whistleblower in the hearing:**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e2bd0c6b69&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| An excerpt from this whistleblower’s letter reads:

_Please be advised the Pima County Recorder, located at 240 N. Stone Avenue in Tucson, Arizona, 85701 in Pima County, Arizona, and the Democrat Party added fraud votes. In the initial count of the vote by mail (VBM) totals released at 8 pm on November 3, 2020, There are approximately 35,000 fraud votes added to each Democrat candidates’ vote totals. Candidates impacted include County, State, and Federal Election candidates. Through the utilization of the automated ballot count machines in Pima County Elections, My understanding is that 35,000 was embedded into each Democrat candidates’ total votes. Below are the meeting notes._

35,000 votes! This is not only unacceptable, fraudulent, and criminal, but more than the margin of error!

**And this is exactly what we will dive into in our Pima County Audit.**

Additionally, new information was uncovered:

There were several locations noted with an obscenely high voter turnout. How his is obscene?

_Over 100%._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fed6219b54&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Sells, Arizona is just one of many locations where we saw the exact same thing. Mathematically impossible voter turnout numbers.

You don’t need to be a mathematician to know you can’t go over 100%, folks.
**What’s Next**
So here’s what we need to do next. We need to launch a full forensic audit of Pima County, Arizona.

**This will build up a huge body of evidence which we will then use to pressure AG Mark Brnovich’s office to do his job and lock up those responsible.**

_Then, we must make sure this never happens again. We do this by one, getting rid of the perpetrators of fraud in the first place and by two, installing safeguards such as watermarked ballots that cannot be counterfeited while also cleaning up the voter rolls._

**Yes, this sounds simple. But no, it is not easy. And this is why I must once again ask for your urgent support. We must raise an additional $37,800 by the end of this month to ensure that Election Integrity is protected.**

_These steps are crucial, but expensive._

**_[Please support whatever you can today, it is crucial we maximize our war chest by the end of this year.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f3240071b1&e=44b8c466b0) If we do not, we will be handing the Democrats an easy victory. We can’t let that happen!_**

[**_Donate as much as you can and we can once again make sure our elections are safe!_**

Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c1400a2b9c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=13907a16d6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1b0c6f3715&e=44b8c466b0)

body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

clean_body: | | | | | | | CRITICAL UPDATE: The Sisolak for Governor campaign is facing its first public fundraising deadline onFriday, December 31st at 11:59 pm. | | I’ll be honest, when Steve announced our $30,000 end-of-year fundraising goal yesterday, I was expecting a groundswell of support from this grassroots team. But after looking at our numbers this morning, I’ve gotta say, I’m disappointed. Right now, we still need to raise over $28,372 – and the deadline is fast-approaching.** I know that the $30,000 fundraising goal is ambitious,** | | ** Steve has been able to accomplish so much with the support of this team. Since taking office, he has: We wouldn’t have been able to accomplish all of that and more without you, and that’s why we need you to stick with us in this fight. This grassroots team is the backbone of Steve’s campaign, so I’m turning to you for help. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your help, Eva Black Finance Director Steve Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. clean_body: Did you miss them? | Peter, When you think of President Donald J. Trump, the first thing that comes to mind are his beautiful, amazing SAVE AMERICA RALLIES. No matter where he goes, thousands of America First Patriots line up to see their president speak the truth about the Democrats and the Fake News Media. Well guess what, Peter... \-- and President Trump needs your help to make them a success. We’re calling on YOU to step up to make sure he has the necessary funds to keep meeting with the American People. Will you do your part to help? Or have you given up? | | | | | | When President Trump holds his SAVE AMERICA RALLIES , people take notice. The press, the Democrats... EVERYONE stops to listen to what he has to say, and they know he means it. But without Grassroots Republican support, he can’t continue to hold rallies indefinitely. That’s why we’re asking you to chip in to help support Trump Rallies and elect Trump-Endorsed Republicans in must-win Battleground States. Thank you. Trump Rally Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

body:

name: John Fetterman
subject: An incomplete timeline of Dr. Oz’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority.
#
Derek,
It’s been just over two weeks since Dr. Oz announced his U.S. Senate campaign, and the case against him just keeps getting bigger.
**[If you’re all in for our people-powered campaign + ready to help defeat Dr. Oz, chip in what you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38624?refcode=em20211217-3870&t=1&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)** But if you need some more convincing, join me on a trip down memory lane...
**First,** Dr. Oz announced his campaign during an interview with Sean Hannity on FOX News, not with, you know, local Pennsylvania press.
**Then,** Dr. Oz wrote himself a check for a $2 million ad buy, kicking off what I’m sure will be *a lot* of self-funding for his campaign.
**Next,** he immediately began using the same scam tactics Trump used to defraud everyday individuals through unethical fundraising practices.
**Now,** a new GOP Super PAC is coming in to support Dr. Oz’s campaign that could spend nearly endless amounts of cash.
**Plus,** a new poll came out with our campaign ahead -- but only by two points. **That’s within the margin of error, Derek.**
This doesn’t even include the facts that Dr. Oz is a Trump administration appointee, a promoter of vaccine deniers, AND lives in New Jersey. 😭
Derek, let me cut to the chase: Together, we can compete with Dr. Oz + his super PAC, and win. But we need to keep building this grassroots movement to keep up.**
**[If you’re in a place to do so, please chip in $5 or any amount right now to keep up our campaign’s momentum. Let’s keep Dr. Oz running scared while we focus on securing a better future for Pennsylvanians and working families everywhere.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38624?refcode=em20211217-3870&t=2&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38624?refcode=em20211217-3870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)**
Derek, the determination, strength, and love we’ve received from all of you is what has helped our campaign stay ahead this early on in the race. Whether you can give today or not, I’m *incredibly* grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. With the millions of dollars Dr. Oz has already funneled into this race, we’re going to need hundreds of small-dollar donors to chip in what they can so we can keep up. **[No matter how much you can give today, can you please make a donation so our grassroots-powered campaign can keep up with Dr. Oz?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38624?refcode=em20211217-3870&t=22&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211217-3870-footer&t=23&refcode2=3870_434096_H9I95-&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3870%2E434096%2EH9I95-)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6682%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vXfKeOHpmaZV8Q2qu0TXYA&sysid=1)

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68907%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=St2KVORWZ6TX0qphsN32gA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68907%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=St2KVORWZ6TX0qphsN32gA&sysid=1)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68908%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RKOBL9%2b6TaI84yWku0s5eA&sysid=1)
---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68901%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cd3ilHEe0Sc118pPIrYfkQ&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68902%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GJ4hzHuQQfjwRHlnYpggdQ&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68903%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Jx1YyeX%2b1eE7BVO2Gg%2bRQ&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68904%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QP5eR3%2bpVx6o0WtKywaqkg&sysid=1)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68915%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IvukUoEjYQHTs5hscnxIbA&sysid=1)
---
Thank you,
---

name: Tedra Cobb
subject: average
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Peter,

We are leading the fight against unconstitutional vaccine mandates.

President Biden's three major vaccine mandates have been stopped by federal courts. **I promised I would fight these unconstitutional mandates; I have, and we are winning.**

Take a look at some of the news coverage on how we're leading the fight against Biden's vaccine mandates:

[ ](http://links.mcmasterevetteforsc.com/u/click?_t=36a1f7393ba74c01a69cdcd545869065&_m=cf9f6a2e9dc341b992dcf88a645eb4f1&_e=xCo4HfXivt9c8eFDcJhUSLbGM0fMA-3580_53t0u3dBuA8iXj9PdHpoxrBEZlP12Lk_slbJMLOnBAKfJ5WGuk0wu4MCfSN0CG4CCsbRt4db6TL_HFgJONUjB6PCx6v4_OvlTruPAv537RlD8iWwY_5XlcuSRFclddoYY2hYyOVlU4iNDQAxykowG1nFoHROanjISr_zNUdu_OKfbaI4t1GxN6Z3-KUpEfyuehl9jELhCwbnbVTlh-lvJaXPFIusIkgdrS689dSdLj8IMsWUtJ-5SQdPRTsqfXvvfJcZbt-loFUswl4tkR786Vtb9zy44rmDtkoW1lF1DyBrf5kd1c4wgqVdGKI6z2LYdiuo0c0_48TuFU--PanWNgpG2cVbu3H8XTsppd8EqqUpvIFKhtK12JrJlnIZuR_ll0oaGIIf8imgp07Ql23bIw574NvU2Yvq_yehp6s-jjdUGgW7isNXZW4o9mp9n-CceMOWZwQ5-dlCP7pqxIo8bwUekZgk0EerYGNWH6Fj8gtvKwh9LKEYPBJCgezXwL479_lhNCF06UuaxTOf9DI7sLg2P6aaL5ZBmNrNaw6iSVMmDtVN2dfWtJixPeZngFV3HxrHe-StN1RlwVxtZKTJP77r1D0Oc)

We promised we were going to fight unconstitutional vaccine mandates. **And we did._We won all three._**

I think a lot of people have very good reasons to get a vaccine and very good reasons not to be vaccinated. Putting mandates on our people is disruptive and counterproductive. **[Peter, do you agree?](http://links.mcmasterevetteforsc.com/u/click?_t=36a1f7393ba74c01a69cdcd545869065&_m=cf9f6a2e9dc341b992dcf88a645eb4f1&_e=xCo4HfXivt9c8eFDcJhUSLbGM0fMA-3580_53t0u3dBuA8iXj9PdHpoxrBEZlP12Lk_slbJMLOnBAKfJ5WGuk0wu4MCfSN0CG4CCsbRt4db6TL_HFgJONUjB6PCx6v4_OvlTruPAv537RlD8iWwY_5XlcuSRFclddoYY2hYyOVlU4iNDQAxykowG1nFoHROanjISr_zNUdu_OKfbaI4t1GxN6Z3-KUpEfyuehl9jELhCwbnbVTlh-lvJaXPFIusIkgdrS689dSdLj8IMsWUtJ-5SQdPRTsqfXvvfJcZbt-loFUswl4tkR786Vtb9zy44rmDtkoW1lF1DyBrf5kd1c4wgqVdGKI6z2LYdiuo0c0_48TuFU--PanWNgpG2cVbu3H8XTsppd8EqqUpvIFKhtGFQTcJqOBGeJIvLrRbrmsLzk1y0u1gSlG5SOORAVrR2kqjR5F3wx_vAH77dR0y36vdhJ3Wl9OA45aWtc97jLZHWVsPwZ0cWXunvBYOQgZz2ABl0-e9M2vJhCjkbU3IO7zpdXg8XWLOgjRaGRyIYHJjzyMphLPwhGD7G7zc1oo0PfSAlOvL1rXicbgxrGxoH0JcfZ1eAO_Y-27jX9FAMdXi_90SW7MlLTnUYaEYyHQJw)**

I've made it clear how I feel, but I also want to hear from you. **[Please send in your response today!](http://links.mcmasterevetteforsc.com/u/click?_t=36a1f7393ba74c01a69cdcd545869065&_m=cf9f6a2e9dc341b992dcf88a645eb4f1&_e=xCo4HfXivt9c8eFDcJhUSLbGM0fMA-3580_53t0u3dBuA8iXj9PdHpoxrBEZlP12Lk_slbJMLOnBAKfJ5WGuk0wu4MCfSN0CG4CCsbRt4db6TL_HFgJONUjB6PCx6v4_OvlTruPAv537RlD8iWwY_5XlcuSRFclddoYY2hYyOVlU4iNDQAxykowG1nFoHROanjISr_zNUdu_OKfbaI4t1GxN6Z3-KUpEfyuehl9jELhCwbnbVTlh-lvJaXPFIusIkgdrS689dSdLj8IMsWUtJ-5SQdPRTsqfXvvfJcZbt-loFUswl4tkR786Vtb9zy44rmDtkoW1lF1DyBrf5kd1c4wgqVdGKI6z2LYdiuo0c0_48TuFU--PanWNgpG2cVbu3H8XTsppd8EqqUpvIFKhtL7gkRuLB5aS4h8Z75xpoU592QoOSj64OcUf7bYAXEdnurix6EYFfW7K6ztAPn64A2W73o1xELOEiiljntQFHmA7latMYscHEHnaIZz0BFJ9kQirbCG-wqmx4k9-EewPKpns3P4veUyKCJkCatT1fytkYCHuGUxS1Jf3_boVnvqp0ScJC4iVj7gV8hczcwMiT6HBxmtcbGssL17OnBmgELFDW14RQc6hXS7UalCtAGQM)**

Yours very truly,

subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze7496i1q4tpqj7cm7f0fqmknr8utuie04mhiikg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stge0oj1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1lqhe4as3unjm50ev15b3tn7jh0s2jt0o07u0p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stge0oj1c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z275c06gukpf9gi1pur9j33rcmsu2tdl08u3re3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4stge0oj1c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844 | This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. subject: Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly in his campaign to win re-election in Arizona? Help us get to 50,000 signers before the end of the weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Beating Mark Kelly is their top priority in 2022, and they are organizing everywhere to get it done.
#

More than 35,000 people have added their names as personal endorsers of Mark Kelly’s re-election. We’re hoping to get to 50,000 by the end of the weekend. Can you add your name today?
**[Please add your name to endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211217-1-reac-5&refcode2=1817.6688874.siEBNt&t=1&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211217-1-reac-5&refcode2=1817.6688874.siEBNt&t=2&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt)**
Friends —
In this campaign, we are taking on 5 Republican candidates, millions of dollars in outside spending, and President Trump who said: “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
Beating Mark Kelly is their top priority in 2022, and they are organizing everywhere to get it done.
But so are we. And the first step in that process is getting AS MANY PEOPLE AS POSSIBLE to say they stand with Mark Kelly.
So we’re building a list of personal endorsers, and would love to get your name on the list:
[**Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly in his campaign to win re-election in Arizona? Help us get to 50,000 signers before the end of the weekend.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211217-1-reac-5&refcode2=1817.6688874.siEBNt&t=3&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211217-1-reac-5&refcode2=1817.6688874.siEBNt&t=4&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt)**
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Mark can make a big difference. So thank you in advance for doing it today.
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-dec/?source=em211217-1-reac-5&refcode2=1817.6688874.siEBNt&t=5&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1817%2E6688874%2EsiEBNt).

name: Secretary John King
subject: Join me in supporting this critical piece of legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Join me in supporting this critical piece of legislation to preserve the truth about Black history.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790135/321420611/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211217-1-EM&refcode2=f013b904-8b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrfB3Il1eDrNT8_nR9oDgUVJ8OUCLmB-Dh0xk7Fg2sI=)
---
| Peter,

A new bill, the _African American History Act_ , which invests $10 million over 5 years in the National Museum of African American History, was recently introduced in Congress. As an educator, I know African American history education programs are essential to our understanding of this country, and**I’m proud to support the cause of this bill.[_Will you join me in supporting it by adding your name today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790136/321420612/532726485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrfB3Il1eDrNT8_nR9oDgUVJ8OUCLmB-Dh0xk7Fg2sI=&emci=1c39c2ba-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f013b904-8b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635484)**
---
| [ADD MY NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790137/321420613/532726485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrfB3Il1eDrNT8_nR9oDgUVJ8OUCLmB-Dh0xk7Fg2sI=&emci=1c39c2ba-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f013b904-8b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635484)
---
I also know the scope of this bill extends far beyond the classroom, as our country’s complicated history of oppression is intertwined with the inequity and opportunity gaps we face as a nation today. **As a Black Marylander and the descendant of enslaved people, I feel deeply that we must grapple with the hard truths of our past in order to put in the hard work to build a stronger future.**

**Here’s what else I know: far-right Republicans are trying to erase my family’s history and so many other stories like it.** GOP leaders like Florida Governor Ron DeSantis are corrupting the teachings of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. by twisting his words to push a white-washed version of history. But I know the teachings of Dr. King bolster our cause. After all, it was he who said **“The day we see the truth and cease to speak is the day we begin to die.”**

Our students deserve to know the truth so they can make a better tomorrow, and it’s imperative we preserve, promote, and prioritize teaching our country’s story and tell the truth about Black history. **If we all remain committed to advancing justice, I know that in Maryland and nationwide, we can achieve a more equitable future.**

[_**So, please, join me in supporting this critical piece of legislation and in our fight to promote equity at every level.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790138/321420614/532726485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrfB3Il1eDrNT8_nR9oDgUVJ8OUCLmB-Dh0xk7Fg2sI=&emci=1c39c2ba-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f013b904-8b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635484)

clean_body: Join me in supporting this critical piece of legislation to preserve the truth about Black history. | = | Peter, A new bill, the African American History Act , which invests $10 million over 5 years in the National Museum of African American History, was recently introduced in Congress. As an educator, I know African American history education programs are essential to our understanding of this country, andI’m proud to support the cause of this bill. | I also know the scope of this bill extends far beyond the classroom, as our country’s complicated history of oppression is intertwined with the inequity and opportunity gaps we face as a nation today. As a Black Marylander and the descendant of enslaved people, I feel deeply that we must grapple with the hard truths of our past in order to put in the hard work to build a stronger future. Here’s what else I know: far-right Republicans are trying to erase my family’s history and so many other stories like it. GOP leaders like Florida Governor Ron DeSantis are corrupting the teachings of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. by twisting his words to push a white-washed version of history. But I know the teachings of Dr. King bolster our cause. After all, it was he who said “The day we see the truth and cease to speak is the day we begin to die.” Our students deserve to know the truth so they can make a better tomorrow, and it’s imperative we preserve, promote, and prioritize teaching our country’s story and tell the truth about Black history. If we all remain committed to advancing justice, I know that in Maryland and nationwide, we can achieve a more equitable future. | Thank you, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Donald J. Trump December 16th, 2021

Whenever I go to Michigan, I get the biggest crowds and meet some of the best people. Mike Hoadley is a mayor, father, husband, and an Army Veteran. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: Reckless and ineffective -- Marjorie Taylor Greene is wasting our seat in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
In the last 24 hours, Marjorie Taylor Greene has been on a right-wing Twitter tirade. First, she called on D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser to fire the deputy warden of the jail where the January 6th traitors are being held because she’s not a Trump supporter.

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790209/321420691/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIZ7sWQ8ZrXFU2YLYE_9gf99NvciuHnC5qZclCbA76M=)** Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. I don’t like checking Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Twitter feed because it’s depressing. It’s clear she has no interest in solving problems for the people of northwest Georgia. All she’s doing is posting reckless statements calling Democrats “communists” and purveying the ‘Big Lie.’ **She almost never mentions policy -- or shares ideas about what she wants to do to improve the lives of her constituents. ** **I’m running for Congress because I care about public service -- it’s what I’ve done my whole life. And I genuinely care about making things better in Georgia’s 14th district.[But to make these things happen, I need your help. So I have to ask: Will you donate $20 or more to my campaign to help us grow and defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790210/321420692/-1217423743?refcode=20211217_mf_recklessFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzEzYjkwNC04YjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIZ7sWQ8ZrXFU2YLYE_9gf99NvciuHnC5qZclCbA76M=)** **\-----Begin forwarded message-----**
From: Defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: FWD: Reckless and ineffective -- Marjorie Taylor Greene is wasting our seat in Congress Team, In the last 24 hours, Marjorie Taylor Greene has been on a right-wing Twitter tirade. First, she called on D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser to fire the deputy warden of the jail where the January 6th traitors are being held because she’s not a Trump supporter. Then, she called for the removal of Adam Schiff from Congress -- and called for Republicans Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney to be forcibly removed from the GOP conference because they are “participating in a huge lying witch hunt” for refusing to accept Donald Trump’s ‘Big Lie.’ Finally, she called Senator Richard Blumenthal (and all Democrats) “Communists” and claimed that Joe Biden had caused a “national security crisis” on our southern border. **It’s obvious that her rantings and ravings are unbecoming of a U.S. Congresswoman. Mayor Muriel Bowser to fire the deputy warden of the jail where the January 6th traitors are being held because she’s not a Trump supporter. = Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. I don’t like checking Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Twitter feed because it’s depressing. It’s clear she has no interest in solving problems for the people of northwest Georgia. All she’s doing is posting reckless statements calling Democrats “communists” and purveying the ‘Big Lie.’ She almost never mentions policy -- or shares ideas about what she wants to do to improve the lives of her constituents. I’m running for Congress because I care about public service -- it’s what I’ve done my whole life. And I genuinely care about making things better in Georgia’s 14th district.= \-----Begin forwarded message----- From: Defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene <info@marcusforgeorgia.com> Subject: FWD: Reckless and ineffective -- Marjorie Taylor Greene is wasting our seat in Congress Team, In the last 24 hours, Marjorie Taylor Greene has been on a right-wing Twitter tirade. First, she called on D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser to fire the deputy warden of the jail where the January 6th traitors are being held because she’s not a Trump supporter. Then, she called for the removal of Adam Schiff from Congress -- and called for Republicans Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney to be forcibly removed from the GOP conference because they are “participating in a huge lying witch hunt” for refusing to accept Donald Trump’s ‘Big Lie.’ Finally, she called Senator Richard Blumenthal (and all Democrats) “Communists” and claimed that Joe Biden had caused a “national security crisis” on our southern border. It’s obvious that her rantings and ravings are unbecoming of a U.S. Congresswoman. And the people of Georgia deserve so much better than a Fox News Twitter personality representing them. = | = Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Twitter comments are not just reckless and dangerous, they’re also ineffective. | | The Supreme Court appears to be poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , nearly five decades after it became the law of the land. **If Roe is overturned, millions of people across the country will lose access to reproductive health care.** I know you are as angry as I am. Reproductive freedoms are a basic human right. They should not be vulnerable to attacks by a court stacked by Donald Trump and his right-wing allies. The House has already passed a law protecting the right to safe and legal abortions–now the Senate needs to act. [**Sign the petition to demand that the Senate pass a law to protect everyone's reproductive rights**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790304/321421064/463902670?contactdata=s95DNuqjALnRc7SIq7ouubGOiya8kyKe65%2FZUzxqR9l8KPj5TQy6DDaIcwXIOF7OaXt6v%2FF7KPU6yfELvjatBbB%2FjhgsS0gmf1nUzfjBo3MBwTpurqOLzg1QqSoCp7QjR6katHmtHXGeTcL%2F7U%2B7Eg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM2ZmYwMi04YzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFhR_SYf43abQrjwnqgUc1YzkLeJHAmgTC55AQTJJVE=&emci=f535aaf9-d15e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a736ff02-8c5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643047) I've worked on the frontlines of this fight for many years, fighting for more accessible, affordable quality health care in Oregon, including passing the nation's most progressive reproductive health care policy that ensures that anyone in Oregon who needs an abortion can access one. That means that if the Supreme Court acts next year to overturn _Roe_ , Oregonians will still have their rights. Unfortunately, not everywhere is like Oregon. Even now, not all folks enjoy the same rights. If _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, millions will be impacted. **It shouldn't matter if you live in a red or a blue state, abortion should be accessible to all.** It shouldn't matter if you have a Democratic Governor or a Republican Governor, abortion should be accessible to all. It shouldn't matter if you can afford to fly across the country to get health care; abortion should be accessible to all. The Senate can expand reproductive freedoms for all by passing a law to protect them. **[Sign the petition to urge the Senate to pass this crucial law and defend reproductive freedoms for subject: fw: catastrophic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
I’ll jump right to the point.
| Peter, I apologize for the hasty email from my phone, but we’re alarmingly close to MISSING the final mid-month deadline of 2021.
---
**_As things stand, we need to raise another $8,880 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to hit our goal._**
---
That means we only have a few short hours left, Peter. I need you to step up and help me show Pelosi that my seat -- and the House majority -- can’t be bought.
---

clean_body: I’ll jump right to the point. | Peter, I apologize for the hasty email from my phone, but we’re alarmingly close to MISSING the final mid-month deadline of 2021. As things stand, we need to raise another $8,880 by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to hit our goal. That means we only have a few short hours left, Peter. I need you to step up and help me show Pelosi that my seat -- and the House majority -- can’t be bought. If we come up short at this pivotal moment, it would be catastrophic for my re-election chances in November. Thank you for your support! \- María Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Wed, Dec 15, 2021 Subject: Final Deadline To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, I’ve got good news and bad news to share with you. First, the good: A new poll just showed that conservatives now have a historic lead in the battle for control of the House, with a 10-point advantage over Pelosi and the Democrats. But now, the bad: My grassroots campaign is still $16,325 behind our final mid-month goal for 2021 -- and if we lose this seat, we’ll lose our shot at FLIPPING the majority. I’m counting on my biggest supporters like YOU to come through for me so that doesn’t happen. Nancy Pelosi is watching our fundraising numbers closely, Peter. She’s already run lying attack ads against me -- and if we come up short, she’ll see it as a sign of weakness and launch a fresh barrage of attacks against us. But if we hit this target and stay on budget, I’m confident we can build an insurmountable lead that Pelosi won’t be able to overcome, no matter how much she spends. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

clean_body: Hello, I’ll cut straight to it: For the first time ever, we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal, and now we’re at risk of missing it again. The latest polling from the highly-respected Des Moines Register shows that we can absolutely turn Iowa blue next November: Only 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Chuck Grassley. We can end Chuck Grassley’s 46-year career supporting himself and his donors in Washington. We can expand our Democratic majority in the Senate. And we can protect the future of our very democracy – but only if we hit this goal now. We cannot afford to miss this goal and fall short again right now, but with less than 7 hours until our extended midnight deadline, we’re still over $1,205 short. It’s hard to overstate how serious of a setback it would be if we miss this goal again. We could put our Democratic majority in the Senate at risk. So if I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now before midnight tonight: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I wouldn’t ask or write this urgently if it weren’t truly important. If you’re financially able to make a contribution today, of any amount, it would go a long way toward helping us hit this goal. Thank you so much for being a part of my campaign, Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) body:
The general election in North Carolina’s Senate race starts now for Democrats.
#

**The general election in North Carolina’s Senate race starts now for Democrats.**
**[Will you please donate $3 or any amount you can to help us send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? This is a critical moment for us to unite and show that we have what it takes to flip North Carolina and expand our Senate majority!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211217-1-a1&refcode2=142.357359.9Df5_j&t=1&akid=142%2E357359%2E9Df5_j)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211217-1-a1&refcode2=142.357359.9Df5_j&t=2&akid=142%2E357359%2E9Df5_j)**
Your support has never been more important than it is today. Here’s why:
**Democrats have united around Cheri Beasley in the North Carolina Senate Race!** We’re grateful to our opponents who understood the stakes of this race and ended their own campaigns to endorse Cheri.
So that means it’s the general election from here on out, and the truth is there are few races as important or competitive as this one in 2022.
Cook Political has named North Carolina as one of only a handful of toss-up races that could decide the Senate majority, and it’s been rated just this morning by CNN as one of the Senate seats “most likely to flip” in 2022.
But we need all hands on deck right now to make sure we have the resources necessary to win.

Your support has never been more important than it is today. Here’s why: Democrats have united around Cheri Beasley in the North Carolina Senate Race! So that means it’s the general election from here on out, and the truth is there are few races as important or competitive as this one in 2022. Cook Political has named North Carolina as one of only a handful of toss-up races that could decide the Senate majority, and it’s been rated just this morning by CNN as one of the Senate seats “most likely to flip” in 2022. name: Adam Schiff
subject: My friend Abby asked me to reach out to you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I need your support to defeat Chuck Grassley in Iowa
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790889/321423850/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=)
Hey Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. My friend Abby asked me to reach out because this moment is critical: Donald Trump recently rallied with and endorsed Abby’s opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I want to be respectful of your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase. We need Abby Finkenauer in the U.S. Senate.
Over the past few years, we’ve learned that our democracy is fragile. In the aftermath of Donald Trump and his Big Lie, it’s more important now than ever to protect it. We need champions for our democracy in the Senate – **and with Abby Finkenauer, Iowans would gain a true public servant in the U.S. Senate. I saw firsthand just how hard she fought for Iowa's working families and our democracy during her time in Congress. And in the U.S. Senate, she’ll continue that fight.**
**[Abby’s Senate campaign is gaining momentum, and she needs to make a big statement before the most important FEC reporting deadline of the year. I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between our campaigns right now? We must elect Abby to the Senate and hold on to our Democratic majorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790890/321423851/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790891/321423852/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=)
---
When I served with Abby in the House, I knew from the very start she was there for the right reasons: To do the hard work. The critical work. The kind of work that makes a difference.
It may not earn headlines – but it improves the lives of the people we represent. It has become rarer and rarer to see these days, but for Abby, public service is personal. She was raised in a working-class family. The fight is in her blood. And she would do anything and everything to better the lives of her community.
As for the current Iowa senator, Chuck Grassley, it’s a different story. He's held this seat in the Senate for more than 40 years. And showing up for Iowa's working families seems to be a thing of his past. He's actively working against affordable health care and empowering unions – the sort of things that would improve the lives of so many in Iowa and across the country. Worse still, he's helped propagate Donald Trump's lies and encouraged dangerous voter suppression laws, and he has done Mitch McConnell’s bidding for much of his career.
**Our best hope for a better Iowa, and for a Democratic Senate, is Abby Finkenauer.** But it won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell doesn’t want to lose Grassley. His super PACs have nearly limitless resources to keep this seat red. And their work to take down Abby has already begun. **That's why I need you to make a critical donation****ahead of the last FEC fundraising deadline of the year.**
**[Peter, will you split a contribution of $5 or more right now to our campaigns? We must ensure Abby can defeat Sen. Grassley and keep our razor-thin majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790892/321423853/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=)**
I’m grateful for your support. Your continued fight for the truth. And for our democracy. Let's win in Iowa. Let’s elect Abby.

– Adam Schiff
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790893/321423854/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39790894/321423855/496662621?refcode=jtk457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzNiY2FjZS04ZDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lhagSGXunGGBvDzTJ3EEJjx5jOEpXVgJeVjT80_JQo=&emci=96f34e1b-fc5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a33bcace-8d5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13784334#!).

body:
Will you join Trump on his NEW social site?
& nbsp; &nb; sp;

| | | Unless 97% of patriots accept Trump's friend request right now, his social site WILL FAIL. Please accept Trump's friend request NOW or ABANDON HIM, Fellow Conservative.

---

* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33fq6-1ptmv-4qqlpo0/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

body:
Democratic experts are concerned about an even closer match in 2022.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791440/321425632/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5MjliZi05MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAp2ph6SA9sT76TpDlBzA3wl2diRuSMMxWAozVdpOHA=)

| Peter,

Susan won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020 — and Democratic experts are concerned about an even closer match in 2022. [_**We absolutely can’t take any chances, which is why we’re counting on you to rush a contribution to Susan’s re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791441/321425633/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5MjliZi05MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAp2ph6SA9sT76TpDlBzA3wl2diRuSMMxWAozVdpOHA=)

**Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball has already rated our district as a toss-up.** That means that if the election were held today, Susan would only have a 50/50 chance of defeating her far-right extremist opponent.

It’s not just the folks of the greater Lehigh Valley who are counting on Susan as a strong advocate on crucial issues like health care, infrastructure, and good jobs. If we lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding the House majority — and that means losing all the progress we’ve worked so hard for.

**The stakes are too high.[_Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare right away to ensure Susan has the resources to stay in Congress fighting for American families and workers?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791443/321425635/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211217-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk5MjliZi05MDVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAp2ph6SA9sT76TpDlBzA3wl2diRuSMMxWAozVdpOHA=)**

clean_body: Democratic experts are concerned about an even closer match in 2022. | = | Peter, Susan won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020 — and Democratic experts are concerned about an even closer match in 2022. = | = Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball has already rated our district as a toss-up. That means that if the election were held today, Susan would only have a 50/50 chance of defeating her far-right extremist opponent. It’s not just the folks of the greater Lehigh Valley who are counting on Susan as a strong advocate on crucial issues like health care, infrastructure, and good jobs. If we lose here, Democrats have no chance of holding the House majority — and that means losing all the progress we’ve worked so hard for. subject: Max on the trail [PHOTOS]
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782198/321383268/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)
Friend,

I wanted to take this opportunity to wish you happy holidays. I hope you have the opportunity to spend time with friends and family this month.

**We're just a few weeks from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline and it's been a packed few months on the campaign trail.**

For starters, we're getting a better look at what new lines will look like in CA-01. While we're still waiting on the final ones, it looks like we will have tons of new voters to communicate with.

We're continuing our outreach efforts _(which you can see below!)_ and letting voters know about the NO vote LaMalfa took against new roads, bridges, waterways, broadband access, and fire protection for our community.

**I'm confident we are well on our way to winning this race, and if you have any questions about the photos below, please feel free to respond to this email directly. I read all your responses.**

Max

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782199/321383269/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)**
---

* * *

This month, we got out in the district to talk directly to voters about the campaign. We tabled in Chico, Redding, and Anderson and had the opportunity to meet constituents and talk about issues critical to our community. Max isn't afraid to have tough conversations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782200/321383270/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)

We joined Service Employees International Local 2015 as they kicked off their campaign for in-home supportive service workers in Shasta County. I was able to meet a ton of the workers and LaMalfa's constituents and hear about the issues facing working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782201/321383271/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)

Had a great time at the Fort Jones annual Christmas parade, pancake breakfast, and craft fair. The best way to convince voters you care about their issues is to show up, and listen to them talk.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782202/321383272/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)

Had a blast tabling at CSU Chico in front of the new science building. Loved meeting with students and campus staff to discuss my campaign. Special shout-out to the Chico State Democratic club and our campus organizer Holley for helping put it together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782203/321383273/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)
[**As you can see, we've been incredibly active on the campaign trail reaching Democrats and undecided voters across the North State. Doing so takes time and money, which is why we're asking you to chip in $3 to help us close out the $12,123 gap on our end-of-week goal. Thanks in advance for your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39782204/321383274/-209993060?refcode=em-121721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmE0MzQwNi02NzVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2vlH6F5x1iLqpHQYhwaMcLuvBNgukeQwlR-SDrDMfI=)

_Peter, America is rallying around a new cause_ – legislation I introduced in Congress to**_shorten the workweek_ to prioritize well-being, dignity, and rest for America’s working families. **

Check out the growing momentum! **Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 17th, 2021**
Peter,
This week, Tom was proud to announce an endorsement from Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Speaker Pelosi is a transformational leader and native Marylander who cares deeply about the future of our state, and it is an incredible honor to have her support.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791608/321426301/-1322065059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlN2VmZC05MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnnstZaoyX0pc5SP8WGwindFbohYFfrRnP42NIc19NM=&emci=11a0f619-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=298e7efd-915f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)

* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791613/321426307/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlN2VmZC05MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnnstZaoyX0pc5SP8WGwindFbohYFfrRnP42NIc19NM=&emci=11a0f619-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=298e7efd-915f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom kicked off last weekend with Howard County Democrats and leaders at their Annual Holiday Party and food drive hosted by the Columbia Democratic Club, the Ellicott City and Western Howard Democratic Club, and HoCo Young Democrats. Howard County Dems have done tremendous work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in the county. It was a pleasure to join them for their annual holiday party to celebrate all their accomplishments this year!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791614/321426308/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlN2VmZC05MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnnstZaoyX0pc5SP8WGwindFbohYFfrRnP42NIc19NM=&emci=11a0f619-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=298e7efd-915f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
On Wednesday, Tom joined Democrats from Washington County to listen to what they want to see in their next Governor of Maryland. Tom understands it is important to hear from people in every corner of our state, and as Governor he will be a partner in Annapolis for all. Thank you to Randy Barber, and the United Democrats of Washington County for allowing Tom to join you for such important conversations!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791615/321426309/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOThlN2VmZC05MTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnnstZaoyX0pc5SP8WGwindFbohYFfrRnP42NIc19NM=&emci=11a0f619-895f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=298e7efd-915f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Thursday evening Tom joined leaders in Prince George’s County for a fundraiser in support of Senator Joanne C. Benson. Senator Benson is a civil rights leader, educator, and tireless advocate for all Prince George's County residents. We are proud to have her on **#TeamTom**.
