clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, December 17th, 2021 Peter, This week, Tom was proud to announce an endorsement from Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Speaker Pelosi is a transformational leader and native Marylander who cares deeply about the future of our state, and it is an incredible honor to have her support. You can read more about Speaker Pelosi’s endorsement in the , , and and watch the announcement video . Thank you so much for your continued support of Tom Perez for Maryland. As we continue to build powerful momentum in our campaign, we understand that this would not be possible without supporters like you. Best, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off last weekend with Howard County Democrats and leaders at their Annual Holiday Party and food drive hosted by the Columbia Democratic Club, the Ellicott City and Western Howard Democratic Club, and HoCo Young Democrats. Howard County Dems have done tremendous work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in the county. It was a pleasure to join them for their annual holiday party to celebrate all their accomplishments this year! On Wednesday, Tom joined Democrats from Washington County to listen to what they want to see in their next Governor of Maryland. Tom understands it is important to hear from people in every corner of our state, and as Governor he will be a partner in Annapolis for all. Thank you to Randy Barber, and the United Democrats of Washington County for allowing Tom to join you for such important conversations! Thursday evening Tom joined leaders in Prince George’s County for a fundraiser in support of Senator Joanne C. Benson. Senator Benson is a civil rights leader, educator, and tireless advocate for all Prince George's County residents. We are proud to have her on #TeamTom. Volunteer with us! Join #TeamTom for a rally and sign wave ahead of the Burgers and Brews Forum hosted by the Maryland Democratic Party Wednesday, January 5th, 2021 | 5:30 PM - 7:00 PM Attaboy Barrel House 24 S Wisner St, Suite 110, Frederick, MD 21701 In The News “Perez, however, who lives in Takoma Park, drew enthusiastic applause when he said he wants to extend health care to the 350,000 Marylanders who are uninsured and overrepresented when it comes to COVID-related deaths in the state.” ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . Team Tom Schedule of Upcoming Events ** Saturday, December 18 | 5:00 PM Montgomery County, MD Hosted by Ambassador Osman Siddique and Anis Ahmed Tuesday, December 21 | 5:30 PM Virtual Hosted by Paulette Aniskoff, Xochitl Hinojosa, Joel Rubin, and Clayton Cox & Rachel Rauscher, Steve Dettelbach, and Paul Fishman Wednesday, January 5 | 4:00 PM Virtual Hosted by Emilio Cividanes, Gregory Gill, Warren Hamel, Peter Kiernan, Jeffrey Kurzweil, and Kenneth Roberts, Jonathan Smith, and Ann Marie Staudenmaier Sunday, January 9 | 2:30 PM Frederick, MD Hosted by Tom Slater, Melanie Galloway, Dr. Syed Haque, Dr. Shahid Rafiq, and Marcie Roth Monday, January 10 | 5:30 PM Virtual Hosted by Carole Brand, Barbara Goldberg Goldman, Corrine Parver, Carol Pensky, Catherine Leggett, Claire Lucas, Betsy Williams, Diane Robertson, Regina Montoya UFCW Local 1994 MCGEO, and Brice & Houston Barnes Saturday, January 15 | 3:30 PM Bethesda, MD Hosted by George Cohen Wednesday, January 19 | 6:00 PM The Home of Jim Lyons Annapolis, MD Hosted by Jim Lyons, Warren Hamel, John Griffin, and Fred & Eileen Hoover_ Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. | | | Team, **** This holiday season we are running a toy drive for families in need around MD-05.
We have collection boxes at four locations: Ethnicities LLC at 15525 Emerald Way, Bowie, MD 20716 New Deal Cafe at 113 Centerway, Greenbelt, MD 20770 Both locations of Legacy Carryout: 10909C Livingston Rd, Fort Washington, MD 20744 and 3645 Leonardtown Rd, Waldorf, MD 20602

---
Peter,

The other day, I appeared on “The View” to talk about desperately needed gun control across the country. This July, New York passed our own law that allows state and localities to sue the firearm manufacturers and sellers for bad conduct – and the gun lobby is _enraged_ _._

Now, a handful of days after, we were reminded of the carnage and devastation of the gun violence epidemic on the ninth anniversary of the Sandy Hook tragedy – a group of gun manufacturers and sellers sued New York to challenge our commonsense law to protect the lives of our people. **Even in the face of a tragedy that the gun lobby contributed to, they are still fighting to maintain the status quo.**

Gun manufacturing and distribution is a uniquely protected industry in this country, and _it's high time we hold the gun lobby liable_ for the consequences of their actions. They know that together, we can and will hold them accountable for all the harm they have caused, and now, they’re scared.

I'm committed to protecting New Yorkers and people across the country from the devastating epidemic of gun violence. That means that I’m upholding New York’s law to hold firearm manufacturers and sellers accountable, taking similar steps to curb the distribution of these dangerous weapons, and urging the federal government to enact a ban on assault weapons.
**[But I want to know if you’re with me in this fight to vigorously defend our commonsense laws. That’s why I'm looking for 1,500 people by midnight to let us know if they agree that we should hold gun manufacturers and sellers accountable. Will you stand with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792257/321430867/-546675118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk284-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_7VSP6BsW3zXwQkRcKdhpX4VWcS47VdLeDcJqm2eHaA=&emci=c0feb4d1-3e5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1b22ce31-965f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)**

name: Bruno Amato
subject: Why I joined this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eI9gYOiWZ11_C8cZuwpTtLESLTBKUL2taq4fjQkYy9pwq_BWzNJB-zoUuFdM4-CA11C13vxunc6d1TeY42I8S8BRQyTJbp-blmFWfOyrDsLktnDA62uLJJnxyQzQkBFTc-xcqLa8OpmSS5TrkkaeaW60-TKCrB9IFW4mJiuMFQ7ezhHYFpLJUUlKWO78OSq-alsph-wKXCcmsMGVe6esibc/3hx/2rwNuAZxRWCt-P7ZuZNCaw/h0/WgoJJ_VOrhjY8JWA6T9V7cZR5Inp-Z7n2yeGh3_lq0M)
---
I never wanted to be a politician. I never thought I would be a politician. But when guys like Kevin McCarthy are lying to people every day, it starts to tick you off. When I announced my intentions to run against him, I knew it would be an uphill battle. But the people of the Central Valley deserve better than Kevin McCarthy. | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m tired of Democrats, and even weak Republicans like my RINO Primary Opponent making excuses for violent Antifa and Black Lives Matter thugs. [_So I’m standing up for the truth_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f1aa642956&e=af4b86f5c6)[ _._](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=5efad4bc8a&e=af4b86f5c6) How are Republicans responsible for “institutional racism” when Democrats control ALL of the institutions? _They can’t be._ The truth is, **[Democrats are the Real Racists](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ec4726c065&e=af4b86f5c6)**.

All of the civil unrest, all of the rioting, all of the looting, all of the burning -- it’s all a product the bogus lie told over and over again by the far-left Mainstream Media -- that white Republicans are “racists.” [When I’m in Congress, the media and the lawless political left will be held accountable for what they’re doing, and I need your help today to make that happen.](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b5d3fa8249&e=af4b86f5c6) [**With just 15 days until the end of the Quarter, I’m asking you to contribute to my campaign right away, and send a Black Conservative to Congress to address the lies that are DESTROYING American life as we know it.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=541879c50d&e=af4b86f5c6) It’s time to destroy the false narrative peddled by the far-left media. It’s time for someone to stand up and tell the truth. _That person is me, but I’m running out of time._ [**In these critical 15 days, I’m asking you to chip in $50, $75 $100, $250, or anything you can to my campaign right away, and help me finish strong in this heated race to Take Back Congress for Conservatives.**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9c58906d04&e=af4b86f5c6) Thank you in advance for your generosity. Respectfully,
******Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District **P.S.** [**I will stand up for YOU during these trying times under Democrat Tyranny, but I need your help today to make that happen!**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a1a8a4a030&e=af4b86f5c6) I only have 15 days to keep blitzing the district.**[Donate to my campaign today and help me defeat Democrat Racism in the U.S. Congress!

Thank you for your continued action and support!](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8779de3b18&e=af4b86f5c6)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: FWD: URGENT. Must See Polling Numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m forwarding you this polling email just sent to me by my campaign team because you need to see it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/94fc411c531c/tom-rice-should-be-ashamed-of-himself-8607210?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

I’m _**forwarding you this polling email**_ just sent to me by my campaign team because **you need to see it.**

Long story short, there is a **__real__ opportunity to defeat Tom Rice** and elect me as the next America First congressman from the 7th Congressional District.

Here’s a quick snapshot:

- 73% of voters say they will NOT vote for Tom Rice.
- We are polling better than double the closest challenger.
- We beat Tom Rice, and the other candidates, in head-to-head runoff matchups.

We can do this! And as the month and fundraising quarter come to an end, _**I need your help more than ever. **_

These numbers are HUGE news but without financial resources, they won’t amount to much.

**[Will you please CONTRIBUTE HERE to help me beat Tom Rice and elect me as the next America First congressman from the 7th Congressional District?](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=2b761572a7&e=7aa6ac5965)**

Anything you can send in before January 1st will mean so much more to our campaign!

Fighting for you and your family,

Russell Fry
---
| \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **RJ May** <Info@RussellFrySC.com>
Date: Thu, Dec 16, 2021 at 1:20 PM
Subject: URGENT. Must See Polling Numbers
To: Russell Fry <Russell@RussellFrySC.com>
---
|
> Russell, Quick update on the poll we just completed. We ended up with a sample size of 689 likely Republican primary voters who were interviewed by landline IVRs, live cell calls, and text messages. I will get you a formal analysis ASAP but wanted to highlight a few key takeaways. **#1) Tom Rice is in serious trouble.** Our survey found that __63% of likely GOP primary voters who had previously cast ballots for Rice will NOT vote for him in the 2022 primary__. Another 10% of respondents indicated they had never voted for Rice and still wouldn’t be voting for him. _Note -_ _Only 22% of previous Rice voters plan on supporting him in June._
---
|
---
|
> **#2) There are only 2 viable candidates in the race for SC-07** An initial ballot test shows __only 2 candidates – State Rep. Russell Fry and Congressman Tom Rice – break double digits.__ The divide between top-tier contenders and the rest of the pack widens greatly after a series of factual statements about the candidates.
---
|
---
|
> **#3) Russell Fry beats Tom Rice in a GOP runoff** Rice’s immense campaign funding from DC special interests and political base seem solid. It is highly likely a runoff election will be needed to defeat him. In a __Russell Fry vs Tom Rice head-to-head match, our polling shows Fry already has a commanding lead over Rice.__ In fact, one on one, Russell Fry outperforms Rice by 24 points.
---
|
---
|
> The results are similar in other head-to-head matchups between Fry and other challengers. **CONCLUSION:** Even though Rice’s re-election is improbable, _it is possible_ if Rice finds himself in a runoff with a weak candidate with excessive baggage. **__We believe, and the data confirms, if voters want to send Tom Rice home, it would be wise to coalesce now around conservative Russell Fry.__**
---
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY FRY FOR CONGRESS
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/about?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=99385be084) [unsubscribe from this list](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=99385be084) [update subscription preferences](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=99385be084)
Fry For Congress * PO Box 14641 * Surfside Beach, SC 29587-4641 * USA

---

name: Important [Team Demings]
subject: the congresswoman's journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It’s clear that the congresswoman’s powerful story is already resonating in this race:
| | |
---
**Val Demings is a lifelong Floridian – the daughter of a maid and a janitor, the youngest of seven children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792275/321431373/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1867-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dl7I64aoab74Cs-YNvpFwCiqiki_gPKl54ECQ4fLOYE=)
**It wasn’t easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – attending segregated schools. But her parents worked _hard_ , and they taught her the value of hard work, spirit and love.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792276/321431374/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1867-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dl7I64aoab74Cs-YNvpFwCiqiki_gPKl54ECQ4fLOYE=)
**Her passion for public service started at a young age – staying with her throughout her entire life, including at Florida State University, where she became the first in her family to graduate from college.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792277/321431375/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1867-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dl7I64aoab74Cs-YNvpFwCiqiki_gPKl54ECQ4fLOYE=)
**As a working mom, her husband, Jerry, supported her as she served 27 years in the Orlando Police Department – working her way up to chief of police.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792278/321431376/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1867-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dl7I64aoab74Cs-YNvpFwCiqiki_gPKl54ECQ4fLOYE=)
**Only in America can Val Demings' unlikely story of opportunity come true – and now she's running for Senate to make sure the greatness of this country and the opportunities that it has given her can be affordable and accessible to ALL Americans. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792279/321431377/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1867-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjIyY2UzMS05NjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dl7I64aoab74Cs-YNvpFwCiqiki_gPKl54ECQ4fLOYE=)
It's clear that the congresswoman’s powerful story is _already_ resonating in this race: **She’s neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the latest poll, and The Cook Political Report has increased her odds to win.**

But Republicans will stop at nothing to keep Florida red: The Senate Republican campaign arm raised a staggering $25 million last quarter – and as Val Demings tries to keep pace, she's still 24% short of today’s fundraising goal.

clean_body: It’s clear that the congresswoman’s powerful story is already resonating in this race: | | | Val Demings is a lifelong Floridian – the daughter of a maid and a janitor, the youngest of seven children. = It wasn’t easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – attending segregated schools. But her parents worked hard , and they taught her the value of hard work, spirit and love. = Her passion for public service started at a young age – staying with her throughout her entire life, including at Florida State University, where she became the first in her family to graduate from college. = As a working mom, her husband, Jerry, supported her as she served 27 years in the Orlando Police Department – working her way up to chief of police. = Only in America can Val Demings' unlikely story of opportunity come true – and now she's running for Senate to make sure the greatness of this country and the opportunities that it has given her can be affordable and accessible to ALL Americans. = It's clear that the congresswoman’s powerful story is already resonating in this race: She’s neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the latest poll, and The Cook Political Report has increased her odds to win. But Republicans will stop at nothing to keep Florida red: The Senate Republican campaign arm raised a staggering $25 million last quarter – and as Val Demings tries to keep pace, she's still 24% short of today’s fundraising goal. name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 12/17/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=1)
---
Friend, When you run for governor, you end up going to A LOT of Christmas parties this time of the year! Not only has it helped me get into the holiday spirit, but it's given me such a great chance to meet so many new Illinoisans—which is my favorite part about being on the campaign trail. At all of these holiday events and parties, you can tell everyone is excited for 2022. Everyone knows how much is at stake but also the opportunity we have to retake important seats up and down the ballot, starting with Governor at the top of the ticket. What I've been telling people is that **we can win**. We upset a Tier 1 Democrat before in 2016 for Illinois State Senate when we defeated the former Lt. Governor after being outspent by $300,000. **Just as we did then, we can do it again in 2022 if we continue the momentum we've been building throughout this year.** I have many more holiday parties on the calendar over the next week so I hope to see you out on the trail! S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer of the week is our Lee County Director Brad Fritts. Brad comes from a strong conservative family (his father is a former elected official) and is our youngest county director. Thank you, Brad, for your support and friendship! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-98hFxDUbJFezCiXsXBxSHgRBrBO5reybxM0RfumXms&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=2)[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=3)
* * *
**In the News** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2ON6YAkQcnWNvEXwJ3jpGmwPqbwYmvyIssn45GYZBoKLZg&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=4) This election will be a choice between solutions that can unite our state or outrage that further divided us. **Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=9)** to help us share [this Facebook post](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAyc3ywUulxWGLwSB6hshl6W92x0C5YE0EceXE6B7dedI&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_17&n=10) with more people across Illinois to show why our campaign has the best chance to take down Pritzker in November. body:
Today, former State Senator Dave Currier endorsed our campaign for Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b7a50eaab5b0/endorsement-news?e=d96869e887)
---
| |
---
| | Hello Friends, Our campaign continues to gain momentum every week. Today, former State Senator Dave Currier endorsed our campaign. As a former legislator, small business owner and veteran, he knows that career politicians like Ann Kuster are failing New Hampshire's families and small businesses.

Senator Currier said: _Jeff Cozzens is the type of leader that we need in Washington. Jeff has the experience to keep our country safe and deliver for Granite State small businesses. **I know that Jeff will hold Washington's feet to the fire when it comes to the radical mandates and the extreme inflation that Biden and his allies like Ann Kuster are levying on Granite Staters.** I’m proud to support his campaign for Congress._

This is big news -- and there is more to come soon!

Our first fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of this month. This is the first financial milestone on our way to beating Ann Kuster.

[If possible, please consider donating $10 to our campaign today. Every dollar will be spent on taking back our district and firing Nancy Pelosi.](https://jeffcozzens.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bcab25df2dbb2f241da1b7c2&id=c07d327e14&e=d96869e887)

Best,

Jeff Cozzens Republican for Congress, NH-02
---

From the cockpit of a combat jet to the International Space Station, my mission in life has been to serve my country — and I’m so grateful that last year, Arizonans elected me to fight for them in the U.S. Senate.

******But I’m already up for re-election and I need your help.

********[I’m teaming up with the DSCC to raise $25,000 by midnight to help defend my seat and the Senate. ****
****Here’s the truth, friend: We're already facing three serious threats that could cost us the election next year:****
****
1. The Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee said that beating us is a major goal. That means we’re going to face tough challenges at every turn.

2. Our people-powered campaign is up against a dark-money machine — and we’re operating within a _tiny_ margin of error. We have to hit our goals every month.

3. One Nation, a National Republican dark-money group, recently dropped more than $2 million on attack ads designed to take down our campaign. And let’s face it: Things only get tougher from here.

******Just one of these threats could be enough to shift a tight race.**

**[We need an immediate surge of grassroots support to turn the tide. name: Arview For Senate
subject: Republican candidate for IL-1 endorses Tim Arview for United States Senate
body:
Our message of hope is spreading!

| [](http://www.arviewforillinois.com/?e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_announcement&n=1)
---
Peter -- I am pleased to announce that my campaign for U.S. Senate has been endorsed by Republican candidate for IL-1 Geno Young. Here's what Mr. Young had to say: "Our Republic is in serious trouble, and career politicians like Tammy Duckworth have done nothing to better the people of Illinois, and has repeatedly turned a deaf ear to the concerns of her constituents...My dear friend Timothy Arview is the prime example of the fearless, God-fearing Patriot needed to challenge the establishment and rid our government of swamp creatures like Duckworth once and for ALL!" I couldn't agree more and I am humbled by these kind words. If you would like to help us in our historic campaign against the radical left in Illinois, please visit [https://www.fireduckworth.com](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=U9WMZET670dkMZBd2HKXiejhDiBhFnmOtRqVxqO-EWA&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_announcement&n=2 "Fire Duckworth!") to pledge a monthly donation. Thank you and God bless! Arview For Senate

body:
QUICKLY, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare?
| | **BREAKING: Republican Senators Push Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid Cuts **

| | We're FURIOUS.

We just read a breaking report that Republican Senators are scheming to REDUCE funding for Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

At this critical moment, we need to rise up in historic numbers and show them they will NEVER get away with attacking these essential programs.

**QUICKLY, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare?**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpxmP-)
---|---|---

We're LIVID.

We just read a breaking report that Republican Senators are scheming to RUTHLESSLY cut funding for Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

**Let us be clear: These are essential, life-saving programs --_and it 's shameful for Republicans to hold them hostage with heartless political games._**

At this make-or-break moment, we know Republicans would love nothing more than for us to give up the fight to SAVE Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

So it's on us to rise up in historic numbers and show them that we will NEVER let them destroy these essential programs.
**QUICKLY, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare?****** | [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46123470&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjAwMTc0MAS2&l=14267555&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46123470&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjAwMTc0MAS2&l=14267555&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Voting Rights Alert
subject: Filibuster abolished?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
This is our LAST CHANCE of the year to push for voting rights
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING via NBC NEWS:
PRESIDENT BIDEN calls for voting rights legislation – says there's "Nothing more important" for the country **
---
**We need to pass voting rights NOW,
but Senate Republicans are using the filibuster to BLOCK our progress.
So we're counting on concerned Democrats like you to speak out now:**
---
**SHOULD DEMOCRATS ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PASS VOTING RIGHTS?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792681/321439987/-1434384148?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk353-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWYzNTA2Mi05YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYYj3PQIAMP-n9Z7E8Bz2LnN4EgqVWp8ziRkqATIZlk=&emci=690a5633-4b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=31f35062-9a5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6085109)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39792682/321439988/-1434384148?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk353-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWYzNTA2Mi05YTVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYYj3PQIAMP-n9Z7E8Bz2LnN4EgqVWp8ziRkqATIZlk=&emci=690a5633-4b5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=31f35062-9a5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6085109)
---
**DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. | MISSING RESPONSE FROM dpwillis67@gmail.com **
---
Friend, this is our LAST CHANCE of the year to push for voting rights – but there's a major problem:
GOP lawmakers in 49 states have introduced more than 425 voter suppression bills to silence voters, all the ingredients needed to manifest the perfect storm for Trump to steal the next election. **That's why Senate Democrats are committed to passing the Freedom to Vote Act to stop the GOP's assault on our democracy – but Mitch McConnell is STILL using the filibuster to BLOCK this crucial bill.**
The Jim Crow-era filibuster is racist, outdated and slows our progress – and the GOP knows it. They just bypassed the filibuster to raise our country's debt ceiling, making it all the more obvious that invoking the filibuster to uphold racist voter suppression is a CHOICE – one we need your help to undo.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Christmas - a time of hope for the future of Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
The heartbeat of Michigan is its citizenry, and I am proud to be a born-and-raised Michigander. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter:

It’s hard to believe that we’re at the last weekend before Christmas. Yet, here we are. Detroit Metro and other Michigan airports are innundated with travelers heading to see their loved ones, and the roads will soon be full of holiday travelers as well.

I continue to criss-cross this amazing state of ours — with well over 1 million miles driven on Michigan highways.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| As I talk with folks throughout the state, **I’m continually reminded how resilient and amazing our fellow Michiganders are.** We’ve weathered...
* ridiculous _lock downs and mask mandates_ ,
* high taxes,
* reckless government spending,
* _terrible roads_ and bridges,
* onerous business regulations,
* failing schools,
* increasing _crime_ ,
* and more.

And yet, we’re still here. We’re still an incredible state, with incredible people. We have amazing entrepreneurs and innovators, dedicated and talented teachers, inspiring clergy members, hard-working plumbers, electricians, auto-workers, and so many more. **The heartbeat of Michigan is its citizenry, and _I am proud to be a born-and-raised Michigander_.**

When I launched my campaign for Governor, I did it with a sincere heart knowing that **my years of law enforcement leadership experience have prepared me for the job. I've excelled at putting together teams to tackle dangerous and challenging situations.** _That's the kind of leadership I believe we need_ in this state – someone who can pull together the best and the brightest to fix what Whitmer broke.
---
|
---
---
| I’m certainly not a poll-tested politician, or a johnny one note activist. I’m a hard working regular guy who has spent his entire career in service to this state and nation — first in the Marine Corps and then with the Michigan State Police.

Peter, I’m not sending a desperate plea for campaign funds to meet some phantom deadline or goal. _But I am sincerely asking if my message of hope for a return to a prosperous and great Michigan has resonated with you, that you would consider becoming part of our team_.

[Volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b44a5e5885&e=0636b97700), _[make a donation,](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=db74c67aad&e=0636b97700)_ tell your friends.

Gretchen Whitmer and her cronies will be spending whatever they can to spread lies and gloss over her failed record. Already one “independent” group has launched ads supporting her.

_Working together, we can send Gretchen Whitmer back home and restore some true leadership to Lansing._

**Will you join me? **

Wishing you and your family a joyous and Merry Christmas, and a prosperous Whitmer-defeated New Year.

Sincerely, Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=bc7c2ddddf&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
|

State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.
---

---

---
| | [](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f87b257079&e=0636b97700)
---

Michael Brown for GovernorPO Box 23Stevensville, MI 49127-0023

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=96688bebaa&e=0636b97700&c=8c575a780a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=96688bebaa&e=0636b97700&c=8c575a780a).

Fellow Conservative - here's some polling that came out earlier this year:

**GEORGIA SENATE RACE
Warnock 48% - Walker 46%**
**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

**[We need your help, Fellow Conservative, so we can pick up the momentum, win this race, and help Republicans win back the Senate majority.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=63a1254d99f64eefa9a914ed560aa591&_e=9IV4mA0j-NeBjSyB1guqe1nfsISnDxs_a8pLp8LXd8D9TzdV4u7xRM6ntdudeVeb6grRjnQq3eNQvuwCyA2UUPcC5SObBLvACXrpYToMhw0GrPEET-RZw5K5FmKtqTQFK70RnTYLLtvNayAFMRKb7V8Ixk68DUdgRil6LjB_aHAWqF-CirhKHgkz-yVtNjuFqF-vLvZ6igptc4oWiNODwqm1K5mJljODO1EiPzgzrW14GX4X-2sBMVkfWBGk-FYqlKd1-rsFVPyHzaGme-ZvaLvCJOH1ZwAOcoK_4Owym4Y7zVUeVA7q3pzkpj4HIUcFHpjKcELHin7tjrKsakYB2P0DzPkEqKuDbHQ6QszcZ9rj2StVVfyJU_50TG-W8FwYr22KLEd4mTN8myJRb2wyH-FGsn4Llq_rZubjsHpK2J-jsNBgoAQBGGKa33pWVLWdEqwCAdHbAfLj17-gLMjsRg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. | Fellow Conservative - here's some polling that came out earlier this year: GEORGIA SENATE RACE Warnock 48% - Walker 46% On one hand, this is amazing news! We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short. This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: He's Resigned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: ["Equity" in California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioog0i4yaIJZjKpC9GAkCwe_4yory-K6IdyxoLU2yY2FyA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=1) The CA Department of Education’s “Superintendent of Equity,” one Daniel Lee, has resigned his $180k/year position. This comes a day after I sent [a letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNeXoUwYjSpO1MxxcCpkkSZ735MxSqI6uxJ5yCMYorTfQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=2) pointing out his hiring was illegal. Lee doesn’t even live on the West Coast. He lives and works in Philadelphia as a life coach. (I’m not kidding: see his [promo video](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN7MDPMDyT7ubMQhNgnbKIgUW8nYP34oVolXzp4idtceW&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=3).) So how did he land this no-show paycheck courtesy of California taxpayers? Perhaps it has something to do with being in the wedding party of the politician who hired him, State Superintendent Tony Thurmond. Thurmond, incidentally, was installed in his office the same way as Gavin Newsom – $13 million in spending by teachers unions. What does a Superintendent of Equity do, anyway? The position is new, apparently created by Thurmond just for his groomsman. A good rule of thumb in California politics is when you hear the word “equity,” something fishy is afoot. Last year, for example, Newsom introduced a COVID “[equity metric](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorfBQ8IH8Uusa1rUvajsOy_Us_THY7RMusH0IDG3MYQ1zHiUJz0uwCFs4YlVQwblyc&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=4)” that locked down counties based on bizarre factors like voter turnout. It was also to promote “equity” that he just made [CRT a graduation requirement](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior3DTa3I8KbwVs34CcIY5WTfXwEPaSLOxTuHVaBJpzm4w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=5). Now, in the name of equity, California’s largest school districts are getting rid of D and F grades; the CA Board of Education is set to abolish advanced math in high school; and state universities are eliminating the SAT or any admissions test. Our politicians think they can get away with anything. With Daniel Lee’s resignation, we’ve proven at least one of them wrong. This coming year we can prove all of them wrong in a major way. [Share this Post Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAx_wy7bcUpCPOGCWJYqc7uAnXTJUu0xtOQSofsM2QjbEg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_17_final&n=7)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

In one terrible week, Liz Cheney exposed as dishonest pawn of the Democrats **
**
---
It’s difficult to imagine a worse week for an incumbent member of Congress than the one Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney just caused for herself. In the space of one January 6th Committee hearing Monday, Cheney managed to destroy her own theory of the cause of the January 6th storming of the U.S. Capitol, permitted the presentation of obviously doctored evidence, and personally introduced a January 6th timeline of events that has been revealed to be a work of fiction.

Over the course of the week, Cheney’s dishonesty was exposed one piece at a time.

On top of it all, it was disclosed that her re-election campaign is being heavily bankrolled by major donors to The Lincoln Project, which has moved on from attacking President Donald Trump and has focused its attention on defeating Republicans from coast to coast.

It is now beyond doubt that Cheney is happy to be used as a tool of the Democrats simply because it furthers her quest to inflict damage on President Trump.

_**Cheney wrecked her own theory**_

Cheney has spent months publicly building the case that President Trump orchestrated a conspiracy with the intent to cause mayhem at the U.S. Capitol, but she blew her own theory apart with her stunt of reading aloud texts to White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows from [_**Fox News hosts and Donald Trump Jr.**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfkVYvArOvQTBKeGunrBDbVdeUPN0xWaAwNFY1BH8DwLLvPJURbJxnM-2FMhxV48TZ2XNf2dxbGg6zrXHXL4OAkKpY-3D-Wgg_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MfzMX6kRkLoAHOQjKtTvpn8fCYXewEc7YzHT4hYOoLJjotftqRXfkmf4fDn1kyP1Nmw1gIZEX3NI9ozXCtL-2FoA-2BbGpL4y3bTeiAcb03BzVaqKpIAfUYR3AeqqtZ1BZIxwe4wpzUrUYKJ2eGmZdTZxhIJqDUK88bN-2FJrtfAPgPhNPKpymoBP7e65NKFn-2FQkol6rCGK8B4Z6-2B-2BMCULPn03kBjHc9r6xomFU6g5D2alrDMqwayX-2FCWLdMCXsoft9BPmQ0bpDhjLm9hltXN5UXPOgagkVfkQRlDv5ZrY3huwsau89WlVCDfjWEAkW-2F5MhU4idg0GNrSVIYnWMT1yekzLQMons0cKesGTMxYgWSwrSQLPVZaw04L1wPp29i7-2BJHY6fmmAGUlVCZVy0aIJncjzZ0Vu47Su0U8m-2BEAYFuXcRpqL3ngOZuz8QcgVbEz78d2Ti9aprq-2Byxk2RtBLwrRA3gm5XvmeiD1DdXdN-2FSKTKJMrRI4RXRdDGoA7PEhtb9GCXs-2BPQFJ48IvF6nHUwwAd13dPKLYmzuE2Y-2BxWsbkYRNnz4dHILRHUmMOGmZQKN6CSKDtnnfB-2BPIDLtiAspa9YR2AAJfyYo9rJtUf3DO2R71uufh-2FemXtpIt1mXsjmP-2FFiYrNqJu5eCbu1VHrXbsQ4Tv1EAwMlLmPpcWNewh99y-2FGEV5n-2B2hODoG97-2BQEKdme9cMOzN2j2b-2FM1Ys-2BFw01yUv0brjnfocCyq8TMGorsCaEikQy77fE6YBDMaPyO9-2Fb1kYla3PSRMITGheGA65vXiFVp6RaWy2vgvUmBBf7WNAmst-2FIlc3lygcj8jmh3iYsdJOLvPGwbZRh8aOwTJ3NOJaw-3D-3D)
Far from proving the grand scheme she imagined, Cheney instead illustrated that the conservative media figures she reviles, and the President’s own son, were shocked and horrified by what they saw occurring on January 6th and urged Trump to publicly call for calm. That these major media figures and Trump Jr. were taken aback by events only bolsters the previous finding of the FBI that there was [_**no organized plot**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfrwGxEZjPFbl2CD-2F0c3tLM8VonZ8ns43jXRCif7SvQOIXwaplGp4rIAByi7wmF3fkFGfzhHHxb55x0jf6zN9Q7uibTg2xmRUz7ueIcF2BjN04J1UcfSQIkDubyRccQ1ppYZLu5F6pAERVvK24xdHTng-3Dt7bR_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MfzMX6kRkLoAHOQjKtTvpn8fCYXewEc7YzHT4hYOoLJjotftqRXfkmf4fDn1kyP1Nmw1gIZEX3NI9ozXCtL-2FoA-2BbGpL4y3bTeiAcb03BzVaqKpIAfUYR3AeqqtZ1BZIxwe4wpzUrUYKJ2eGmZdTZxhIJqDUK88bN-2FJrtfAPgPhNPKpymoBP7e65NKFn-2FQkol6rCGK8B4Z6-2B-2BMCULPn03kBjHc9r6xomFU6g5D2alrDMqwayX-2FCWLdMCXsoft9BPmQ0bpDhjLm9hltXN5UXPOgagkVfkQRlDv5ZrY3huwsau89WlVCDfjWEAkW-2F5MhU4idg0GNrSVIYnWMT1yekzLQMons0cKesGTMxYgWSwrSQLPVZaw04L1wPp29i7-2BJHY6fmmAGUlVCZVy0aIJncjzZ0Vu47Su0U8m-2BEAYFuXcRpqL3ngOZuz8QcgVbEz78d2Ti9aprq-2Byxk2RtBLwrRA3gm5XvmeiD1DdXdN-2FSKTKJMrRI4RXRdDGoA7PEhtb9GCXs-2BPQFJ48IvF6nHUwwAd13dPKLYmzuE2Y-2BxWsbkYRNnz4dHILRHUmMOGmZQKN6CSKDtnnfB-2BPIDLtiAspa9YR2AAJfyYo9rJtUf3DO2R71uufh-2FemXtpIt1mXsjmP-2FFiYrNqJu5eCbu1VHrXbsQ4Tv1EAwMlLmPpcWNewh99y-2FGEV5n-2B2hODoG97-2BQEKdme9cIsjDere47mzKqhMkeZ8EQXJuIQHxAnvV1B6dY9onD-2BfGsmeJBga8yYTKKqpUv8iBgS0plM-2FAeZXGKzDIZiOaTN1iqAEemBVKu553g4BUVrGBxz5M9p5nRxzxiHeUJytZqctqO-2Bs-2BQKK3g-2FzaXMWG8A-3D-3D) on that day.

_**Sham hearing relied on bogus evidence**_

Cheney was a key participant in the hearing in which Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) presented a slide purporting to show a text message from a member of Congress arguing that Vice President Mike Pence could overturn the 2020 presidential election results. Schiff showed an image he claimed was a text from Rep. Jim Jordon (R-OH) to Meadows.

As first [_**reported by The Federalist**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2BpehP4XGUo4papV3iysQwTvTM32hjiIVdx066a1HxdaG5-2FuRobF-2FcYNAnHw77Xd4yEHciEO7SlHyKuMsai594ezAaAXLUzjMSwvo28fS3dht20IglAj0QWodpfIVjWBoZ3p3-2FjoISfsd8GMLjEEQed-2FvVjWm_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MfzMX6kRkLoAHOQjKtTvpn8fCYXewEc7YzHT4hYOoLJjotftqRXfkmf4fDn1kyP1Nmw1gIZEX3NI9ozXCtL-2FoA-2BbGpL4y3bTeiAcb03BzVaqKpIAfUYR3AeqqtZ1BZIxwe4wpzUrUYKJ2eGmZdTZxhIJqDUK88bN-2FJrtfAPgPhNPKpymoBP7e65NKFn-2FQkol6rCGK8B4Z6-2B-2BMCULPn03kBjHc9r6xomFU6g5D2alrDMqwayX-2FCWLdMCXsoft9BPmQ0bpDhjLm9hltXN5UXPOgagkVfkQRlDv5ZrY3huwsau89WlVCDfjWEAkW-2F5MhU4idg0GNrSVIYnWMT1yekzLQMons0cKesGTMxYgWSwrSQLPVZaw04L1wPp29i7-2BJHY6fmmAGUlVCZVy0aIJncjzZ0Vu47Su0U8m-2BEAYFuXcRpqL3ngOZuz8QcgVbEz78d2Ti9aprq-2Byxk2RtBLwrRA3gm5XvmeiD1DdXdN-2FSKTKJMrRI4RXRdDGoA7PEhtb9GCXs-2BPQFJ48IvF6nHUwwAd13dPKLYmzuE2Y-2BxWsbkYRNnz4dHILRHUmMOGmZQKN6CSKDtnnfB-2BPIDLtiAspa9YR2AAJfyYo9rJtUf3DO2R71uufh-2FemXtpIt1mXsjmP-2FFiYrNqJu5eCbu1VHrXbsQ4Tv1EAwMlLmPpcWNewh99y-2FGEV5n-2B2hODoG97-2BQEKdme9cYZDKtNyQolN-2BXylr3pwStxtBGe9Z145j-2BbGPZAVAiARa9OhfI2q5MlzHMuhtinbEkkOnfHqb8q-2F2WiXENzLP-2FdhzRH13uIZ2KJCefcggTriNgpCfV2cZLz8ykPGLzhfeQdOYut20jEURF3nqfxyzUw-3D-3D) , the text was heavily doctored and redacted, altering the actual content of the message, misrepresenting its original source, and removing paragraphs that failed to support Schiff’s premise that the opinions presented were Jordan’s own. After the story of the falsified evidence broke, the committee issued a [_**partial admission**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2BpeYoGysUIF3uHsgM2JZZrVBuUSAq80-2BVQokDVjV7HQaeTGfugOn5ncoXnxZSB4kyhPEyXVe5LsdgGrepcbkN3Dwjq2rGk3zTgLEXM8nC3UYuz2LNyBGTG5-2BRkFF28m9ubZkIEDjGn4CXBx7N-2FLdhAhHXG0C_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MfzMX6kRkLoAHOQjKtTvpn8fCYXewEc7YzHT4hYOoLJjotftqRXfkmf4fDn1kyP1Nmw1gIZEX3NI9ozXCtL-2FoA-2BbGpL4y3bTeiAcb03BzVaqKpIAfUYR3AeqqtZ1BZIxwe4wpzUrUYKJ2eGmZdTZxhIJqDUK88bN-2FJrtfAPgPhNPKpymoBP7e65NKFn-2FQkol6rCGK8B4Z6-2B-2BMCULPn03kBjHc9r6xomFU6g5D2alrDMqwayX-2FCWLdMCXsoft9BPmQ0bpDhjLm9hltXN5UXPOgagkVfkQRlDv5ZrY3huwsau89WlVCDfjWEAkW-2F5MhU4idg0GNrSVIYnWMT1yekzLQMons0cKesGTMxYgWSwrSQLPVZaw04L1wPp29i7-2BJHY6fmmAGUlVCZVy0aIJncjzZ0Vu47Su0U8m-2BEAYFuXcRpqL3ngOZuz8QcgVbEz78d2Ti9aprq-2Byxk2RtBLwrRA3gm5XvmeiD1DdXdN-2FSKTKJMrRI4RXRdDGoA7PEhtb9GCXs-2BPQFJ48IvF6nHUwwAd13dPKLYmzuE2Y-2BxWsbkYRNnz4dHILRHUmMOGmZQKN6CSKDtnnfB-2BPIDLtiAspa9YR2AAJfyYo9rJtUf3DO2R71uufh-2FemXtpIt1mXsjmP-2FFiYrNqJu5eCbu1VHrXbsQ4Tv1EAwMlLmPpcWNewh99y-2FGEV5n-2B2hODoG97-2BQEKdme9cSwld7twhQFo2zSqDNsQyeV6JgQz8E5Uw0LXoqmiZHcXuylAPmXUx5hVCSnjY4uHpVdygZHfySz5kijGpRQtEQPImmv5ALUXEmf36CfiBafLw0ZuwUnIahq3EG0RQjKEfsJXdDOyylNyqIuuNf82VEA-3D-3D) of culpability.

While this was happening, Cheney sat silently and played along with the Democrat majority on the committee.

_**Cheney spun lies with January 6th timeline**_

Having seen her dream of proving a conspiracy evaporate, Cheney shifted to claiming that Trump waited too long to react to the events unfolding at the Capitol. She charged that “for 187 minutes, President Trump refused to act,” which amounted to a “supreme dereliction of duty” from someone who should have stepped forward to stop the chaos.

According to a sequence of events compiled by the New York Times, the first building breach occurred at 2:13 p.m. Trump’s first tweet calling for calm was posted at 2:38 p.m., when he said, “Please support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement. They are truly on the side of our Country. Stay peaceful!”

Half an hour later, Trump tweeted again, writing, “I am asking everyone at the U.S. Capitol to remain peaceful. No violence! Remember WE are the Party of Law & Order – respect the Law and our great men and women in Blue. Thank you!”

At 4:17 p.m., Trump tweeted a video calling on the protestors to be peaceful and go home, but [_**it was removed**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2Bpf9mLEzXMJuNc368GcbHMDe-2BNz5oUZ78ztoN-2FmI-2FVqUUhHzh7Dq2A-2Ft9iAlMY6HM9-2B-2BE9Qg1Hc0rqhMevARGbuIFc0xoHU2ExN9zosMrqcASEDLHZtEDQXTtSeS5aChPgAaOT08xNbxqI9QXQJ1Mv5yDyp3_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MfzMX6kRkLoAHOQjKtTvpn8fCYXewEc7YzHT4hYOoLJjotftqRXfkmf4fDn1kyP1Nmw1gIZEX3NI9ozXCtL-2FoA-2BbGpL4y3bTeiAcb03BzVaqKpIAfUYR3AeqqtZ1BZIxwe4wpzUrUYKJ2eGmZdTZxhIJqDUK88bN-2FJrtfAPgPhNPKpymoBP7e65NKFn-2FQkol6rCGK8B4Z6-2B-2BMCULPn03kBjHc9r6xomFU6g5D2alrDMqwayX-2FCWLdMCXsoft9BPmQ0bpDhjLm9hltXN5UXPOgagkVfkQRlDv5ZrY3huwsau89WlVCDfjWEAkW-2F5MhU4idg0GNrSVIYnWMT1yekzLQMons0cKesGTMxYgWSwrSQLPVZaw04L1wPp29i7-2BJHY6fmmAGUlVCZVy0aIJncjzZ0Vu47Su0U8m-2BEAYFuXcRpqL3ngOZuz8QcgVbEz78d2Ti9aprq-2Byxk2RtBLwrRA3gm5XvmeiD1DdXdN-2FSKTKJMrRI4RXRdDGoA7PEhtb9GCXs-2BPQFJ48IvF6nHUwwAd13dPKLYmzuE2Y-2BxWsbkYRNnz4dHILRHUmMOGmZQKN6CSKDtnnfB-2BPIDLtiAspa9YR2AAJfyYo9rJtUf3DO2R71uufh-2FemXtpIt1mXsjmP-2FFiYrNqJu5eCbu1VHrXbsQ4Tv1EAwMlLmPpcWNewh99y-2FGEV5n-2B2hODoG97-2BQEKdme9c1SL1KANfnLYeJ84HMEUbDhqgUVE2lvdipNpRi-2FRq8eOzs-2B2xFg-2BbmN2kKtygmM9BlOP0CKKpaVWtznQpdovQmj2G0ooOnAeNrgnozXQu6osXdEZI92JT1vAP0e-2F9Z183TWWqCyj4s09yrPACXbF-2FHg-3D-3D) when Trump’s Twitter account was locked by the social media platform.

Cheney’s claim of a delay of more than three hours is indisputably false.

_**Lincoln Project Loves Cheney**_

Originally begun as a means to defeat President Trump in the 2020 election, The Lincoln Project has shifted its focus to attacking a wide variety of Republicans running for office across the country.

Major Lincoln Project donors have given a total of almost $55,000 to Cheney’s re-election campaign and related committees in 2021:

* Ron Conway gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney.
* John Pritzker gave $100,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney.
* Martha Karsh gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $5,800 to Cheney.
* Stephen Mandel gave $1,000,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney.
* Christy Walton gave $30,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney.

_**Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, today issued the following statement:**_

“All of this should put to bed the idea that Liz Cheney is somehow standing on principle when she attacks President Trump. She has undermined her own theory, allowed the presentation of fabricated evidence, and purposely presented a timeline that is demonstrably false. She pursued all of this dishonesty because she is blinded by her hatred of Donald Trump and will stop at nothing to try to harm him.

“Liz Cheney makes high-minded claims of wanting to save the soul of the Republican Party, but she associates with known liars like Adam Schiff and allows herself to be used by Nancy Pelosi as a convenient weapon against Republicans of all kinds. She is not, as she claims, the ranking Republican member of the sham January 6th Committee, but is in fact a Pelosi appointee. Cheney is a willing pawn of Pelosi and the Democrats as they attempt to do two things: damage President Trump’s future political prospects and distract the public from the disaster that is the Biden administration.

“This week provided the best proof yet that Liz Cheney is not fit to hold public office, let alone represent Wyoming in Congress. We only get one member of the U.S. House of Representatives, and Cheney has wasted it on her own personal war with Trump. Wyomingites deserve a member of Congress who looks out for them, not her own self-aggrandizing crusade.”

clean_body: | | | | In one terrible week, Liz Cheney exposed as dishonest pawn of the Democrats It’s difficult to imagine a worse week for an incumbent member of Congress than the one Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney just caused for herself. In the space of one January 6th Committee hearing Monday, Cheney managed to destroy her own theory of the cause of the January 6th storming of the U.S. Capitol, permitted the presentation of obviously doctored evidence, and personally introduced a January 6th timeline of events that has been revealed to be a work of fiction. Over the course of the week, Cheney’s dishonesty was exposed one piece at a time. On top of it all, it was disclosed that her re-election campaign is being heavily bankrolled by major donors to The Lincoln Project, which has moved on from attacking President Donald Trump and has focused its attention on defeating Republicans from coast to coast. It is now beyond doubt that Cheney is happy to be used as a tool of the Democrats simply because it furthers her quest to inflict damage on President Trump. Cheney wrecked her own theory Cheney has spent months publicly building the case that President Trump orchestrated a conspiracy with the intent to cause mayhem at the U.S. Capitol, but she blew her own theory apart with her stunt of reading aloud texts to White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows from Far from proving the grand scheme she imagined, Cheney instead illustrated that the conservative media figures she reviles, and the President’s own son, were shocked and horrified by what they saw occurring on January 6th and urged Trump to publicly call for calm. That these major media figures and Trump Jr. were taken aback by events only bolsters the previous finding of the FBI that there was on that day. Sham hearing relied on bogus evidence Cheney was a key participant in the hearing in which Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) presented a slide purporting to show a text message from a member of Congress arguing that Vice President Mike Pence could overturn the 2020 presidential election results. Schiff showed an image he claimed was a text from Rep. Jim Jordon (R-OH) to Meadows. As first , the text was heavily doctored and redacted, altering the actual content of the message, misrepresenting its original source, and removing paragraphs that failed to support Schiff’s premise that the opinions presented were Jordan’s own. After the story of the falsified evidence broke, the committee issued a of culpability. While this was happening, Cheney sat silently and played along with the Democrat majority on the committee. Cheney spun lies with January 6th timeline Having seen her dream of proving a conspiracy evaporate, Cheney shifted to claiming that Trump waited too long to react to the events unfolding at the Capitol. She charged that “for 187 minutes, President Trump refused to act,” which amounted to a “supreme dereliction of duty” from someone who should have stepped forward to stop the chaos. In fact, According to a sequence of events compiled by the New York Times, the first building breach occurred at 2:13 p.m. Trump’s first tweet calling for calm was posted at 2:38 p.m., when he said, “Please support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement. They are truly on the side of our Country. Stay peaceful!” Half an hour later, Trump tweeted again, writing, “I am asking everyone at the U.S. Capitol to remain peaceful. No violence! Remember WE are the Party of Law & Order – respect the Law and our great men and women in Blue. Thank you!” At 4:17 p.m., Trump tweeted a video calling on the protestors to be peaceful and go home, but when Trump’s Twitter account was locked by the social media platform. Cheney’s claim of a delay of more than three hours is indisputably false. Lincoln Project Loves Cheney It should come as no surprise, then, that major donors to the anti-Republican attack group The Lincoln Project are . Originally begun as a means to defeat President Trump in the 2020 election, The Lincoln Project has shifted its focus to attacking a wide variety of Republicans running for office across the country. Major Lincoln Project donors have given a total of almost $55,000 to Cheney’s re-election campaign and related committees in 2021: Ron Conway gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney. John Pritzker gave $100,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney. Martha Karsh gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $5,800 to Cheney. Stephen Mandel gave $1,000,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney. Christy Walton gave $30,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney. Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, today issued the following statement:** “All of this should put to bed the idea that Liz Cheney is somehow standing on principle when she attacks President Trump. She has undermined her own theory, allowed the presentation of fabricated evidence, and purposely presented a timeline that is demonstrably false. She pursued all of this dishonesty because she is blinded by her hatred of Donald Trump and will stop at nothing to try to harm him. “Liz Cheney makes high-minded claims of wanting to save the soul of the Republican Party, but she associates with known liars like Adam Schiff and allows herself to be used by Nancy Pelosi as a convenient weapon against Republicans of all kinds. She is not, as she claims, the ranking Republican member of the sham January 6th Committee, but is in fact a Pelosi appointee. Cheney is a willing pawn of Pelosi and the Democrats as they attempt to do two things: damage President Trump’s future political prospects and distract the public from the disaster that is the Biden administration. “This week provided the best proof yet that Liz Cheney is not fit to hold public office, let alone represent Wyoming in Congress. We only get one member of the U.S. House of Representatives, and Cheney has wasted it on her own personal war with Trump. Wyomingites deserve a member of Congress who looks out for them, not her own self-aggrandizing crusade.” | | | |

name: Kelly Dietrich
subject: One last thing (NDTC)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee,
body:
Happy Holidays

NDTC-logo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..V96EDXLj4Y1KT9ESAzZ930RiFK8WSXw7DRpyV0OtFAw )

Peter — As holidays roll around and a new year looms,
it’s hard not to reminisce.

We’ve made many new and amazing memories at NDTC this year, and
they were only possible because of all of you. We hope our 2021
highs motivate you to go right into 2022 swingin’.

-------------------------------------
All of us spent a week Building Blue
-------------------------------------

At our first-ever Build Blue Week, we had over 70 speakers and
panelists from across the Democratic ecosystem, including DNC
Chair Jaime Harrison, PA State Rep. Malcolm Kenyatta, Cristóbal
Alex, Erin Wilson, and Higher Heights for America PAC Founder &
CEO Glynda Carr.

>From insightful panels and trainings to interactive Q&As, we were
thrilled to welcome so many amazing learners who walked away with
tangible lessons and energy heading into 2022. For more
highlights, don’t miss our sizzle reel below!

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9dXhYMl9DSTMxa3MmX19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0.cEhs3M2rREnF12TMwrnRJMfLd7etEyyYTAl1uA71kGE )

We were blown away not only by our trainers and partners but also
by the overwhelming dedication of learners like you!

-----------------------------------------------------------------
We had a record-breaking amount of diverse programming this year.
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Just this year, we held over 450 virtual live trainings - over a
training per day!

That’s on top of our over 120 on demand courses available 24/7.
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rchPy4Jo2l6Mmczjq9xeiLH7JPKSFej04uYlIAEKoZQ )

We are proud to be surrounded by passionate Democrats like you
who understand there are no off years. Regardless if you ran for
office or worked on a campaign in 2021 or not, you trained hard
to build the infrastructure needed in your communities to not
only win today but for decades to come.

This year we also graduated our first inaugural class of the
Democratic Strategy Institute Field Director Cohort. These 21
graduates will be placed as fully fledged Field Directors in
actual campaigns. We’re excited for the next round of graduates
next year!

LEARN MORE ABOUT THE PROGRAM →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5t5sMDg8aYvGwwRvyasNkyZvnqPpFf-tgi46FOM8Png )

And our 2021 Staff Academy cohort consisted of 165
graduates who have gone off to assume paid campaign roles, as
well as other Democratic jobs with organizations like the
Democratic Governors Association. Our next cohort hits the ground
running next year!

LEARN MORE →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..35P68HIGM9n-O-rf4jSe3YEhtSNyPcPgF5WIXWxQVGY )

-------------------------------------------------------
We helped Democrats across the country run for office.
-------------------------------------------------------

We are proud to have trained over 630 campaigns who competed in
2021 elections. With three-fourths of NDTC-trained candidates
being women and half being people of color, we’re thrilled to be
one small part of building up a party that is truly
representative of the fabric of our country.

Building off the success of these amazing individuals, we’re
already gearing up to take 2022 by storm. If you’re fired up too,
check out some of our most popular resources that will put you on
track to build blue in your community and beyond.

Running for Office as a Candidate

NDTC 30-Day Challenge
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL25kdGMtMzAtZGF5LWNoYWxsZW5nZS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMTcyMV9ISCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.q-qdWFsq3mtsi1M1PCC0ZuLEh4TMcQqEdyVPlmW5Yqk )

Ready to get started on that New Year’s resolution of running for
office? Our 30-Day Challenge will guide you through all the
necessary steps to get you there through relevant courses,
resources, and help hold you accountable.

So You Think You Want to Run for Office
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._gplVG_f6ZN46zLOmqwyGOKVTf9sBoWa7Q0h9k9sgug )

There’s still time to change your New Year’s resolutions, so
check out this course to decide whether or not running for office
will make the list.

Getting Your Campaign Off the Ground
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bPbI4kJCdbcG0on_ID32v2AhTqrZof6h3RlX0Rdz2rk )

With this course, our trainers will walk you through how to
register your candidacy and get your name on the ballot, and make
sure you hit every necessary deadline that may come your way.

Campaign Staff

Relational Organizing 101
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iFaD3f8ijutFgDeR_jkDWcXfwXYniX6WdQUscR0Cz_Q )

Building genuine relationships with constituents is the key to
success in any campaign. This course goes through the ins and
outs of using relational organizing to meet people in your
community where they’re at.

Equitable and Inclusive Campaign Practices
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEyMTcyMV9ISCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.Bc_gok6bJNV9jUTBkxhW7K0om-wKOuyqOmhPjmOkwgk )

Equity, inclusion, and social justice should be the heart of any
campaign. It shouldn’t be just a footnote. Establish strategies
to encourage inclusivity within your campaign in this important
online course.

Local Leaders

Fighting Voter Suppression
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bsqSpcLjbUZavigoQWokqIZtnoh4bRxl2VuotOOWulI )

As 2022 nears, we already know combatting voter suppression is
going to be a challenge in many states. Understand what makes up
voter suppression, and how you can mitigate it within your
community.

Member Recruitment and Retention for Local Democratic Parties
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SLNhq1Q_D_zWHOPKYWWZWi4zGqqLRPdw8CaeiUuh8Z4 )

Use the new year as a chance to recruit new members! All local
parties rely on members to keep the wheels turning, so use this
course to gain the best practices in recruitment and retention
strategies!

--------------
One More Thing
--------------

A midterm year isn’t a standalone event; it builds off a
movement, not a moment. It takes momentum that is built upon
years of preparation and strategy.

With a Democrat back in the White House, plus a House and Senate
majority, we need to use every bit of motivation we can muster.
And that includes you in whatever role you assume in your
community.

And if you’re not quite sure where you fit in, get started today
learning more about your community, the important upcoming races,
and how to engage fellow voters.

Happy Holidays! We can’t wait to keep building blue with you in
2022.

- Kelly Dietrich
NDTC Founder & CEO

Ps - we love to hear (and share) some of the awesome things our
learners have done this year or are working on in the future.
Want to share your story with us? Fill out this form and our team
will follow-up in the new year.
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZm9ybXMuZ2xlL3Q1NzQzeG85c3JjTlNQZTY4P19fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.lfc01he3VpUiRdFo1QCAeJ_GE-eDa7kvN_ZfK5-Ig-0 )

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com ( # ) |
Unsubscribe ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..dc3R0-DNyLou5GKUvYeqALtKPjfbeo5Edy9xYw7_6xI )
Connect with us on social media!

Follow us on Twitter ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHdpdHRlci5jb20vdHJhaW5kZW1zP19fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.Qo1apVCdl-E2woVQMWx_-pdnvb19KpYy13Cj6m4IsGc )
Like us on Facebook ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZhY2Vib29rLmNvbS90cmFpbmRlbXM_X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0.AaUZRHqLL04lSMflkvz9FxiNu-3IZxRHtF9Dpk03huw )
Follow us on Instagram ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lmluc3RhZ3JhbS5jb20vdHJhaW5kZW1zLz9fX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.YJMvOKzsF74QRVwqkIqh8N7g-kLbCc6zbCGD2PNiZxg )

Follow us on LinkedIn
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM5Nzc0NTM5LCJuYmYiOjE2Mzk3NzQ1MzksImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiJjdHhveDBrZGQwdXpmdGw3bHlzdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmxpbmtlZGluLmNvbS9jb21wYW55L3RyYWluZGVtcy8_X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0._oKQJVIWBCym13HtNaaTUV1RpAq-5HcQVqfrPpj136Q )
Subscribe to our YouTube channel

---
| | Hi Peter,

We don't need to just get rid of the Democrats, although we do.

If the past year has taught us anything, it's that we need to get rid of the leftist RINOs also.

One of those we are taking aim at: Nancy Mace, the RINO from South Carolina.

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. Our PAC are America First grassroots patriots, fighting the Socialists and the RINOs alike!

Nancy Mace is one of the very worst, and [we will defeat her, with your help!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=03cbe693a7&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=50ba70dd7a&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Check out the hit list from Mace:**

_-She attacked President Trump as soon as she took office, after campaigning saying that she supports Trump
-She voted to hold pro-Trump Steve Bannon in contempt
-She called for federal investigations against pro-Trump lawmakers
-She is a fake who gave two different vaccine messages to Fox News and CNN viewers to please listenership.
-She does fundraisers with Liz Cheney
-She attacked President Trump after January 6th
-She supports the anti- family transgender rights bill called "Fairness for All" with the Democrats
-She voted for and passed the LGTBQ small business data collection bill_

**Of course, she's buddying up with RINO Liz Cheney now:**

_According to the invite, Cheney is hosting a fundraiser for Mace on June 16, 2021 at 6:00 p.m. EDT.

“The event will be at a townhouse on the Hill and outdoors weather-permitting,” the invite noted, adding that the address for the gathering will only be provided to those who contributed $2,500 or $1,000 to Mace’s congressional reelection bid.

In addition to the reception, Cheney is hosting a pair of “meet and greets” for Mace in Washington, D.C.

“Is she hoping we don’t hear about it?” one conservative donor who received the invitation told me this week.

In the aftermath of the January 6 riot, Mace staked herself out on the far left flank of the GOP’s civil war – vowing to become a “new voice for the Republican party.” She also attacked one of Trump’s allies in the U.S. House for allegedly being affiliated with QAnon – a shadowy group that has sought to counter increasingly leftist mainstream media coverage by peddling similarly untrustworthy right-wing conspiracy theories (and which has become a convenient “catch-all” for those looking to marginalize Trump backers)._

This is a RINO who will never see the light. She got to DC and went native.

So we have to make her feel the heat!

_**Now is the time to take out the RINOs [and help America First candidates!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=71b8266bbb&e=ba6e67b849)**_

---
| Often times, decent people go to DC and become Swampers because they aren't strong. Mace went native as soon as she got there- she LOVES being on CNN!

She is a RINO that must go. And Drain the DC Swamp PAC can help give her the boot!

**This is the way we win. Pressure the weak and challenge the Swampers.[Help us elect good America First candidates!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=6fa2dfa403&e=ba6e67b849)**

We need Republicans who won't let Biden pass anything. Challenge every bad Commie idea!

[Help us elect the right people to challenge Biden and defeat his bills.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=51cd681b97&e=ba6e67b849)

We need to make it impossible for them to take away our liberties any further. [Help me beat the Swampy politicians!

clean_body: Stop the leftist Republicans! | | | | | Hi Peter, We don't need to just get rid of the Democrats, although we do. If the past year has taught us anything, it's that we need to get rid of the leftist RINOs also. One of those we are taking aim at: Nancy Mace, the RINO from South Carolina. My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. Our PAC are America First grassroots patriots, fighting the Socialists and the RINOs alike! Nancy Mace is one of the very worst, and | | Check out the hit list from Mace: -She attacked President Trump as soon as she took office, after campaigning saying that she supports Trump -She voted to hold pro-Trump Steve Bannon in contempt -She called for federal investigations against pro-Trump lawmakers -She is a fake who gave two different vaccine messages to Fox News and CNN viewers to please listenership. -She does fundraisers with Liz Cheney -She attacked President Trump after January 6th -She supports the anti- family transgender rights bill called "Fairness for All" with the Democrats -She voted for and passed the LGTBQ small business data collection bill Of course, she's buddying up with RINO Liz Cheney now: According to the invite, Cheney is hosting a fundraiser for Mace on June 16, 2021 at 6:00 p.m. EDT. “The event will be at a townhouse on the Hill and outdoors weather-permitting,” the invite noted, adding that the address for the gathering will only be provided to those who contributed $2,500 or $1,000 to Mace’s congressional reelection bid. In addition to the reception, Cheney is hosting a pair of “meet and greets” for Mace in Washington, D.C. “Is she hoping we don’t hear about it?” one conservative donor who received the invitation told me this week. In the aftermath of the January 6 riot, Mace staked herself out on the far left flank of the GOP’s civil war – vowing to become a “new voice for the Republican party.” She also attacked one of Trump’s allies in the U.S. House for allegedly being affiliated with QAnon – a shadowy group that has sought to counter increasingly leftist mainstream media coverage by peddling similarly untrustworthy right-wing conspiracy theories (and which has become a convenient “catch-all” for those looking to marginalize Trump backers). This is a RINO who will never see the light. She got to DC and went native. So we have to make her feel the heat! Now is the time to take out the RINOs | | Often times, decent people go to DC and become Swampers because they aren't strong. Mace went native as soon as she got there- she LOVES being on CNN! She is a RINO that must go. And Drain the DC Swamp PAC can help give her the boot! This is the way we win. Pressure the weak and challenge the Swampers. We need Republicans who won't let Biden pass anything. Challenge every bad Commie idea! We need to make it impossible for them to take away our liberties any further. | Thank you! Respectfully, | | Jarrin Jackson Chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC Combat Infantry Veteran P.S. Marcy Kaptur
| | Folks,

I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio. You know as well as I do -- a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate. We can’t let his campaign derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.
