name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: What fossil fuel execs don't want you to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It doesn't have to be this way.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4105?t=3&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n) Friend, Fossil fuel energy costs have been through the roof lately. In our latest memo, we lay out exactly _why_ this is happening (spoiler alert: Big Polluter corporate greed and possible price-gouging), as well as how we can solve it for good (another spoiler alert: clean energy is cheap energy). [**_Read our latest memo to see how fossil fuels are driving the energy crisis—and how the Build Back Better Act's clean energy investments can reduce energy costs for American families._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4106?t=4&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n) | [READ THE MEMO](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4106?t=5&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n)
---
Even as hard-working people around the country spend more and more on fossil fuel energy costs, fossil fuel companies are making record-breaking profits. There's also evidence suggesting Big Polluters are keeping consumer prices artificially high—even as their own costs have gone down.
Fossil fuel execs know that most of us have no choice other than volatile, expensive fossil fuels. But it doesn't have to be this way.
The Build Back Better Act makes massive investments in clean energy, which will make it even more affordable and widely available than it is now. Clean energy is cheap energy—and it's only getting cheaper. That means lower energy costs for all of us.
[**_Big Polluters know this, which is why they're fighting the Build Back Better Act with their dirty money. But you can fight their disinformation campaign with the truth: Read our memo today and learn just how essential (and cheap!) clean energy is for American families._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4106?t=6&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n)
[GIVE IT A READ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4106?t=7&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n)
---
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
**Before you go...**

Our policy memos move the needle and change the conversation in Washington. But to power our in-depth research and analysis, we depend on grassroots contributions from folks like you.

[**_Can you chip in today to support future memos and to help us continue putting pressure on Congress to pass climate legislation?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4105?t=8&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n)

---
| [DONATE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4105?t=9&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=12924%2E53494%2EjaKz0n).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

Here’s what I told the LATimes:
We can’t treat Latino voters like a monolith, like a block that will always vote for Democrats because we do half-hearted outreach when we need them.
We can’t just translate a couple ads. We need to respect Latino communities and actually talk about the issues we face.

We need to spend early and _adequately_ on outreach to our community and make sure it is done in a culturally competent way.

_That’s how I’ve won my last four terms as CA-29's Congressman, and it’s how I helped other Democrats win Latino votes._ But I’ll be honest, Peter, this sort of genuine, people-first outreach costs a lot of money.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1785%2E3611125%2EBg-fap ][IMG]

folks—

Far-right extremist Josh Mandel is the leading Republican Senate candidate
in the polls.

Mandel isn’t new to the scene—he’s tried and failed twice to unseat me.
So, I know better than most what it takes to win against him.

And folks, Tim Ryan has what it takes. But I also know winning a
Senate race requires a lot of money and resources.

Tim needs your help right now. His end-of-year fundraising deadline is
right around the corner and his campaign is falling behind on their goal.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6283?t=1007&akid=1785%2E3611125%2EBg-fap ]Can you rush a donation so Tim can meet his end-of-year goal and join
me in the Senate?

name: Cynthia Mendes
subject: We forced Governor McKee to act. Here’s what’s next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

After 10 months of inaction and 17 days of sleeping in tents outside the
State House to demand change on the homelessness crisis in Rhode Island,
the State, cities, and Rhode Island institutions have acted to create
shelter for 400 unhoused Rhode Islanders — with more plans to come.

It’s an important victory in that we finally pressured Governor McKee to
act, but we shouldn’t have ever had to do this in the first place.

Governor McKee has always had the tools and resources to solve the
houselessness crisis, but he chose to ignore it until it became a
political problem for him.

And while we’re celebrating the success of forcing the establishment to
provide emergency shelter this winter, this crisis won’t just go away.

No one should freeze to death or be forced to sleep outside because they
can’t afford safe and dignified housing.

That’s why I’m introducing legislation to make Rhode Island a “Right to
Shelter” state, which would guarantee every Rhode Islander safe and
dignified shelter.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/right-to-shelter-petition-20211217/?t=1003&akid=326%2E43343%2EVmLTag ]We need
to change the system that heartlessly puts our neighbors on the streets,
and that will only happen once we begin to address the deep and systemic
causes of homelessness. Can you add your name to support this important
legislation?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/right-to-shelter-petition-20211217/?t=1004&akid=326%2E43343%2EVmLTag ]ADD YOUR NAME

This bill isn’t the only solution, because so many of our struggles are
interconnected. We need a living wage, affordable housing, universal
healthcare, and — most importantly — a government that is committed to the
basic principle that shelter is a human right.

I know what it’s like to be a single mom and not know where my daughter
and I will spend the night. These experiences are etched into our hearts.
They shape us and shape our values.

It’s why I’m proud to run alongside Matt Brown for Governor and the Rhode
Island Political Co-op to build a Rhode Island for all. We wear our hearts
proudly on our sleeves, and that only makes our movement stronger.

So today, we celebrate. Tomorrow, we get back to work.

Grateful & Hopeful,

Cynthia

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211217_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=326%2E43343%2EVmLTag ]DONATE

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=326%2E43343%2EVmLTag ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=326%2E43343%2EVmLTag ]Privacy Policy

name: Elise
subject: Friend, this is it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Darin LaHood U
body:
Your chance to meet and sit down with President Trump Hi friend, it’s Elise Stefanik. clean_body: Democrats don’t care about your finances Right now, paying for gas is painful. Prices at the gas pump are skyrocketing , and there’s absolutely no sign that they’re going to slow down. : This is what happens when Democrats control ALL THREE branches of government: Inflation grows out of control, and working class people end up paying the price. If you want to see the cost of gas go down for GOOD, you NEED to support my campaign TODAY: . As your next Congressman for Washington’s 8th District, I’ll work to MAKE change happen. I’ll get our supply chain in order, get things back online, and will make sure gas prices like these remain a part of the past. Thank you, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With Christmas coming up, Jane is finishing the year strong and continuing to build momentum as we approach the new year. This week, we announced a new statewide ad, launched a statewide coalition of Parents for Jane, and maintained a busy schedule, crisscrossing the state to hear directly from Ohioans about the issues important to them. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **America First** [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=4_HEJLPfDZ5uF31X-Fz7VnExmyo4N7rRjapfSpFOXpdZoQ_oYPqDeIqgd5jvF90f0n-fm30CEavMEfNERFPY6vsQ-WfaisbjIlQks4Xv179_nOD5mvWSvxr6s7Sha4d72UAs77MX2VUXQPnfCuNE06rKdx7N4ZWb5-nkJJDstuxTEBL6o5lrWIONTQFNcmvyK5rvS5l8iY2OmYyuOHxL3tt4zeN-jRLqQ1oUD6OJgSJxPI_ZQG9VEvL5xiyKOqik9nLTMzG9ZWC1gF5u1ic_9mWyKDoT4LbIN_rY7F1H4m4%3D)
This morning we launched a new six-figure ad buy featuring the new ad above. Jane has a record as a conservative champion, party unifier, and problem-solver and that is resonating with Ohio Republican primary voters.

This ad is an extension of the campaign's earlier paid media buy and is part of the long-term strategic messaging plan to provide air-cover to Jane’s unparalleled field operation and grassroots efforts on the ground in Ohio.

New polling [shows](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=4_HEJLPfDZ5uF31X-Fz7VlGsCMwMa6njqe9cYERg4NsVmU3X2wc038zoRaeJfgs9CHADX90SKUrZ3jATLqzkR5yCujzMf4GzlucUJwurvx7pICC4O8mW9JwUOYg34Verd_rL8Bak0HY2mwXLlq_ZuzM85UVE-sbmIqoUwKb9fg_ylEj4QWt0cxTmDvY1KmVVIEqZhEd1DwmD3FS_yS8jLKn9mVJA7kkkY2_4tO98vjyNFQN8dK7wo0L2hlvdOJgvEgIUL4dfRkEKxQxXwM-i_oQtxhEU1wB86lmi-XP6bpAaBx3dDq4fTd6q2OWkSL-lsTMDOrU9f6OK2ZW9EicPoOqXOLnAQSAquyeKWOCc7ruNRMt1XNhUjqbc89tyXeh0omtCBhpP30E8Pp7Vi-e8fiKeq8fE70H7hf_zkPO4kFE%3D) that this strategy, Jane's winning message, and her unmatched work ethic is resonating with Ohio voters. Jane has surged on the ballot into second place while her opponents - including Mandel, Vance and Gibbons - have stalled. As a first-time candidate, Jane is well within striking distance of the lead and has momentum on her side.
**From the Trail**
On Monday morning, Jane took a tour of GFS Chemicals in Powell. In order for our manufacturing base to keep growing, we need to have a skilled & ready workforce. That's why as Senator, workforce development will be a major focus for Jane to keep Ohio jobs in Ohio!
Jane continued her Parents First tour on Monday night in Hilliard. Parents in Hilliard and across Ohio are standing up and speaking out! Parents want schools to focus on the fundamentals of a good education that prepares their kids for the future and that’s exactly what Jane will do in Washington.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=4_HEJLPfDZ5uF31X-Fz7VmLTq8N1Z_C7_SCEO0jjvkITFVPpni-8AxiXWUNpF83CrQiiqipUOU_11EGNGum9XXUkf-gF2kyEMmI7tZ9F5WVkfW_9fP7Mmw1sw6MA4PapbH68uBjAobPuG_q_4nF3uk5pJdjjcVryrhGeTdrf3MgZGIR7TNrarOyGZeJ72ZyST3MYBrv-Fk4Q3TKT12bPFqnLHF1CRDyhkbAHG9EW6l4Q_epTZrq32qXK_s4h2yOYLEw1548bqYEJibuAZtVUzg%3D%3D)
The next stop on the Parents First Tour was in North Royalton on Thursday night. As a U.S. Senator, Jane will put parents at the center of their children’s education, health, and well-being – not politicians or bureaucrats.
Earlier today, Jane was able to address the Ohio Right to Life Board as well as prolife chapters from across the state. Jane will proudly and passionately champion life in the U.S. Senate.
**Parents for Jane**
On Wednesday, the campaign was proud to launch our Parents for Jane coalition, a grassroots, statewide group dedicated to highlighting Jane’s staunch support of Ohio parents, children, and families.

Our founding members include leaders from across the state who are at the tip of the spear on education and family issues:

\- State Representative Marilyn John
\- Mom, Activist, and former educator Cathy Pultz
\- State Representative Bob Young
\- State Senator Michael Rulli
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=4_HEJLPfDZ5uF31X-Fz7Vpct_s_RDUKW_EqSiVn9EG4hd2I0fERLz1RMgI0vY8HnzC2HCQACM5gMt-ch0zQ-feKK2vMwu32edEkY6Ae-BWWvdFVi92nE4JfjtFuYGO9JXFiD1L54ODHIPFYQdn-rrZOMMDoNiYcsLCydqEzldmPnC57NtuEewFjxj-RkyU7nGesPeosTrKD3jZgIFtEhrjTJh-TijsiM05bQuZyu-ZeCDeiYKXwOLuh-KPO9XijyNG2OafjI9yspVGOBkF-7rg%3D%3D)
In addition to launching this great new coalition, the [Columbus Dispatch](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=6n8ebdhnD3Diw5394oWcxuw3yt05-LWj1-vTLghdyYXvNfIDaozpW4GbOFvEi6DJDIm7CxaHQ8IWHYC4xznwkFRnucswLIp-ENEULKsgdjLAyaHsE60lMCtdBCIh4rM1wPri63yg1Mf7_tj_S3k_q1rKzA62Pu0j6lGi3BD4worI8KMoog49UAUqRNkMpGamg600SUL1nq2phM7hj7o_1AkAs3qQmMJcN_l6kiydUIxhn0yN799-5ctghAuVIjj9gd6hm_fAvUxS0JPpEqlKWAJABXgydftr0XBwwtpdo5iCFZsSq5edrCS5y0vxD86__FQSdRm9JXU9btZgVp_iNR8njyONu2SWz6faZuCRjPQ0NGwM_A0h-kGF7QOCaFG9JbXPYLx-mFMUywEcYIV3Tg-p1B8bBGMyZVPSWI4p0-0%3D) ran Jane’s latest op-ed on Wednesday:

"I’m the daughter and granddaughter of immigrants. My grandparents came to this country with just a grade school education but worked hard to provide a better life for their children who then passed on a strong work ethic to me and my siblings.

Because of these values, I believe that education is the greatest equalizer. It’s what allows people from all backgrounds to have the opportunity to live their American Dream.

However, that dream is in jeopardy for children in Ohio and the nation as teachers' unions, leftist activists and liberal school board members erode schools’ standards of excellence in favor of progressive political trends.

As Ohio’s next senator, but more importantly as a mom, I believe that taking back our country starts with taking back our classrooms. It’s past time we put parents at the center of their children’s education, health, and well-being – not politicians or bureaucrats.”

You can read the full op-ed [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=89471d969762479db75bd9d8b542b1c4&_e=6n8ebdhnD3Diw5394oWcxuw3yt05-LWj1-vTLghdyYXvNfIDaozpW4GbOFvEi6DJDIm7CxaHQ8IWHYC4xznwkFRnucswLIp-ENEULKsgdjLAyaHsE60lMCtdBCIh4rM1wPri63yg1Mf7_tj_S3k_q1rKzA62Pu0j6lGi3BD4worI8KMoog49UAUqRNkMpGamg600SUL1nq2phM7hj7o_1GyiorVbts5ijZcSf9HevDPxWPOxdRpUO2cZ4QbFTDVHseW_sfSQ_vxoJR1fMPhBEdhz8re6280BqHnqo_UuaDnSwInVk33_BBUkaTvsKFieEByxjFmdo4ilDHZM8ZPGbKSQCIlmOTshiO1iXZXoo0kWEsJMN08r_Hzxo8hUYisXC4Thx6ksieY0kGxPlhRDgPWqpUB1_ThMqFrZZa9BYA8%3D).

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, With Christmas coming up, Jane is finishing the year strong and continuing to build momentum as we approach the new year. This week, we announced a new statewide ad, launched a statewide coalition of Parents for Jane, and maintained a busy schedule, crisscrossing the state to hear directly from Ohioans about the issues important to them. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. America First This morning we launched a new six-figure ad buy featuring the new ad above. Jane has a record as a conservative champion, party unifier, and problem-solver and that is resonating with Ohio Republican primary voters. This ad is an extension of the campaign's earlier paid media buy and is part of the long-term strategic messaging plan to provide air-cover to Jane’s unparalleled field operation and grassroots efforts on the ground in Ohio. New polling that this strategy, Jane's winning message, and her unmatched work ethic is resonating with Ohio voters. Jane has surged on the ballot into second place while her opponents - including Mandel, Vance and Gibbons - have stalled. As a first-time candidate, Jane is well within striking distance of the lead and has momentum on her side. From the Trail On Monday morning, Jane took a tour of GFS Chemicals in Powell. In order for our manufacturing base to keep growing, we need to have a skilled & ready workforce. That's why as Senator, workforce development will be a major focus for Jane to keep Ohio jobs in Ohio! Jane continued her Parents First tour on Monday night in Hilliard. Parents in Hilliard and across Ohio are standing up and speaking out! Parents want schools to focus on the fundamentals of a good education that prepares their kids for the future and that’s exactly what Jane will do in Washington. The next stop on the Parents First Tour was in North Royalton on Thursday night. As a U.S. Senator, Jane will put parents at the center of their children’s education, health, and well-being – not politicians or bureaucrats. Earlier today, Jane was able to address the Ohio Right to Life Board as well as prolife chapters from across the state. Jane will proudly and passionately champion life in the U.S. Senate. Parents for Jane On Wednesday, the campaign was proud to launch our Parents for Jane coalition, a grassroots, statewide group dedicated to highlighting Jane’s staunch support of Ohio parents, children, and families. Our founding members include leaders from across the state who are at the tip of the spear on education and family issues: \- State Representative Marilyn John \- Mom, Activist, and former educator Cathy Pultz \- State Representative Bob Young \- State Senator Michael Rulli In addition to launching this great new coalition, the ran Jane’s latest op-ed on Wednesday: "I’m the daughter and granddaughter of immigrants. My grandparents came to this country with just a grade school education but worked hard to provide a better life for their children who then passed on a strong work ethic to me and my siblings. Because of these values, I believe that education is the greatest equalizer. It’s what allows people from all backgrounds to have the opportunity to live their American Dream. However, that dream is in jeopardy for children in Ohio and the nation as teachers' unions, leftist activists and liberal school board members erode schools’ standards of excellence in favor of progressive political trends. As Ohio’s next senator, but more importantly as a mom, I believe that taking back our country starts with taking back our classrooms. It’s past time we put parents at the center of their children’s education, health, and well-being – not politicians or bureaucrats.” You can read the full op-ed . I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

name: Erica Smith
subject: Republicans think 2022 is their year. We’re not going to let that happen.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31149?refcode=em20211217-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx ]Today, I’m asking you to chip in a few bucks to help me win this race
for North Carolina’s 2nd District in 2022. Please let me explain why:

NC-02 hasn’t had a Republican congressperson since 1882. But this year,
the NC GOP racially gerrymandered this district to a toss-up — making it
easier for Republicans to win this U.S. House seat and deny us
representation.

Republicans think 2022 is their year. We’re not going to let that happen.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31149?refcode=em20211217-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx ]I’m running for Congress because our community won’t be silenced, but I
need you in this fight if we’re going to defeat the GOP. Please, will you
make a contribution to our campaign today?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31149?refcode=em20211217-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx ]Donate $5

When I was a little girl growing up in North Hampton county, as my family
battled bankruptcy and fought to hold onto the family farm, this community
was there for me.

When I moved home to take care of my dad when he got sick, this community
was there for me.

When I lost my youngest son, those were some of the hardest days of my
life, and this community was there for me.

Now, our community is being confronted with a racial gerrymander that's
trying to rob us of representation. That’s why I’m running for Congress.

I’ve run in a racially
gerrymandered district before — and won. I’ve represented more than half
of the counties in NC-02 in the state senate, and I’ve never lost an
election here. But I’ll need you by my side if I’m going to do it again:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31149?refcode=em20211217-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx ]Can you chip in whatever makes sense for you right now? Every donation
will help us build a powerful campaign with staff, organizing capacity,
and the digital infrastructure we’ll need to compete against the GOP and
deliver this seat for the people.

Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Erica

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31149?refcode=em20211217-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx ][IMG]

Erica Smith
Candidate for North Carolina's 2nd Congressional District

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211217-697-footer&t=1024&refcode2=697_3698_Z_RKrx&akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=697%2E3698%2EZ_RKrx

**Holding The Communists’ Feet To The Fire 🇺🇸**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOiTA6_E_fDtyRr38WpeVYAHt36Vq6I1I6WfbZLMOAJnWft8ZcLKBeDVnh3NdQqy6dPP0HIIRhh72AwBNLHTARjkXI2lvnULrm85VPuu1xdePav_Kslqfe0-L3bZEQbS3VLlqFumcTa7xDDWO852T8Z6cNNi5SSd09G9bCbjbDb1poTi34VGiVD-Mtz_jJU583EI70qabZkcqSFF2DPdsX1i_jGdp9gTEvUSEGyYcBmvazP9YZO7hMmX1Y1EMbI7q-BftQV3LL9-ZlkLQ_eDNWgU%3D)
Image from La Trobe University
The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) is interested in one thing: world domination. And it’s willing to do anything to cripple America and propel itself ahead—even the most despicable, illegal, and unethical things.

Whether it’s [stealing intellectual property](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOq5m5BAJWOmAdjVbFSsFdfFYOXwqBb0W0MWgNjYyb05hyibJnlvmNzTqT3653Z8cPmeBbJU8kC08jCVehFoGFb8CVzCXv3lgEHKEmq7LiOZQDWAPcUOFomO0vyAQzgxtGxsefT0tOcGuPBxVuMOUN3ArZ09yKOv7Va4RHP6OqFZtCDHrMfWXV947ENoxLe33Ztegjp-ZgfbyGn28T7nDPrvLtZIXXLtrawBFUCmfnLs5Q7V2B8swv_4cg-zSNhq1RJnqufTCQ7Ury41xQQAmXhCAffPr7BNgsEmYGXr_ddnnT87smvqA7KKsdxOKlB4HEQ%3D%3D), [committing genocide](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOr7BCYddRbBz-udMhDxmoN_KLxfZB3GQB3z_aOtMRF_jDMt8r02I72UlKHS8sbACn65W8JW153BCgQwohZTeIoAtLYig4r_hLCw0ig-PBX2SPr6HqWEvbd-UwK9I4GKH4zv03PvPTSnFUnHRaR865zCgyu7xA86JaShfYi5xaDM0JWXMze6mG685aHOZGkgRsC1kFunn_unu405QWAEkw8iskVZ-NMjpH6U1-C5Q0vbj4iA6z08ZXMJE6mwnwUHRGp1fU0K72s4WcrqRighWtU-b8B1m0E3xWrZEJfBoLsHDeWvU53kXBSdRY8sO2MXB77JK_z5ZgEKbX53P01uGNovuznRzmBAMOUYRsKiJhBOGGx-137vVk3aN5zRNqgSp7Q%3D%3D) against its Uyghur population and forcing them into slave labor, or [threatening](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOlOueW8043ONKGZzmp13T5PImSe3wvzteU813Tn8730ja6cDeBnkduE16v5Y3g07DaI2pMnpvJ7CkiVb1f9B1AdrV617weHQngPSTWIkhHcVgJ_fm5uRSHcdI3WeGn2KYqUhM9R5e-oi7GnvUAXwTFFksnFW2ce0jl0X-6RPB1TwR7vK3Id8Cl2Lmulryr6jAP8EC98by_EbXEYgxToJHLk1O_G81TZ1eYxnhN6q_iz1oMuqv4U0f-x5l1rs3XMwSVOoHdUlljw7Fjn8PP4yakJQH73tsp2W8sw3gBEttn-PTzLGslDU3rf9h-vTUPbg5NJKa2WdJDv8K9oJ-y-9d11AQJ00gtRVkFAwwdQ7IeEq3-wx2iP0tPioQBrY2mc11Q%3D%3D) Taiwan, or [taking over](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOh2Dx67XtvrGXhaKFAyVYWf2CiWOsJdSMfQdAlGotqi5KTTpxvELC9rkm0jvLAWb9mK0oTgd9qGAu5K2qhxl42xL6ug-ZNOR5_XiwuhRPtGpHD_hMHFnUFQPDbwzS25PV9o08YVWHvzWIvcRb8RqJ82h8PbnYjRamO2uLoEc2p67MzshtszBSbKJ0YUWxdeRkdZsQyzLWHEr6j19gzsl_yz7Fky31djksdznhPW0QPeZa2kAC3mUyrebd16Ob4N2gKu-mQKOJV4nH2nV-qflXnq___OMTIFUOJEp-jKfXK5rZBMqHHbDiU9JKkw1sZUccOrUlzu5mm0cjt0kldH_CxdmQMrPbQ8vWgr6UlUGYBaTX1hs87An6Gf_GjsBxqCOmw%3D%3D) Hong Kong, China will continue to flex its muscle unless we stop it.

So what does Joe Biden do? Fold like a cheap tent. The Biden administration tried to kill the Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act because Uyghur slave labor produces polysilicon for U.S. solar panels, and John Kerry [downplayed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOhCUWyv621_gbsXxmWEXjaZwUUA0i050qfpKpruA8vvn6VkM-tnb2CxE51NCF4Gf_MYG0_rRrSKSvlCrWFDy9wbthEtRljRbn9OKzFNHHOzVMIXYyudqdtluAXyR-fWtreb2mmgN3IXrJinsMXMrj-OZM-CedwoQX5dWrfuqUqr1LALW_3DfqgCX7pQI0d_zLLak-9laoamefdupRgvDkl8jZoCn6ZB4Y5L0LmMtuGtFXBE0v4WhAtXKj3CXO-FNYangT9n70utujT28wiQB5umPRBePDTAZD0iiZYosDrSJwPEJcQB09igTSvuHFQUN5Q%3D%3D) China’s crimes in order to reach a climate deal.

In other words, human rights and U.S. national security take a back seat to Biden’s climate agenda.

I’m grateful the House and Senate [passed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOg70pROzAzlVAe8r4vtDEAj16pnzBEJW9Drc8DTn0gIU75jK_0brMuEg2H_qJ0MfLCFX_gVsniTqUjbuKGbgvXk5p8L4_TfLPxfUjU5W0ZJoOnj2NlMSMqflvR9g_0n0cIqSApTKqP4eRVa0xvIiK6vZDQlJPfITIEaguj00BbRLbVUzfEn_Xt7Hd4QBqwj-TIgs8P6Otw4eTEnQYqanaZ3XQJaCT0TjsIdpQXEtG_ZcPNkbw7Y7Y3vqzwzKKi-L66SHvVTw3Mhin29SpVE3lROOwF_qQapsiC3L4ImG0HhSZZ7S2vsQmWyMwRuLDYnrjXoeaBv8OT1gzFFcjxVvgRNMFk_UtXrVKZpbAPbJdnm7) the Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act, marking the strongest U.S. opposition to China’s forced labor camps to date.

**Celebrating Service 🚒**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOtWRkHtuSQToM0v26O8oaR93z3cC0Pd6oeNEj_AslWF8gQtWPF_-qE3w41eJhwOchcRRBPC7V9rnkLkSv7_JtsTGaMw42nWw-0Jf8TiZ0UIO5dmp1lM0rMlE25RIothgHlwWi2ri4Ug4iivmFMTb4SSwaDIDoHJWlncqGSmM9GTkhN8tbMumJ8NR4mcilMmUUdBdnzZ-Q1DqJb-AIQmeumrpUpjkMS7AlimI5KhRXBlRcj--OF56kCvMtDDfVRsLCa0dx1UOe2zCAtPehnRXrVAS0TwPAYFrQa9Fg7fOuXnMbkMA8LuPiXG54_f-AnzQPIHmkSGu4AYTVGM8CCW5H2o1qjbYIeZtNsGOONjs_YIMeW3D99h1FSas6PWESAmyRA%3D%3D)
_Image courtesy of Knoxnews_
Sometimes in life, you walk right into the next big thing. For retired Knoxville firefighter [D.J. Corcoran](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=8b9c22760e3f48dfabfdaf92c51fbe51&_e=uYWxNMaSk3nPf7CxgTwZOtWRkHtuSQToM0v26O8oaR93z3cC0Pd6oeNEj_AslWF8gQtWPF_-qE3w41eJhwOchcRRBPC7V9rnkLkSv7_JtsTGaMw42nWw-0Jf8TiZ0UIO5dmp1lM0rMlE25RIothgHlwWi2ri4Ug4iivmFMTb4STEWgqQnHIM9vQ28vWDKg_TKVCJk0giGnm0K1jZHOOGpCs--0BydSaLQhs2PU8AXEli_F_6OoWlFoJjvGjS1_rdijv_A6_9n291OBRSNTjSUVzdNjOOMcAK7qgKyzAY_hN_b_e4OkmQT9u7XX3TBZQm7quxzcWpF1-fB_DEEhSythsZW1UcsNr3Q7TiWncwJqMXyqNGrrm3xu0N3VQmcvMADsFtR_3nmF7QAq7G0xL-eg%3D%3D) that’s exactly what happened 28 years ago. After following thick, black smoke to a house fire, beating firefighters to the scene, he became a firefighter.

In 2018, D.J. and his wife, Wendy, lost their son, Pierce, in a fatal car accident when his car was struck by a truck driven by an illegal immigrant. Even in mourning, D.J. and Wendy used their personal loss to shine a light on our broken immigration system to help prevent other tragedies.

As D.J. enters retirement, I want to congratulate and thank him for years of dedicated service to the people of Knoxville. Although he doesn’t have set plans for retirement yet, I’m sure he’ll keep himself busy.
|

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Holding The Communists’ Feet To The Fire 🇺🇸 Image from La Trobe University The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) is interested in one thing: world domination. And it’s willing to do anything to cripple America and propel itself ahead—even the most despicable, illegal, and unethical things. Whether it’s , against its Uyghur population and forcing them into slave labor, or Taiwan, or Hong Kong, China will continue to flex its muscle unless we stop it. So what does Joe Biden do? Fold like a cheap tent. The Biden administration tried to kill the Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act because Uyghur slave labor produces polysilicon for U.S. solar panels, and John Kerry China’s crimes in order to reach a climate deal. In other words, human rights and U.S. national security take a back seat to Biden’s climate agenda. I’m grateful the House and Senate the Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act, marking the strongest U.S. opposition to China’s forced labor camps to date. | Celebrating Service 🚒 Image courtesy of Knoxnews Sometimes in life, you walk right into the next big thing. For retired Knoxville firefighter that’s exactly what happened 28 years ago. After following thick, black smoke to a house fire, beating firefighters to the scene, he became a firefighter. In 2018, D.J. and his wife, Wendy, lost their son, Pierce, in a fatal car accident when his car was struck by a truck driven by an illegal immigrant. Even in mourning, D.J. and Wendy used their personal loss to shine a light on our broken immigration system to help prevent other tragedies. As D.J. enters retirement, I want to congratulate and thank him for years of dedicated service to the people of Knoxville. Although he doesn’t have set plans for retirement yet, I’m sure he’ll keep himself busy. | Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun 🥳 → Caught in the act 🦝 () → Is that not how the long jump is supposed to go? 🏃 () → Santa’s been busy in the off-season 🎅 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. clean_body: I’ll get straight to the point. | Friend, -- I’m sorry for being so abrupt and hastily emailing you from my phone, but we only have 30 minutes. We’re dangerously close to our FINAL mid-month deadline of the year.We still need to raise the remaining $15,610 of our goal by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT. But thankfully, generous conservatives have offered to MATCH the next $8,000 worth of grassroots contributions for the next 30 minutes... and that’s where YOU come in. Thank you for your support! \- Rebecca Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Thu, Dec 16, 2021 Subject: RE: Deadline just 24 hours away To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Tony Evers and his allies are just waiting for us to fall short tomorrow at the FINAL mid-month deadline of 2021. If we kick off this historic election year by having to overcome a massive deficit, the lead we’ve built will be WIPED OUT. But as things stand, we’re still $22,915 behind. Evers’ allies have already begun running lying attack ads against me -- so make no mistake, if we come up short over the next 24 hours, it’ll be seen as a sign of weakness and we’ll be facing a barrage of brand-new attacks. With Tony Evers’ approval now hitting a record-low, we’ve built a LEAD of 53% of Wisconsin voters who would not reelect Evers. But these numbers mean the early attacks against us will only intensify... And we can’t become complacent. If we CRUSH this final mid-month deadline, we’ll have positioned ourselves to grow our advantage into a commanding lead by early next year that Tony Evers won’t be able to overcome -- no matter how much money his allies pump into this governor’s race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

The numbers are drastically higher than the estimates President Biden gave regarding the number of Americans left behind in Afghanistan after U.S. forces left the country. body:
When we invest in our children, we invest in our future.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791660/321426466/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTcwNzA0OC05MjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoX_uiNwi2v42zbikY9n-dIxRuvV4Jw5KhovatSQeQg=)

| As you know, one of my top priorities in Congress is working to support children and families. I believe that starts with advocating for maternal health, especially for Black Americans, who face the highest pregnancy and childbirth mortality rates in the nation.

To this end, I am so proud to be an original cosponsor of the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act of 2021, the first bill of which was signed into law earlier this month. But we still have more to do — one of the reasons I was so excited to vote for President Biden’s Build Back Better Act was the inclusion of $3 billion in maternal health initiatives.

When we invest in our children, we invest in our future. I am proud to work every day to support parents and children through crucial legislation such as the Child Tax Credit, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework, the Build Back Better Act, and the Black Maternal Health Momnibus. **We need folks in Congress willing to stand up for our most vulnerable communities.[_To keep me in office doing this important work, can you chip in to my re-election campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39791661/321426467/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTcwNzA0OC05MjVmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoX_uiNwi2v42zbikY9n-dIxRuvV4Jw5KhovatSQeQg=)**

clean_body: When we invest in our children, we invest in our future. | = | As you know, one of my top priorities in Congress is working to support children and families. I believe that starts with advocating for maternal health, especially for Black Americans, who face the highest pregnancy and childbirth mortality rates in the nation. To this end, I am so proud to be an original cosponsor of the Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act of 2021, the first bill of which was signed into law earlier this month. But we still have more to do — one of the reasons I was so excited to vote for President Biden’s Build Back Better Act was the inclusion of $3 billion in maternal health initiatives. When we invest in our children, we invest in our future. I am proud to work every day to support parents and children through crucial legislation such as the Child Tax Credit, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework, the Build Back Better Act, and the Black Maternal Health Momnibus. We need folks in Congress willing to stand up for our most vulnerable communities.= | | | = | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

## [FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Theresa Ellis announces her candidacy for US Congress in Virginia’s NEW 7th District.I am announcing that I am seeking the Republican nomination for U.S. Congress in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District based on proposed maps for the City of Manassas, Virginia, Manassas Park, Prince William County, Virginia, Fredericksburg, Stafford, Virginia, Spotsylvania area.After looking at the new maps that were released recently, I am running in the new proposed 7th Congressional District. As an elected official for the City of Manassas, I am looking forward to continuing my service to the community and my supporters in the southern part of the district. We have a chance to pick up a seat and change the leadership in Washington.As a resident, experienced successful small business owner and healthcare manager, I am actively involved in finding solutions to the hardships that the pandemic and restrictive policies have placed on our families, businesses, organizations, and communities. For some time, I have been a lone voice on City Council fighting locally and winning for our beliefs and freedoms. Now is the time for new leadership and common sense in Washington, D.C.As a small business owner and elected official, I will continue to fight against higher taxes and wasteful spending. I pledge to protect our freedoms and defend our constitutional rights that we are ALL granted. Growing up in the trades and helping at my family’s auto repair shop, I learned to be a champion to our small businesses. I will continue to help them succeed during this pandemic that has deeply impacted our economy.I have two grandsons who have endured the difficulties of education during the pandemic. We must act with common sense to provide resources to our schools and teachers to maintain safety while providing our children with the high-quality education they deserve. Our children will not be left behind; they are our greatest natural resource.As a Business Communication graduate of George Mason University, I was awarded, “Alumna of the Year,” in 2019 by the Communication Department.My husband George and I raised our children in Manassas, they all attended and graduated from Virginia public schools and state universities. We have a son serving and one daughter who served in the U. S. military.As a military parent, I fully support the military, their families, and loved ones and understand the struggles that they face at home, during deployment, and abroad.As an elected City Councilwoman, I continue my regional volunteerism, leadership, and support for non-profits, service organizations, and causes, such as the Prince William Master Gardeners, Prince William Regional Beekeepers Association (PWRBA), Rotary International, American Red Cross of Loudoun and Prince William, Suicide Awareness, and finding a cure for Alzheimer’s Disease. I was a past Girl Scouts leader to my daughter’s troop in the Manassas City Public Schools and I am a member of All Saints Catholic Church, Manassas.I achieved the designation for Manassas City as “Bee City USA” in my efforts to promote sustainability with the Beautification Committee and founded my own “Shadow for a Day” program to help job and career seekers connect with businesses for opportunities to move forward.As an entrepreneur and small business owner, I am a liaison in our region’s economic development plans on Manassas City Land Use, the Manassas Regional Airport Commission, and serve on the Legislative Committee. I am also the Chair of the Appointment Committee.I look forward to serving the great residents and businesses of the NEW 7th Congressional District of Virginia.Visit to learn more and contribute: https://www.TheresaEllisforCongress.com/Contribute#VibrantVA7th](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2021/12/17/for-immediate-release-theresa-ellis-announces-her-candidacy-for-us-congress-in-virginias-new-7th-district-i-am-announcing-that-i-am-seeking-the-republican-nomination-for-u-s-congress-in-vir/)
